name: Straitjacket
text: Revelation - If there is no copy of Straitjacket in your threat area, put Straitjacket into play in your threat area as an asset that takes up a body slot and 2 hand slots. Return each asset in those slots to your hand. This card cannot leave play except by the ability below. [action] [action]: Discard Straitjacket.

name: Gift of Madness: Pity
text: Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add Gift of Madness (Pity) to your hand. You cannot attack [[Possessed]] enemies. [action]: Randomly choose 1 enemy from among the set-aside [[Monster]] enemies and place it beneath the act deck without looking at it. Discard Gift of Madness (Pity) from your hand.

name: Gift of Madness: Misery
text: Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add Gift of Madness (Misery) to your hand. You cannot trigger [action] abilities on locations. [action]: Randomly choose 1 enemy from among the set-aside [[Monster]] enemies and place it beneath the act deck without looking at it. Discard Gift of Madness (Misery) from your hand.

name: Walls Closing In
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (X), where X is the shroud value of your location. If you fail, you must either take 1 horror for each point you failed by, or randomly choose 1 enemy from among the set-aside [[Monster]] enemies and place it beneath the act deck without looking at it.

name: I'll see you in hell!
text: Each non-[[Elite]] enemy engaged with you is defeated. You are defeated and suffer 1 physical trauma. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: .45 Automatic
text: Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. Ignore the retaliate keyword for this attack.

name: Logical Reasoning
text: Play only if you have at least 1 clue.  Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator either heals 2 horror or discards a [[Terror]] card from his or her threat area.

name: Archaic Glyphs: Guiding Stones
text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. For every 2 points you succeed by, discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Archaic Glyphs: Prophecy Foretold
text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. If you succeed, you may automatically evade an engaged enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Cheap Shot
text: Fight. Add your [agility] value to your skill value for this attack. If you succeed by 2 or more, automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Pickpocketing
text: Fast.  [reaction] After you evade an enemy, exhaust Pickpocketing: Draw 1 card or gain 1 resource. If you succeeded by 2 or more, do both instead.

name: Quantum Flux
text: Shuffle your discard pile into your deck and draw 1 card. Remove Quantum Flux from the game.

name: Recharge
text: Choose a [[Spell]] or [[Relic]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location and reveal a random chaos token from the chaos bag. If you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol, discard the chosen asset. Otherwise, add 3 charges to the chosen asset.

name: Madame Labranche: Mysterious Benefactress
text: [fast] If you have no cards in your hand, exhaust Madame Labranche: Draw 1 card.  [fast] If you have no resources, exhaust Madame Labranche: Gain 1 resource.

name: Snare Trap
text: Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Forced - After a non-[[Elite]] enemy enters attached location: Exhaust that enemy, disengage it from all investigators, and attach Snare Trap to it. Forced - When attached enemy would ready: Instead, discard Snare Trap.

name: A Phantom of Truth
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the amount of doom in play (max 5).  [cultist]: -2. If you fail, move each unengaged [[Byakhee]] in play once toward the nearest investigator.  [tablet]: -3. Cancel the effects and icons of each skill card committed to this test.  [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, lose 1 resource for each point you failed by.

name: A Phantom of Truth
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is the amount of doom in play.  [cultist]: -2. Move each unengaged [[Byakhee]] in play once toward the nearest investigator.  [tablet]: -4. Cancel the effects and icons of each skill card committed to this test.  [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, lose 1 resource for each point you failed by.

name: The First Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt, this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: Daybreak
text: Each investigator disengages from each enemy engaged with him or her and may move to a connecting location. Move The Organist 1 location away from the nearest investigator (to a location with no investigators, if possible).

name: The Second Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt, this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: A Red Sun Rises
text: Each investigator disengages from each enemy engaged with him or her and may move to a connecting location. Move The Organist 1 location away from the nearest investigator (to a location with no investigators, if possible). Check Campaign Log. If Jordan Perry is not listed under "VIPs Slain," search the collection for Jordan Perry (An Imposing Presence) and spawn him in Montparnasse.

name: The Third Night
text: While you have more Conviction than Doubt, this agenda gains: "When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it."

name: Dawn At Last
text: Check Campaign Log. - If you have more (or equal) Doubt than Conviction, proceed to (→R3). - If you have more Conviction than Doubt, advance to act 2b.

name: The Parisian Conspiracy (v. I)
text: Objective - Spend the requisite number of clues to advance. Objective - At the end of the round, if there are 3 or more doom in play, advance.

name: St. Barnabé
text:
If you spent clues to advance:
You nearly bump into a tall man, his coat and hat as black as his skin is pale. You remember seeing him through the windows of St. Barnabé Church. His organ playing continues to haunt you...
Spawn the set-aside The Organist enemy at the lead investigator's location, (Draped in Mystery) side face-up. Advance to Act 2a - Pursuing Shadows.
Otherwise:
The organ you heard earlier continues to haunt you. No matter where you are, the torturous chords play over and over in your head. Startled, you ask a passerby about the church. "St. Barnabé?" she replies in a thick accent. "There is no such place."
Each investigator takes 2 horror. Spawn the set-aside The Organist enemy at the location farthest from all investigators, (Draped in Mystery) side face-up. Advance to Act 2a - Pursuing Shadows.

name: The Parisian Conspiracy (v. II)
text: Objective - Spend the requisite number of clues to advance. Objective - At the end of the round, if there are 3 or more doom in play, advance.

name: True Evil
text:
If you spent clues to advance:
The organ you heard earlier continues to haunt you. No matter where you are, the torturous chords play over and over in your head. The sensation that you are being watched tugs at your mind.
Spawn the set-aside The Organist enemy at the location farthest from all investigators, (Hopeless, I Defied Him) side face-up. Advance to Act 2a - Stalked by Shadows.
Otherwise:
You nearly bump into a tall man, his coat and hat as black as his skin is pale. He gives you a look of hatred, as intense and as deadly as you have ever seen. You recoil at the mere sight of him, and shadows gather around his feet as he marches toward you.
Each investigator takes 2 horror. Spawn the set-aside The Organist enemy at the lead investigator's location, (Hopeless, I Defied Him) side face-up. Advance to Act 2a - Stalked by Shadows.

name: Pursuing Shadows
text: [reaction] After you successfully attack The Organist: An investigator at your location may place 1 of his or her clues on The Organist. (Group limit 1 [per_investigator] times per round.) Objective - If there are 3 [per_investigator] clues on The Organist, advance.

name: Lost Lamb
text: Check Campaign Log. - If you intruded on a secret meeting, proceed to (→R2). - Otherwise, proceed to (→R1).

name: Stalked by Shadows
text: [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or automatically evade The Organist. (Group limit once per round.) Objective - Survive three nights. (Do not advance until you are instructed.)

name: Shepherd's Crook
text: Check Campaign Log. - If you intruded on a secret meeting, proceed to (→R2). - Otherwise, proceed to (→R1).

name: Montparnasse

name: Montmartre
text: [action]: Reveal the top card of each investigator's deck. You may play an asset revealed by this effect (paying its cost), under your control. Shuffle each investigator's deck. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Montmartre
text: [action] Spend 1 resource: Add 1 supply or ammo token to a card you control. (Limit once per round.)

name: Grand Guignol: Theatre of the Great Puppet

name: Grand Guignol: Theatre of the Great Puppet
Opéra Garnier

name: Opéra Garnier

name: Gare d'Orsay
text: [action] Spend 1 resource: Move to any [[Rail]] location.

name: Le Marais

name: Le Marais
text: Forced - After you enter Le Marais: For the remainder of the round, you cannot leave Le Marais.

name: Notre-Dame
text: Each enemy at Notre-Dame gets -1 fight and +1 evade.  [action]: Test [willpower] (6). If you succeed, either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or remove 1 doom from the current agenda. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Gardens of Luxembourg
text: While a [[Byakhee]] enemy is moving, if there is an investigator at Gardens of Luxembourg, that enemy's location is considered to be connected to Gardens of Luxembourg.

name: The Organist: Hopeless, I Defied Him
text: Hunter. Cannot be damaged. Forced - After The Organist moves from the hunter keyword, if it is unengaged: Resolve its hunter keyword again. The Organist cannot attack this phase. (Limit once per round).

name: The Organist: Draped in Mystery
text: Aloof. Cannot be damaged. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: If The Organist is unengaged, move it 1 location away from the nearest investigator (to a location with no investigators, if possible). If it is engaged, disengage it instead.

name: Stealthy Byakhee
text: Hunter.  While Stealthy Byakhee is exhausted, it gets -3 fight.

name: Twin Suns
text: Revelation - Test [intellect] (4). If you fail, you must either remove 1 doom from the current agenda, or take 1 horror for each point you failed by.

name: Deadly Fate
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, discard cards from the top of the encounter deck until an enemy is discarded. You must either draw that enemy, or that enemy attacks you (from the discard pile). If no enemy is discarded, take 1 horror instead.

name: Torturous Chords
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). If you fail, put Torturous Chords into play in your threat area, with 1 resource on it for each point you failed by. Each time you play a card, increase the cost of that card by 1 and remove 1 resource from Torturous Chords. If Torturous Chords has no resources, discard it.

name: Frozen in Fear
text: Revelation - Put Frozen in Fear into play in your threat area. The first time you perform one of the following actions (move, fight, or evade) each round, it costs 1 additional action. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Frozen in Fear.

name: Lost Soul
text: Revelation - Check Campaign Log. - If you have more (or equal) Doubt than Conviction, test [intellect] (X), where X is your [willpower]. If you fail, take 2 damage. - If you have more Conviction than Doubt, test [willpower] (X), where X is your [intellect]. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Inspiring Presence
text: If this skill test is successful, ready an [[Ally]] asset at your location and heal 1 damage or 1 horror from it.

name: Mano a Mano
text: Play only as your first action.  Deal 1 damage to an enemy engaged with you. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Eureka!
text: If this skill test is successful, the investigator performing this test searches the top 3 cards of his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

name: Shortcut
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Attach to your location. Attached location gains: "[fast] Exhaust Shortcut: Move (to a connecting location). Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability."

name: Watch this!

name: .41 Derringer
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If you succeed by 1 or more, this attack deals +1 damage. Once per turn, if you succeed by 3 or more, you may take an additional action this turn.

name: Torrent of Power
text: As an additional cost to commit Torrent of Power to a skill test, spend up to 3 charges from among assets you control.  For each charge spent in this way, Torrent of Power gains [willpower] [wild].

name: Scrying
text: Uses (3 charges).  [fast] Exhaust Scrying and spend 1 charge: Look at the top 3 cards of any investigator's deck, or the encounter deck. Return them to the top of that deck, in any order. If a [[Terror]] or [[Omen]] card is among the looked-at cards, take 1 horror.

name: Waylay
text: Choose an exhausted non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location and test [agility] (X), where X is that enemy's evade value. If you succeed, defeat that enemy.

text: Choose an [[Ally]] asset with printed resource cost X in any player's discard pile. Put that asset into play under your control.

name: Emergency Cache

name: The Pallid Mask
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of locations away from the starting location you are (max 5).  [cultist]: -2. If this token is revealed during an attack, and this skill test is successful, this attack deals 1 less damage.  [tablet]: -2. If there is a ready [[Ghoul]] or [[Geist]] enemy at your location, it attacks you (if there is more than one, choose one).  [elder_thing]: -3. name: Empire of the Dead
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it.

text: Spawn the set-aside The Man in the Pallid Mask weakness in the Tomb of Shadows (instead of its normal spawn location). Check the Campaign Log. If Ishimaru Haruko is not listed under "VIPs Slain," search the collection for Ishimaru Haruko (Just Skin and Bones) and spawn her at the starting location.

name: The Path is Barred
text: Objective - "Tell us how to stop the path from opening!" If The Man in the Pallid Mask is defeated, advance. Objective - "What is he trying to show us?" Investigators in the Tomb of Shadows may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Behind the Mask
text:
If The Man in the Pallid Mask was defeated:
The Stranger drops to one knee, visibly wounded. Your knuckles whiten with anger, and you shout, "We know about Carcosa and Hastur. Now tell us how to stop this madness!" The Stranger digs his fingers into the cold stone floor, and the catacombs shake...
Mark two Conviction in your Campaign Log. Remove The Man in the Pallid Mask from the game. Advance to Act 3a - The Way Out.
If you spent clues to advance:
Recognizing that the Stranger poses no immediate danger to you, you study your surroundings and the strange shadows twist and distort once more, revealing a strange diagram...
Mark two Doubt in your Campaign Log. Remove The Man in the Pallid Mask from the game. Advance to Act 3a - Leading the Way.

name: The Way Out
text: Forced - At the end of the round, if The Gate to Hell is in play: Discard the location that is farthest from The Gate to Hell. Move each investigator and enemy that was at that location to a connecting location and deal 2 damage to each of them. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at The Gate to Hell, advance.

name: Leading the Way
text: Ignore the Forced ability on Blocked Passage. Objective - If each undefeated investigator is at Blocked Passage, advance.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

name: Catacombs
text: As an additional cost for you to enter Catacombs, investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: Spawn - Nearest unrevealed location. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4) to interpret the guide's ravings. If you succeed, look at the revealed side of any Catacombs location in play. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Corpse Dweller
text: Spawn - Discard a [[Humanoid]] enemy at any location and spawn Corpse Dweller at that location (if there are no [[Humanoid]] enemies in play, discard Corpse Dweller and it gains surge instead). Hunter. Retaliate.

name: Eyes in the Walls
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, take 1 horror. When assigning horror from this effect, it must be divided as evenly as possible among eligible cards.

name: The Shadow Behind You
text: Revelation - Put The Shadow Behind You into play in your threat area. Limit 1 per investigator. [action]: You look behind you. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you did not perform the above [action] ability: You must either discard all of your resources or discard all cards in your hand. name: The Pit Below
text: Revelation - Attach to your location if there is no copy of The Pit Below attached (if there is, discard The Pit Below and it gains surge instead). Attached location gets +1 shroud. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at attached location takes 3 damage. Discard The Pit Below.

name: On the Hunt
text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the top 9 cards of the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location), and shuffle the encounter deck. If you cannot, draw the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Stick to the Plan
text: Permanent. Exceptional.  [reaction] Before you draw your opening hand: Search your deck for up to 3 different [[Tactic]] and/or [[Supply]] events, and attach them facedown to Stick to the Plan. Shuffle your deck.  Cards attached to Stick to the Plan may be played as if they were in your hand. As an additional cost to play an attached card, exhaust Stick to the Plan.

name: Guidance
text: Choose another investigator at your location who has yet to take his or her turn this round. That investigator may take an additional action during his or her turn this round.

name: Arcane Insight
text: Uses (3 charges).  [fast] While an investigator is taking his or her turn, spend 1 charge: Your location gets -2 shroud until the end of this turn. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Narrow Escape
text: Fast. Play when an enemy makes an attack of opportunity against you.  Cancel that attack. You get +2 skill value for the next skill test you perform this turn.

name: Suggestion
text: Uses (3 charges). [action] Exhaust Suggestion: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 charge from Suggestion. [reaction] When a non-[[Elite]] enemy would attack you, spend 1 charge: Cancel that attack.

name: St. Hubert's Key: Cleansing Fire
text: You get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], and -2 sanity.  [reaction] When you would be defeated by horror, discard St. Hubert's Key: Immediately heal 2 horror.

name: Ward of Protection
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws a non-weakness treachery card.  Cancel that card's revelation effect. Then, take 1 horror.

name: Arcane Initiate
text: Forced - After Arcane Initiate enters play: Place 1 doom or 2 horror on it. [fast] Exhaust Arcane Initiate: Search the top 3 cards of your deck for a [[Spell]] card and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

name: Not without a fight!
text: Commit to a skill test only if you are engaged with an enemy.  For each enemy engaged with you, "Not without a fight!" gains [willpower] [combat] [agility].

name: True Survivor
text: Return 3 [[Innate]] skills from your discard pile to your hand.

name: Black Stars Rise
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the highest amount of doom on an agenda in play.  [cultist]: Reveal another token. If this token is revealed during an attack or evasion attempt against an enemy with doom on it, this skill test automatically fails instead.  [tablet]: Reveal another token. If you fail, place 1 doom on each agenda.  [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Byakhee]] enemy and draw it.

name: Black Stars Rise
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is the total amount of doom on agendas in play.  [cultist]: Reveal another token. If there is an enemy with 1 or more doom on it at your location, this test automatically fails instead.  [tablet]: Reveal another token. If you do not succeed by at least 1, place 1 doom on each agenda.  [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Byakhee]] enemy and draw it.

name: The Tide Rises
text: [fast] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 doom on this agenda (this effect can cause this agenda to advance). Each investigator gains 2 resources. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Red Dawn's Sunrise
text: Shuffle the encounter discard pile and both set-aside copies of Tidal Terror into the encounter deck. Check the current "c" agenda. - If agenda 1c has 2 or fewer doom on it, mark one Conviction in your Campaign Log. - If agenda 1c has 3 or more doom on it, mark one Doubt in your Campaign Log. - If agenda 1c is not the current "c" agenda, do not mark any Conviction or Doubt.

name: Let The Storm Rage
text: Each copy of Ancient Evils gains surge.  [fast] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 doom on this agenda (this effect can cause this agenda to advance). Each investigator gains 2 resources. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Worlds Intertwine
text: Spawn the set-aside Beast of Aldebaran enemy in the Abbey Tower. Check Campaign Log. If Ashleigh Clarke is not listed under "VIPs Slain," search the collection for Ashleigh Clarke (Songs Die Unheard) and spawn her at Porte de l'Avancée. Remove the set-aside act 3a card from the game. Advance to agenda 3a. Your objective lies within the other agenda deck.

name: Let The Storm Rage
text: Each copy of Ancient Evils gains surge.  [fast] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 doom on this agenda (this effect can cause this agenda to advance). Each investigator gains 2 resources. (Group limit once per round.)

name: The Path to Carcosa
text: Remove the remainder of this agenda deck from the game and replace it with the set-aside act 3a card. Advance to that act card.

name: The City Floods

Advance to agenda 3c. Your objective lies within the other agenda deck.

text: While the current "a" agenda has more doom on it than the current "c" agenda, reduce the difficulty of each skill test at North Tower by 1.

text: Forced - After you enter Broken Steps: You must either discard an asset you control or draw the topmost [[Cultist]] enemy in the encounter discard pile.

text: The path leading to the Abbey Church is blocked. As an additional cost for you to enter the Abbey Church, investigators at Broken Steps must spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

text: [action] Place 1 doom on the current "c" agenda: Heal 2 horror. (Group limit once per game).

name: Knight's Hall
text: [action] If there are no clues on Knight's Hall: Investigate. Investigate using [agility] instead of [intellect]. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, remember that you have "found the tower key."

name: Chapel of St. Aubert: The Path is Open
text: You can only discover clues in the Chapel of St. Aubert if you have 3 or fewer remaining sanity.  [action]: Take up to 3 horror.

name: Chapel of St. Aubert: Waters Forbidden
Chapel of St. Aubert
text: The way to the Chapel of St. Aubert is hidden. You cannot enter the Chapel of St. Aubert unless you have "found a guide."

name: Abbey Tower
text: The door leading up to the Abbey Tower is locked. You cannot enter the Abbey Tower unless you have "found the tower key."

name: Tidal Terror
text: Spawn - Porte de l'Avancée or Chapel of St. Aubert. Hunter.

name: Rift Seeker
text: Forced - After Rift Seeker attacks you: You must either take 1 additional damage and 1 additional horror, or place 1 doom on each agenda in play. [action] Place 1 doom on each agenda in play and take 2 horror: Parley. Discard Rift Seeker.

name: Crashing Floods
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail: - If agenda 1a is in play, take 1 damage and lose 1 action. - If agenda 2a is in play, take 2 damage and lose 2 actions. - If act 3a or agenda 3a is in play, take 3 damage and lose 3 actions.

name: Worlds Merge
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail: - If agenda 1c is in play, take 1 horror and discard 1 card from your hand. - If agenda 2c is in play, take 2 horror and discard 2 cards from your hand. - If act 3c or agenda 3c is in play, take 3 horror and discard 3 cards from your hand.

name: Eat lead!
text: Fast. Play when you activate the Fight ability on a [[Firearm]] asset. You may spend X additional ammo tokens from that asset. When you reveal chaos tokens for this attack, reveal X additional chaos tokens. Choose one to resolve and ignore the rest.

name: Armor of Ardennes
text: [reaction] When damage is assigned to Armor of Ardennes, exhaust Armor of Ardennes: Cancel 1 of that damage.

name: Eidetic Memory
text: Play Eidetic Memory as an exact copy of an [[Insight]] event in any investigator's discard pile (including its resource cost). Remove that event from the game. Remove Eidetic Memory from the game instead of discarding it.

name: No Stone Unturned
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] player window.  Choose an investigator at your location. That investigator searches his or her deck for a card, draws it, and shuffles his or her deck.

name: Charon's Obol: The Ferryman's Pay
text: Permanent. Exceptional. When earning experience during the resolution of a scenario, if you were not defeated during that scenario, you earn 2 additional experience. If you were defeated during that scenario, you are killed.

name: Lupara
text: Uses (2 ammo). Playing Lupara does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. If Lupara entered play this turn, you get an additional +1 [combat] and deal an additional +1 damage for this attack.

name: Cheat Death
text: Fast. Play when you would be defeated.  Disengage from each enemy engaged with you, discard all cards in your threat area, heal 2 horror and 2 damage, and move to any revealed location with no enemies. If it is your turn, end your turn. Remove Cheat Death from the game.

name: Time Warp
text: Fast. Play immediately after an investigator at your location finishes resolving an action during his or her turn. Undo that action (return the game state to exactly the way it was before that action was performed, except for the playing of Time Warp and its costs).

name: Seal of the Elder Sign
text: Do not reveal chaos tokens from the chaos bag for this test. Treat the chaos token revealed for this test as an [elder_sign].  When this test ends, remove Seal of the Elder Sign from the game.

name: Newspaper
text: You get +2 [intellect] while investigating if you have no clues.  [reaction] When you would discover 1 or more clues at your location, if you have no clues: Discover an additional clue at your location.

name: Infighting
text: Fast. Play after the enemy phase begins.  Cancel all attacks made by non-[[Elite]] enemies against you this phase.

name: Key of Ys: Let the Storm Rage
text: You get +1 to each of your skills for each horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When any amount of horror would be placed on you: Place 1 of that horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When Key of Ys leaves play: Discard the top 10 cards of your deck.

name: Key of Ys: Let the Storm Rage
text: Mutated. Exceptional. You get +1 to each of your skills for each horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When any amount of horror would be placed on you: Place 1 of that horror on Key of Ys. Forced - When Key of Ys leaves play: Discard the top 10 cards of your deck.

name: Dim Carcosa
text: Easy / Standard [skull]: -2 (-4 instead if you have no sanity remaining). [cultist]: Reveal another token. If you fail, take 1 horror. [tablet]: -3. If you fail and Hastur is in play, place 1 clue on your location (from the token bank). [elder_thing]: -3. If this token is revealed during an attack or evasion attempt against a [[Monster]] or [[Ancient One]] enemy, lose 1 action.

name: Dim Carcosa
text: Hard / Expert [skull]: -X. X is the amount of horror on you. [cultist]: Reveal another token. If you fail, take 2 horror. [tablet]: -5. If you fail and Hastur is in play, place 1 clue on your location (from the token bank). [elder_thing]: -5. If this token is revealed during an attack or evasion attempt against a [[Monster]] or [[Ancient One]] enemy, lose 1 action.

name: Madness Coils
text: Hastur cannot be defeated. Forced - If there is at least 3 [per_investigator] damage on Hastur: Advance this agenda.

name: Key to the...?
text: The investigators must decide (choose one):   - Any investigator tests [willpower] (4) to snap out of it. If successful, advance to agenda 2a. If failed, you must choose an option you have yet to choose.   - Any investigator tests [intellect] (4) to remember that you've done this before. If successful, advance to agenda 2a. If failed, you must choose an option you have yet to choose.   - This can't be real. This can't be real. This can't be real. Each investigator takes 2 horror. Advance to agenda 2a.   - The investigators faint and awaken some time later. Advance to agenda 2a and place 1 doom on it.

name: Madness Drowns
text: Hastur gets +1 fight and cannot be defeated. Forced - If there is at least 5 [per_investigator] damage on Hastur: Advance this agenda.

name: The Final Guest...?
text: Spawn the set-aside Beast of Aldebaran enemy at the Palace of the King.  Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.

name: Madness Dies
text:
Hastur gets +2 fight.
Hastur cannot be defeated unless an investigator "know the secret."

name: Earth and Carcosa
text: Check Campaign Log. - If you have more (or equal) Conviction than Doubt, proceed to (→R4). - If you have more Doubt than Conviction, proceed to (→R5).

name: In Lost Carcosa
text: Objective - When the investigators have collected the requisite number of clues, they must immediately spend them and advance.

name: His Final Bow...?
text: Spawn the set-aside The Man in the Pallid Mask enemy at the Palace of the King.

name: Search For the Stranger (v.I)
text: Each investigator cannot discover clues. The Man in the Pallid Mask cannot be defeated. Objective - While the lead investigator is at The Man in the Pallid Mask's location, he or she may spend [action] [action] [action] to advance.

name: The Pallid Mask: Chasing Tails
text: Revelation - Put The Pallid Mask into play, under the lead investigator's control. Remove The Man in the Pallid Mask from the game. Spawn the set-aside Hastur (The Tattered King) enemy at the Palace of the King. The Pallid Mask cannot leave play. You get -2 sanity.

name: Search For the Stranger (v.II)
text: Each investigator cannot discover clues. The Man in the Pallid Mask cannot be defeated except by his [action] ability. Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be defeated by his [action] ability, advance.

name: Figment of Your Imagination
text: Put the set-aside Hastur (The King in Yellow) enemy into play next to the act deck. For the remainder of the scenario, Hastur is considered to be in play but is not at any location. Remove The Man in the Pallid Mask from the game.

name: Search For the Stranger (v.III)
text: Each investigator cannot discover clues. The Man in the Pallid Mask cannot be defeated except by damage. Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be defeated by damage, advance.

name: The Disguise is Laid Aside
text: Spawn the set-aside Hastur (Lord of Carcosa)enemy at The Man in the Pallid Mask's location. Remove The Man in the Pallid Mask from the game.

name: The King in Tatters
text: [fast] If there are no clues on your location: Remove each investigator's clues from the game. Flip your location over and resolve the text on the other side. Objective - If Hastur is defeated, advance.

name: Fin
text: - If Hastur (The Tattered King) was the version of Hastur that was defeated, proceed to (→R1). - If Hastur (The King in Yellow) was the version of Hastur that was defeated, proceed to (→R2). - If Hastur (Lord of Carcosa) was the version of Hastur that was defeated, proceed to (→R3).

name: Songs That the Hyades Shall Sing
text: Deal 1 [per_investigator] damage to Hastur, exhaust him, and disengage him from all investigators.  Flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

name: Bleak Plains

text: Each investigator heals 3 horror.  Deal 4 damage to an enemy in play other than Hastur.  Remove this card from the game, and replace it with another set-aside copy of Bleak Plains (move all investigators, enemies, and attachments from this location to the new copy of Bleak Plains). Add clues to that copy of Bleak Plains until it has clues on it equal to its clue value.

name: Bleak Plains
text: While you are at Bleak Plains, you cannot play [[Ally]] assets.

text: You must decide (choose one):   - Choose an enemy in play. Exhaust that enemy and disengage it from all investigators.   - You heal 5 horror.  Remove this card from the game, and replace it with another set-aside copy of Ruins of Carcosa (move all investigators, enemies, and attachments from this location to the new copy of Ruins of Carcosa). name: Ruins of Carcosa
text: Forced - After you discover the last remaining clue on Ruins of Carcosa: Take 1 damage.

name: Dim Streets
text: Forced - After you discover the last remaining clue on Dim Streets: Lose 1 action.

name: The King's Parade
text: Test [combat] (2). If you succeed, exhaust Hastur and disengage him from all investigators.  Remove this card from the game, and replace it with another set-aside copy of Dim Streets (move all investigators, enemies, and attachments from this location to the new copy of Dim Streets). Add clues to that copy of Dim Streets until it has clues on it equal to its clue value.

name: Dim Streets
text: Forced - After you discover the last remaining clue on Dim Streets: Lose 1 action.

Remove this card from the game, and replace it with another set-aside copy of Dim Streets (move all investigators, enemies, and attachments from this location to the new copy of Dim Streets). Add clues to that copy of Dim Streets until it has clues on it equal to its clue value.

name: The Height of the Depths
text: Each investigator heals 5 horror. Add clues to that copy of Depths of Demhe until it has clues on it equal to its clue value.

name: Depths of Demhe
text: While you are at Depths of Demhe, you cannot play fast cards.

name: Steps of the Palace
text: Deal 1 [per_investigator] damage to Hastur, exhaust him, and disengage him from all investigators.  Flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

name: The Fall
text: You must decide (choose one): - You cannot bring yourself to do what must be done. Flip this card back over. - Realizing what you must do, you step forward and push her. Take 2 horror and deal 2 [per_investigator] damage to Hastur. Flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

name: Palace of the King
text: Palace of the King cannot be flipped over unless Hastur has at least 5 [per_investigator] damage on him.

name: Hastur's End
text: Remember that you "know the secret."  Flip this card back over. For the remainder of the game, it cannot be flipped over again.

name: Hastur: The King in Yellow
text: Cannot be damaged except by story card effects. Forced - At the beginning of the enemy phase, if Hastur is ready: Hastur attacks each investigator, in player order (regardless of their location). If Hastur's attack deals you horror in excess of your sanity, you take 1 damage, as well. [action]: Test [willpower] (X), where X is Hastur's fight value. If you succeed, exhaust Hastur. Any investigator may trigger this action.

name: Hastur: Lord of Carcosa
text: Prey - Most remaining sanity. Hunter. Massive. If Hastur's attack deals you horror in excess of your sanity, you take 1 damage, as well. While Hastur is being attacked or evaded by an investigator with no remaining sanity, treat each [elder_sign], "+1," "0," or "-1" token that investigator reveals as a [auto_fail] token.

name: Hastur: The Tattered King
text: Prey - Most remaining sanity. Hunter. If Hastur's attack deals you horror in excess of your sanity, you take 1 damage, as well. While Hastur is being attacked or evaded by an investigator with no remaining sanity, treat each [elder_sign], "+1," "0," or "-1" token that investigator reveals as a [auto_fail] token.

name: Creature Out of Demhe
text: Spawn - Depths of Demhe. Massive. Forced - When Creature out of Demhe's location or a connecting location is flipped over, if Creature out of Demhe is ready: It attacks each investigator at that location.

name: Winged One
text: Spawn - Bleak Plains. Retaliate. Forced - After a location is flipped over, if Winged One is ready and unengaged: Move it once toward that location.

name: Dismal Curse
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you have no remaining sanity, this test gets +2 difficulty. If you fail, take 2 damage (4 damage instead if you have horror on you greater than twice your sanity).

name: Realm of Madness
text: Revelation - Discard cards from your play area and/or from your hand with a total printed resource cost of at least X, where X is the amount of horror on your investigator. If no cards are discarded by this effect, take 2 horror.

name: The Final Act
text: Surge. Revelation - If you have no remaining sanity, place 2 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

name: Possession: Traitorous
text: Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add Possession (Traitorous) to your hand. If you have horror on you greater than twice your sanity, you are immediately eliminated and killed. You may commit this card to a skill test at your location. That test automatically fails.

name: Possession: Torturous
text: Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add Possession (Torturous) to your hand. If you have horror on you greater than twice your sanity, you are immediately eliminated and killed. [action] Spend 5 resources: Discard Possession (Torturous) from your hand.

name: Possession: Murderous
text: Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add Possession (Murderous) to your hand. If you have horror on you greater than twice your sanity, you are immediately eliminated and killed. [action] Deal 2 damage to an investigator at your location: Discard Possession (Murderous) from your hand.

name: Leo Anderson: The Expedition Leader
text: [reaction] After your turn begins: Play an [[Ally]] asset, reducing its cost by 1.  [elder_sign] effect: +2. Search the top 3 cards of your deck for an [[Ally]] asset and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

name: Leo Anderson: The Expedition Leader
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Mitch Brown, Bought in Blood, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Ursula Downs: The Explorer
text: [reaction] After you move to a location: Take an investigate action. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1. After this test ends, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Ursula Downs: The Explorer
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, [[Relic]] cards level 0-4, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Jake Williams, Call of the Unknown, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Finn Edwards: The Bootlegger
text: You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to evade.  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each exhausted enemy in play. If you succeed by 2 or more, you may discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Finn Edwards: The Bootlegger
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: [[Illicit]] cards level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to five other level 0 Seeker and/or Survivor cards ([seeker] and/or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Smuggled Goods, Finn's Trusty .38, Caught Red-handed, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Father Mateo: The Priest
text: [reaction] When an investigator reveals an [auto_fail] chaos token: Cancel that token and treat it as an [elder_sign] token, instead. (Limit once per game.)  [elder_sign] effect: You automatically succeed. After this test ends, either (choose one):   - Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.   - If it is your turn, you may take an additional action this turn.

name: Father Mateo: The Priest
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, [[Blessed]] cards level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): The Codex of Ages, Serpents of Yig, 1 random basic weakness. Bonus Experience: You begin the campaign with 5 additional experience (does not affect the number of weaknesses you must take in Standalone Mode).

name: Calvin Wright: The Haunted
text: You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect] for each horror on you.  You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility] for each damage on you.  [elder_sign] effect: +0. You may either heal 1 damage or horror, or take 1 direct damage or direct horror.

name: Calvin Wright: The Haunted
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, [[Spirit]] cards level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Until the End of Time, Voice of the Messenger, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Mitch Brown: Sole Survivor
text: Leo Anderson deck only.  You have 2 additional ally slots, which can only be used to hold non-unique allies.

name: Bought in Blood
text: Revelation - You must either discard an [[Ally]] asset you control from play, or discard each [[Ally]] asset from your hand. If no assets are discarded by this effect, shuffle Bought in Blood back into your deck.

name: Jake Williams: Loyal Companion
text: Ursula Downs deck only.  The first move or investigate action you perform each turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity.  [reaction] After you reveal a location or put a new location into play, exhaust Jake Williams: Draw 1 card.

name: Call of the Unknown
text: Revelation - Put Call of the Unknown into play in your threat area. Forced - At the beginning of your turn: Choose a location other than your location. When your turn ends, if you did not successfully investigate the chosen location this turn, take 2 horror and shuffle Call of the Unknown back into your deck.

name: Smuggled Goods
text: Finn Edwards deck only.  Play only if there are no ready enemies at your location.  Search either your discard pile or the top 9 cards of your deck for an [[Illicit]] card and draw it. If you searched your deck, shuffle Smuggled Goods into your deck.

name: Finn's Trusty .38: Never Leave Home Without It
text: Finn Edwards deck only. Fast. Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If the attacked enemy is not engaged with you, you deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Caught Red-Handed
text: Revelation - Ready each enemy at your location or a connecting location. Each hunter enemy at a connecting location moves 1 location toward you. If no enemies move as a result of this effect, shuffle Caught Red-Handed back into your deck.

name: The Codex of Ages: finis omnium nunc est
text: Father Mateo deck only. Seal ([elder_sign]). You get +1 [willpower] while there is a token sealed here. [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag, discard The Codex of Ages: Resolve the [elder_sign] token that was sealed here as if it were just revealed from the chaos bag (instead of revealing a token from the chaos bag).

name: Serpents of Yig
text: Prey - Father Mateo only. Hunter. Revelation - Search the chaos bag for the [elder_sign] chaos token and seal it on Serpents of Yig.

name: Until the End of Time
text: Calvin Wright deck only.  Direct damage and direct horror may be assigned to Until the End of Time.

name: Voice of the Messenger
text: Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Take 1 direct damage and suffer 1 physical trauma. - Take 1 direct horror and suffer 1 mental trauma.

name: Survival Knife
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [reaction] After an enemy attack deals damage to you during the enemy phase, exhaust Survival Knife: Fight. This attack targets the attacking enemy. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Venturer
text: Uses (3 supplies).  [fast] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Venturer: Place 1 supply or ammo on an asset controlled by an investigator at your location.

name: Trusted
text: Fast. Play only during your turn.  Attach to an [[Ally]] asset you control.  Attached asset gets +1 health and +1 sanity.

name: Reliable
text: Fast. Play only during your turn.  Attach to an [[Item]] asset you control.  While resolving a triggered ability on attached asset, you get +1 to each of your skills.

name: Dr. Elli Horowitz: Assistant Curator
text: [reaction] After Dr. Elli Horowitz enters play: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Relic]] asset and attach it to her. Shuffle your deck. Each [[Relic]] asset attached to Dr. Elli Horowitz does not take up any slots (it is still considered to be in play and under your control).

name: Ancient Stone: Unidentified
text: [action]: Investigate. Your location gets +3 shroud for this investigation. If you succeed, discover 1 additional clue at your location, discard Ancient Stone, and record in your Campaign Log that "you have identified the stone." Next to this, in parentheses, record the difficulty of this skill test.

name: Tooth of Eztli: Mortal Reminder
text: You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility] while resolving an ability on a treachery card.  [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test while resolving an ability on a treachery card, exhaust Tooth of Eztli: Draw 1 card.

name: Unearth the Ancients
text: Investigate. Choose a [seeker] asset in your hand. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the chosen asset's printed cost. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, put the chosen asset into play. If that asset has the [[Relic]] trait, draw 1 card.

name: Treasure Hunter
text: You get +1 [intellect]. Forced - At the end of the upkeep phase: You must either pay 1 resource or discard Treasure Hunter.

name: Decorated Skull: Doom Begets Doom
text: Uses (0 charges). [reaction] After an investigator, [[Ally]] asset, or enemy at your location is defeated: Place 1 resource (from the token bank) on Decorated Skull, as a charge. [action] Spend 1 charge: Draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.

name: Eavesdrop
text: Choose an unengaged enemy at your location. Test [intellect] (X), where X is the evade value of the chosen enemy. If you succeed, discover 2 clues at your location.

name: You handle this one!
text: Fast. Play after you draw a non-peril encounter card, but before resolving that card's effects.  Choose another investigator. That investigator is considered to have drawn that encounter card instead. Gain 1 resource.

name: Mists of R'lyeh
text: Uses (4 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Evade. This evasion attempt uses [willpower] instead of [agility]. If you succeed, after evading the chosen enemy, you may move to a connecting location. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this evasion attempt, choose and discard a card from your hand.

name: The Chthonian Stone: Stygian Waymark
text: Seal ([skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing]). Forced - After you reveal an [auto_fail] symbol during a skill test: Return The Chthonian Stone to your hand.

name: Protective Incantation
text: Group limit 2 copies of Protective Incantation in play. Seal (any except [auto_fail]). Forced - At the end of your turn: You must either spend 1 resource or discard Protective Incantation.

name: Dark Prophecy
text: Fast. Play when you would reveal a chaos token.  Reveal 5 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose one of those tokens with a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol to resolve, and ignore the rest. (If no such token is revealed, choose any one of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the rest.)

name: Dark Prophecy
text: Mutated. Fast. Play when you would reveal a chaos token.  Reveal 5 chaos tokens instead of 1. Choose one of those tokens with a non-[elder_sign] symbol to resolve, and ignore the rest. (If no such token is revealed, choose any one of those tokens to resolve, and ignore the rest.)

name: Improvised Weapon
text: You may play Improvised Weapon from your discard pile. If you do, shuffle it into your deck after resolving its effects. Fight. The attacked enemy gets -1 fight for this attack. (If you played Improvised Weapon from your discard pile, this attack deals +1 damage.)

name: Dumb Luck
text: Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less during an evasion attempt against a non-[[Elite]] enemy.  Place that enemy on top of the encounter deck.

name: Yaotl: Lost Son of Eztli
text: [fast] Exhaust Yaotl: During this skill test, you get a bonus to each skill equal to the number of matching skill icons on the top card of your discard pile (not counting [wild] icons).  [fast]: Discard the top card of your deck. (Limit once per phase.)

name: Last Chance
text: Commit only to a skill test with no other cards committed to it. Other cards cannot be committed to this skill test.  Last Chance loses [wild] for each card in your hand.

name: Backpack
text: [reaction] After Backpack enters play: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for up to 3 non-weakness [[Item]] or [[Supply]] cards, and attach them facedown to Backpack. Shuffle your deck.  Cards attached to Backpack may be played as if they were in your hand. If there are no cards attached to Backpack, discard it.

name: Dark Pact
text: Campaign Mode only. Deal 2 damage to an investigator at your location. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if Dark Pact is still in your hand: Remove Dark Pact from your deck. Search the collection for The Price of Failure and add it to your deck.

name: The Price of Failure
text: Revelation - Take 2 damage and 2 horror. Place 1 doom on the current agenda (this effect can cause the current agenda to advance). Remove The Price of Failure from your deck. Search the collection for Dark Pact and place it in your discard pile.

name: Doomed
text: Campaign Mode only. Revelation - Take 1 horror. In your Campaign Log, under your investigator's earned story assets/weaknesses, record that "doom approaches." If this was already recorded, remove Doomed from your deck, search the collection for Accursed Fate, and place it on the bottom of your deck.

name: Accursed Fate
text: Revelation - Take 2 horror. In your Campaign Log, under your investigator's earned story assets/weaknesses, record that "the hour is nigh." If this was already recorded, remove Accursed Fate from your deck, search the collection for The Bell Tolls, and place it on the bottom of your deck.

name: The Bell Tolls
text: Revelation - The hour of your demise has arrived. You are killed.

name: The Untamed Wilds
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of vengeance points in the victory display.  [cultist]: -X. X is the number of locations in play (max 5).  [tablet]: -X. X is the number of cards in the exploration deck (max 5).  [elder_thing]: -2. If you are poisoned, this test automatically fails instead.

name: The Untamed Wilds
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 higher than the number of vengeance points in the victory display.  [cultist]: -X. X is the number of locations in play.  [tablet]: -X. X is the number of cards in the exploration deck (min 3).  [elder_thing]: -3. If you are poisoned, this test automatically fails instead. If you are not poisoned and you fail, put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area.

name: Expedition into the Wild
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: The Serpents Attack!
text: Shuffle the encounter discard pile and the set-aside Agents of Yig encounter set into the encounter deck.  Each investigator tests [willpower] (3). Each investigator who fails performs the following, in order:  - If you are poisoned, take 1 damage and 1 horror.  - If you are not poisoned, put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area.

name: Intruders
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: Endless Meandering
text: Each investigator is defeated. Each investigator who is not poisoned adds a set-aside Poisoned weakness to his or her deck.

name: Exploring the Rainforest
text: Objective - When the round ends, investigators at any non-[[Campsite]] locations may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Natives
text: Put the set-aside Ichtaca enemy into play at the lead investigator's location.  Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.

name: Huntress of the Eztli
text: Objective - If Ichtaca is defeated, advance. Objective - If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Ichtaca, place her in the victory display and advance.

name: Ichtaca's Response
text:
If Ichtaca has 1 [per_investigator] clues on her:
"Interesting. You are not simply here to shed blood," Ichtaca says with a spark of wonder in her voice, and you are stunned to hear her speaking in perfect English.
Remember that "Ichtaca is leading the way." Add 1 [cultist] token to the chaos bag for the remainder of the campaign. Shuffle the 3 set-aside [[Ruins]] locations into the exploration deck and advance to Act 3 - "Search for the Ruins."
If you defeated Ichtaca:
"Fools!" Ichtaca shouts to you with a pained voice. "You do not understand the forces you are meddling with. If you truly wish to die, you will find the temple over the river to the south."
Remember that "you fought with Ichtaca." Choose an investigator to take control of the set-aside Alejandro Vela asset. Add 1 [tablet] token to the chaos bag for the remainder of the campaign. Shuffle the 3 set-aside [[Ruins]] locations into the exploration deck and advance to Act 3a - "The Guarded Ruins."

name: Search for the Ruins
text: Each Eztli Guardian enemy cannot attack or be attacked. Ignore the effects of each Arrows from the Trees treachery. Objective - Only investigators at the Ruins of Eztli can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Guarded Ruins
text: Each Eztli Guardian enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade. Each Arrows from the Trees treachery gains surge. Objective - Only investigators at the Ruins of Eztli can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Expedition Camp
text: [action]: Resign. The wilds are too dangerous! [action]: Check your supplies. If you have a map, look at the top 3 cards of the exploration deck. Place 1 on the bottom and the other 2 on top, in any order.

name: Alejandro Vela: Renowned Historian
text: You get +1 skill value while investigating an [[Ancient]] location.  [action] If you are at an [[Ancient]] location, exhaust Alejandro Vela: Draw 2 cards.

name: Ichtaca: Keeper of the Eztli
text: Alert. Retaliate. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4) to convince Ichtaca you are not her enemy. If you succeed, place 1 clue on her. If you fail and Ichtaca is ready, she attacks you.

name: Ruins of Eztli
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Ruins of Eztli: Draw the top card of the encounter deck.

name: The Doom of Eztli
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if there is doom on your location).  [cultist] [tablet]: -X. X is the number of locations with doom on them.  [elder_thing]: Reveal another chaos token. If you fail, place 1 doom on your location.

name: The Doom of Eztli
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -2 (-4 instead if there is doom on your location).  [cultist] [tablet]: -X. X is the total amount of doom on locations in play.  [elder_thing]: Reveal another chaos token. Place 1 doom on your location.

name: Something Stirs...
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold. Forced - When this agenda advances: Do not remove doom from each location in play.

name: The Ruins Awaken
text: Spawn the set-aside Harbinger of Valusia at the location with the most doom.

name: The Temple Warden
text: *This agenda gets +1 [per_investigator] doom threshold.

name: Catastrophic Ruin
text: Each investigator who has not resigned is defeated.

name: Into the Ruins
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it.

name: Hidden Corridors
text:
Shuffle the set-aside Chamber of Time location into the exploration deck.
As you pass the strange glyphs in the walls, the ruins groan and creak in protest, and the carvings glow ominously. Years of deterioration have faded the pattern of these glyphs, and the surrounding stones seep with a venomous pus. If only you had some way to restore these glyphs...
Check your supplies. If any investigator has chalk, remove this act from the game. Otherwise, place this act in the victory display. It gains Vengeance 1.

name: Magic and Science
text: [action]: Explore. Draw the top card of the exploration deck. If it is a connecting location, put it into play and move to it. Objective - Only investigators in the Chamber of Time may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Relic
text: Choose an investigator in the Chamber of Time to take control of the Relic of Ages. Move the placement of each location to form a straight line, with the Chamber of Time on the left and the Entryway on the right. Each other location is placed from left to right in between these two locations, in order of how much doom is on them, from lowest to highest (in the event of a tie, you may decide the order). Until the end of the scenario, ignore all location connections. Instead, each location is connected to each location to its left and right.

name: Escape the Ruins
text: While there are 3 or more vengeance points in the victory display, each [[Serpent]] enemy gets +1 evade. Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance.

name: Avoiding Doom
text:
If an investigator resigned with the Relic of Ages under his or her control:
The floor of the temple stops shaking, and the dull humming in the walls goes quiet. Without the relic in its chamber, the ruins appear to be sleeping once more. You still have no idea what the object is or what its purpose may be, but you dare not tarry any longer to find out.
(→R1)
Otherwise:
For a moment, the temple continues to shudder, the architecture twisting and contorting strangely. Pleased that it is once again whole, the temple then returns to its dormant state.
(→R3)

name: Entryway
text: [action]: Resign. You've escaped... for now. [action]: Check your supplies. If you have torches, look at the top 2 cards of the exploration deck. Discard each treachery looked at by this effect. Shuffle the exploration deck.

name: Relic of Ages: ...A Device, of Some Sort
Harbinger of Valusia: The Sleeper Awakens
text: Alert. Hunter. Retaliate. Harbinger of Valusia can retaliate while exhausted. Forced - After Harbinger of Valusia is successfully attacked or evaded: Place 1 resource on it. Then, if there are 2 [per_investigator] resources on it, it vanishes with a sinister hiss. (Set it aside, out of play. It keeps all damage tokens.)

name: Ancient Hall
text: Forced - At the end of the round: Flip 1 of the clues on Ancient Hall to its doom side. Any investigator at Ancient Hall may spend 3 resources to cancel this effect.

name: Grand Chamber
text: Forced - When you investigate Grand Chamber and do not succeed by at least 2: Before resolving any other effects from this skill test, flip 1 of the clues on Grand Chamber to its doom side.

name: Burial Pit
text: Forced - After you put Burial Pit into play by exploring successfully: You must either draw 2 cards from the top of the encounter deck or place 2 doom on Burial Pit, or any combination thereof.

name: Underground Ruins
text: While there is an enemy in Underground Ruins, Underground Ruins is considered to be in the victory display (for the purposes of counting vengeance). Forced - After an enemy in Underground Ruins leaves play: Place 1 doom on Underground Ruins.

name: Secret Passage
text: Forced - After you enter Secret Passage: You must either take 1 horror and 1 damage, or place 1 doom on Secret Passage. Check your supplies. If you or an investigator at Secret Passage has a rope, ignore this effect.

name: Chamber of Time
text: Forced - After Chamber of Time enters play: Attach the set-aside Relic of Ages asset to the Chamber of Time. Place 1 doom on Chamber of Time.

name: Path of Thorns
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Path of Thorns: Take 1 damage. Forced - After you explore while at Path of Thorns, if the exploration was not successful: Take 1 damage.

name: River Canyon
text: [action]: Heal 1 damage from an investigator at River Canyon. Check your supplies. If you have a canteen, heal 2 additional damage. (Limit once per game.)

name: Rope Bridge
text: Forced - When you attempt to explore while at Rope Bridge: Test [agility] (2). If you fail, cancel the exploration, take 2 damage, lose all remaining actions, and end your turn. Place your investigator in the River Canyon (if it is not in play, search the exploration deck for River Canyon and put it into play first; shuffle the exploration deck).

name: Serpent's Haven
text: Each [[Serpent]] enemy at Serpent's Haven gets +1 fight. Forced - After you investigate or explore while at Serpent's Haven, if you are poisoned: Take 1 damage.

name: Circuitous Trail
text: As an additional cost for you to investigate or explore while at Circuitous Trail, check your supplies. If no investigator at your location has a compass, you must spend 3 resources.

name: Temple of the Fang
text: Temple of the Fang gets +1 shroud for each vengeance point in the victory display.

name: Overgrown Ruins
text: Forced - After you enter this location, if you are poisoned: Lose all remaining actions and end your turn.

name: Overgrowth
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. You cannot explore at attached location. [action]: Test [combat] (4) to hack through the brush or [intellect] (4) to find another route. If you succeed, discard Overgrowth.

name: Voice of the Jungle
text: Revelation - Put Voice of the Jungle into play in your threat area. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you did not successfully explore this turn: Take 1 horror. [action]: Test [willpower] (3). If you succeed, discard Voice of the Jungle.

name: Pit Viper
text: Forced - After Pit Viper deals you damage from its attack: If you are not poisoned, put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area.

name: Boa Constrictor
text: Hunter. Forced - After Boa Constrictor attacks you: During the next upkeep phase, your exhausted cards cannot ready.

name: Snake Bite
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, you must either (choose one): - Deal 5 damage to an [[Ally]] asset you control. - Take 1 direct damage. If you are not poisoned, put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area.

name: Lost in the Wilds
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 horror for each point you fail by and add Lost in the Wilds to your threat area. You cannot move or explore. Forced - At the end of your turn: Discard Lost in the Wilds.

name: Low on Supplies
text: Peril. Revelation - You must decide (choose one): - Each investigator loses 2 resources. - Each investigator takes 1 damage. - Each investigator chooses and discards an asset he or she controls.

name: Brood of Yig
text: Hunter.  Brood of Yig gets +1 fight for each vengeance point in the victory display.

name: Serpent from Yoth
text: While there are 1 or more vengeance points in the victory display, Serpent from Yoth gains retaliate.  While there are 2 or more vengeance points in the victory display, Serpent from Yoth gains hunter.  While there are 3 or more vengeance points in the victory display, Serpent from Yoth takes 1 less damage from each attack made against it.

name: Curse of Yig
text: Revelation - Put Curse of Yig into play in your threat area. You get -1 [combat], -1 health, and gain the [[Serpent]] trait. [action]: Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +1 difficulty for each vengeance point in the victory display. If you succeed, discard Curse of Yig.

name: Eztli Guardian
text: Spawn - Any empty location ([[Ancient]], if able). Alert. Aloof. Forced - When enemies attack during the enemy phase, if Eztli Guardian is ready and unengaged: It attacks each investigator in each connecting location.

name: Arrows from the Trees
text: Revelation - Take 1 damage, plus 1 additional damage for each [[Ally]] asset you control. Each other investigator at an [[Ancient]] location must also resolve that effect.

name: Final Mistake
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (2). This test gets +1 difficulty for each doom on your location. If you fail, take 2 damage.

name: Entombed
text: Revelation - Put Entombed into play in your threat area. You cannot disengage from enemies or move. [action]: Test [agility] (4) to escape the tomb or [combat] (4) to break out. If you succeed, discard Entombed. If you fail, reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 until the end of the round.

name: A Tear in Time
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must either lose 1 action or take 1 horror.

name: Lost in Time
text: Revelation - Shuffle a non-story asset you control into your deck, moving all damage and horror from that asset to your investigator. If no asset is shuffled into your deck by this effect, choose and discard 3 cards from your hand.

name: Ill Omen
text: Peril. Revelation - Choose a location where there is at least 1 investigator. Place 1 doom on that location. Each investigator at the chosen location takes 1 horror.

name: Ancestral Fear
text: Peril. Surge. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Place 1 doom on your location and discard Ancestral Fear (instead of placing it in the victory display). - Place Ancestral Fear in the victory display.

name: Deep Dark
text: Revelation - Put Deep Dark into play next to the agenda deck. No more than 1 clue may be discovered from each location by each investigator each round. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard 1 copy of Deep Dark from play. (Max once per round.)

name: Brotherhood Cultist
text: Hunter. Brotherhood Cultist gets +1 fight and +1 evade for each doom on it. Forced - When you initiate an attack against Brotherhood Cultist: Place 1 doom on Brotherhood Cultist.

name: Shadowed
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, take 1 horror and Shadowed gains surge. Otherwise, find the [[Cultist]] enemy nearest to you. Place 1 doom on that enemy and test [willpower] (X), where X is that enemy's fight value. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Words of Power
text: Revelation - Put Words of Power into play in your threat area. If there are 1 or more enemies at your location with doom on them, you cannot damage those enemies or discover clues at your location. [action] [action]: Discard Words of Power.

name: Fang of Yig
text: Prey - Poisoned investigator. Retaliate. While Fang of Yig is engaged with a poisoned investigator, that investigator cannot play cards or commit cards to skill tests.

name: Snakescourge
text: Revelation - Put Snakescourge into play in your threat area. If you are poisoned, Snakescourge gains surge. Treat each of your non-weakness [[Item]] assets as if its text box were blank (except for [[Traits]]). Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Snakescourge.

name: Serpent's Call
text: Revelation - You must either (choose one): Put a set-aside Poisoned weakness into play in your threat area, or draw the top 2 cards of the encounter deck.

name: Creeping Poison
text: Surge. Revelation - Each investigator who is poisoned takes 1 damage.

name: Poisoned
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Limit 1 per deck. Permanent. You are poisoned. (This has no game effect on its own. Other card effects may change or become stronger while you are poisoned.)

name: Scene of the Crime
text: Play only as your first action.  Discover 1 clue at your location (2 clues instead if there is an enemy at that location). This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Marksmanship
text: Fast. Play when you activate the Fight ability on a [[Firearm]] or [[Ranged]] asset. This attack can target an enemy at a connecting location. Ignore the aloof and retaliate keywords for this attack. If this attack succeeds against an enemy not engaged with you, the attack deals +1 damage.

name: Persuasion
text: Parley. Choose a non-weakness [[Humanoid]] enemy at your location and test [intellect] (3). This test gets +X difficulty, where X is that enemy's horror value. If you succeed, shuffle the chosen enemy into the encounter deck. If the chosen enemy is [[Elite]], automatically evade it instead.

name: Persuasion
text: Mutated. Parley. Choose a non-weakness enemy at your location and test [intellect] (3). This test gets +X difficulty, where X is that enemy's horror value. If you succeed, shuffle the chosen enemy into the encounter deck. If the chosen enemy is [[Elite]], automatically evade it instead.

name: Shrewd Analysis
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Anytime you upgrade a card with the (Unidentified) or (Untranslated) subtitle, you may upgrade a second copy of that card at no experience cost. If you do, the two upgraded versions are chosen at random from among the eligible options. (You must still meet all deckbuilding restrictions.)

name: Lucky Cigarette Case
text: [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by 2 or more, exhaust Lucky Cigarette Case: Draw 1 card.

name: Fence
text: [reaction] When you play an [[Illicit]] card during your turn, exhaust Fence: The [[Illicit]] card gains fast. If it was already fast, reduce its cost by 1 instead.

name: Arcane Research
text: Permanent.  When you purchase Arcane Research, suffer 1 mental trauma.  After each scenario of a campaign, reduce the experience cost of the first [[Spell]] card you upgrade before the next scenario by 1.

name: Counterspell
text: Fast. Play when a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] chaos token is revealed during a skill test at your location. Cancel that chaos token. (Do not reveal a new chaos token to replace it.)

name: Counterspell
text: Mutated. Fast. Play when a non-[auto_fail] symbol is revealed during a skill test at your location. Cancel that chaos token. (Do not reveal a new chaos token to replace it.)

name: Perseverance
text: Fast. Play when you are assigned damage and/or horror that would defeat you.  Cancel up to 4 of that damage and/or horror.

name: Stunning Blow
text: If this skill test is successful during an attack, automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Threads of Fate
text: Easy / Standard  [skull] : -X. X is the highest number of doom on a [[cultist]] enemy.  [cultist]: -2. If you do not succeed by at least 1, take 1 damage.  [tablet]: -2. If you do not succeed by at least 1, place 1 doom on the nearest [[cultist]] enemy.  [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, lose 1 of your clues.

name: Threads of Fate
text: Hard / Expert  [skull] : -X. X is the total number of doom in play.  [cultist]: -2. If you do not succeed by at least 2, take 1 direct damage.  [tablet]: -2. If you do not succeed by at least 2, place 1 doom on each [[cultist]] enemy.  [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, lose 1 of your clues.

name: Three Fates
text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

name: At The Sun's Peak
text: Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.  If there are only 2 act decks in play, place 1 doom on agenda 2a as it is revealed.

name: Behind the Curtain
text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

name: The Sun Sets
text: Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck.  If there are only 2 act decks in play, place 1 doom on agenda 3a as it is revealed.  If there is only 1 act deck in play, place 2 doom on agenda 3a as it is revealed.

name: Hidden Entanglements
text: [action]: Resign. You don't want to risk taking too long, so you head to safety with the information you've gathered.

name: Night Passes
text: Each surviving investigator is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma.

name: The Relic Is Missing!
text: Objective - Only investigators in Miskatonic University can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Eztli Exhibit
text: Revelation - Put the Eztli Exhibit into play. Forced - After you reveal a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol while investigating the Eztli Exhibit: Take 1 horror.

name: Harlan Is in Danger!
text: Objective - Only investigators in Miskatonic University can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Harlan Earnstone: Historical Theorist
text: Revelation - Put Harlan Earnstone into play in Easttown. [action] Discard the top 3 cards of your deck: Parley. You try to snap Earnstone out of his daze. Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, place 1 clue on him (from the token pool).

name: At the Exhibit
text: Objective - Only investigators in the Eztli Exhibit can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Relic's Location
text: Put the set-aside Town Hall location into play. If it was already in play, add add 1 [per_investigator] clues to it. Attach the set-aside Relic of Ages to the Town Hall.  If there are 2 or fewer act decks in play, add an additional 1 [per_investigator] clues to the Town Hall.  Advance to Act 3a - "Find the Relic."

name: At the Exhibit
text: Objective - Only investigators in the Eztli Exhibit can spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: The Brotherhood's Plot
text: Search the encounter deck, discard pile, and victory display for a Brotherhood Cultist and spawn it in the location farthest from all investigators. Heal all damage from each Brotherhood Cultist in play.  Attach the set-aside Relic of Ages to the Brotherhood Cultist farthest from all investigators.  If there are 2 or fewer act decks in play, add 1 doom to the Brotherhood Cultist with the attached Relic of Ages.  Advance to Act 3a - "Recover the Relic."

name: Harlan's Curse
text: Objective - If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Harlan Earnstone: You must remove them and immediately advance.

name: Safekeeping
text: Attach the set-aside Relic of Ages to the Curiositie Shoppe.  If there are 2 or fewer act decks in play, search the encounter deck for 1 Acolyte (2 Acolytes instead if there are 3 or 4 investigators in the game). Spawn each searched-for Acolyte in the Curiositie Shoppe.  Advance to Act 3a - "Find the Relic."

name: Harlan's Curse
text: Objective - If there are 1 [per_investigator] clues on Harlan Earnstone: You must remove them and immediately advance.

name: Harlan Earnstone: Crazed by the Curse
text: Revelation - Switch this card with the [[Bystander]] version of Harlan Earnstone, removing that version from the game. Attach the set-aside Relic of Ages to Harlan Earnstone. Advance to Act 3a - "Recover the Relic." Forced - After you successfully evade Harlan Earnstone by 3 or more: Add him to the victory display.

name: Find the Relic
text: While Relic of Ages is attached to a location, that location gets +2 shroud. Objective - If Relic of Ages is attached to a location with no remaining clues, advance.

name: The Relic Is Found
text:
If the Relic of Ages is attached to the Town Hall:
After an hour of searching Arkham's Town Hall, you notice a faint blue glow emanating from underneath the door to the city planner's office. You break into the office without being noticed. The relic is lying on his desk, along with a map of the city that is covered in strange markings and iconography. Why is it here?
The investigator nearest to the Town Hall takes control of the Relic of Ages. Remove the remainder of the "a/b" act deck from the game. If another act card is in play, continue playing. Otherwise, proceed to (→R1).
If the Relic of Ages is attached to the Curiositie Shoppe:
Sure enough, the relic is tucked away in a corner of the shop's storage room, hidden from sight.
The investigator nearest to the Curiositie Shoppe takes control of the Relic of Ages. Remove the remainder of the "a/b" act deck from the game. If another act card is in play, continue playing. Otherwise, proceed to (→R1).

name: Recover the Relic
text: While Relic of Ages is attached to an enemy, that enemy gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Objective - If the enemy the Relic of Ages is attached to leaves play, advance.

name: The Relic is Recovered
text:
If the Relic of Ages was attached to a Brotherhood Cultist:
As the robed figure collapses, the relic falls out of his cloak, clattering to the ground and rolling to a stop nearby. It is pulsing with an odd glow, as though aware it is being searched for.
The investigator nearest to the Brotherhood Cultist's location takes control of the Relic of Ages. Remove the remainder of the "a/b" act deck from the game. If another act card is in play, continue playing. Otherwise, proceed to (→R1).
If the Relic of Ages was attached to Harlan Earnstone:
