text: Forced - At the end of the investigation phase: Each investigator at a fully flooded location must either take 3 damage or move to the location directly below their location. Objective - If each undefeated investigator has resigned, advance. (Hint - You may wish to find what you came for before you leave this place. The black and red keys represent the objects you need the most.)

name: Bound for Y'ha-nthlei
text:
If at least 1 investigator resigned from the Moon Room:
The underwater tunnels seem to go on forever, stretching into murk-ridden eddies. Dark salt water crashes against the glass helmet of your suit. After what feels like an eternity, you burst into the cold evening air, chilled to the bone. You pull the heavy suit off, piece by piece, the moment you reach the shore.
(→R1) If each investigator who resigned did so from the Falcon Point Gatehouse:
You flee into the lonely woods, panting for air. Somehow, you've escaped the denizens of the deep once more.
(→R2)

name: Falcon Point Gatehouse
text: Falcon Point Gatehouse cannot be fully flooded. [action]: Resign. You head back into the woods, leaving the lighthouse and its mysteries behind. If you control the black or red keys, place each one you control on the current act.

name: Falcon Point Gatehouse
text: Falcon Point Gatehouse cannot be fully flooded.

name: Lighthouse Stairwell
text: Lighthouse Stairwell cannot be fully flooded.  [fast] If there are any [[Relic]] story assets currently set aside: Add 1 of them to your hand.

name: Lighthouse Stairwell
text: Lighthouse Stairwell cannot be fully flooded.

name: Lantern Room
text: Lantern Room cannot be flooded. Forced - After Lantern Room is revealed: Place the set-aside white key on it.

name: Lantern Room
text: Lantern Room cannot be flooded.

name: Falcon Point Cliffside
text: Falcon Point Cliffside cannot be fully flooded. [fast] If you control the white key: Using the white key, you peer out into the dark, stormy horizon, and something sparks in your memories. Read Flashback XII in the Campaign Guide.

name: Falcon Point Cliffside
text: Falcon Point Cliffside cannot be fully flooded.

name: Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage
text: Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage cannot be fully flooded. Forced - After Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage is revealed: Place the set-aside yellow key on it.

name: Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage
text: Lighthouse Keeper's Cottage cannot be fully flooded.

name: Sunken Grotto: Upper Depths
text: [fast] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Look at the revealed side of a Tidal Tunnel location on this row.

name: Lighthouse Basement
text: The door leading into the basement of the lighthouse is locked tight. You cannot enter this location unless you control the blue key.

name: Sunken Grotto: Lower Depths
text: [fast] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Look at the revealed side of a Tidal Tunnel location on this row.

name: Sunken Grotto: Final Depths
text: [fast] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Look at the revealed side of a Tidal Tunnel location on this row.

name: Shrine to Hydra
text: Clues cannot be discovered from Shrine to Hydra except by investigating. While an investigator at Shrine to Hydra controls the green key, Shrine to Hydra gets -3 shroud. Forced - After Shrine to Hydra is revealed: Place the set-aside red key on it.

name: Deep One Nursery
text: [fast] If you control the purple key: You compare the purple key to the oversized eggs littering the flooded chamber and recall something. Read Flashback XIII in the Campaign Guide. Forced - After Deep One Nursery is revealed: Increase its flood level.

name: The Moon Room
text: [action] If The Moon Room is unflooded: Resign. You don one of the empty diving suits and dive into the reflecting pool. If you control the black or red keys, place each one you control on the current act. Forced - After The Moon Room is revealed: Increase its flood level.

name: Sunken Archives
text: Clues cannot be discovered at Sunken Archives while it is flooded. Forced - After Sunken Archives is revealed: It becomes fully flooded. Place the set-aside black key on it.

name: Pump Room
text: [action]: Test [intellect] (2) or [agility] (2). If you succeed, choose two locations. Decrease the flood level of one location and increase the flood level of the other (if you succeed by 2 or more, you may instead choose just one location and decrease its flood level).

name: Captured!
text:
The first time an investigator is captured, read the following:
You are bound and dragged deep underground, then thrown into a sealed prison cell, surrounded on all sides by dripping stone walls. Your cries fall on deaf ears as your captor's footsteps fade into the distance.
Remove the captured investigator from their location and return each asset in that investigator's hand slots to their hand. Turn that investigator's mini-card sideways to indicate that they have been captured. Captured investigators cannot move, fight, or be engaged. Flip this story card over to its "Holding Cells" side and put it into play. It is not on any existing row or column, and is only connected to Sunken Grotto locations through its connection icons. Place the captured investigator in Holding Cells. From now on, whenever an investigator is captured, resolve this same effect (return each asset in their hand slots to their hand, turn their mini-card sideways, and place them in Holding Cells).

name: Holding Cells
text: Holding Cells cannot be flooded.   Enemies cannot enter or spawn at Holding Cells (if one would spawn here, spawn it at any Sunken Grotto instead).  [action]: Test [combat] (3) to break the bars or [agility] (3) to pick the locks. If you control the yellow key, this test automatically succeeds. If you succeed, free an investigator who is captured here.

name: Oceiros Marsh: Keeper of the Lighthouse
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Oceiros Marsh gets +2 evade while his location is flooded. Forced - After Oceiros Marsh is successfully evaded: For each point you succeeded by, take control of 1 key on him. Forced - After Oceiros Marsh attacks you during the enemy phase: You are captured. Place each of your keys on Oceiros Marsh.

name: Deep One Nursemaid
text: Aloof. Retaliate. While Deep One Nursemaid is unengaged, each other [[Deep One]] enemy at its location or connecting locations gets +1 fight and +1 evade. Forced - After Deep One Nursemaid engages you: Draw the top card of the encounter deck. That card loses surge.

name: Deep One Hatchling
text: Surge. Forced - After you engage Deep One Hatchling: Either lose 1 action or it attacks you. Forced - After you defeat Deep One Hatchling: Move the nearest ready, unengaged [[Deep One]] enemy once toward your location. That enemy loses aloof during this movement.

name: Hideous Lullaby
text: Revelation - If there are no [[Deep One]] enemies in play, Hideous Lullaby gains surge. Otherwise, find the [[Deep One]] enemy with the highest fight value. Test [willpower] (X), where X is that enemy's fight value. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Kiss of Brine
text: Revelation - Test [combat] (2). Increase the difficulty of this test by 2 if you are at a flooded location. If you fail, take 1 damage and put Kiss of Brine into play in your threat area. You cannot gain resources or draw cards. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Discard Kiss of Brine.

name: Totality
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, put Totality into play in your threat area. Forced - After you enter a flooded location: Take 1 horror. Forced - At the end of your turn: Discard Totality.

name: Worth His Salt
text: Revelation - Attach to Oceiros Marsh, even if he is in the victory display. Forced - After Oceiros Marsh moves via his hunter keyword, if he is unengaged: Resolve his hunter keyword again. He cannot attack this phase. (Limit once per round.) Forced - When Oceiros Marsh attacks: This attack deals +1 damage and +1 horror. Discard this card.

name: Taken Captive
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). If you fail, you are captured; place each of your keys on Holding Cells.

name: Enchant Weapon
text: Attach to a [[Weapon]] asset controlled by an investigator at your location. Limit 1 per asset. Attached asset gains the [[Relic]] trait and takes up an arcane slot in addition to its other slots. [reaction] When you perform a Fight action using attached asset, exhaust this card: Add the owner of this card's [willpower] to your [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

name: Nephthys: Huntress of Bast
text: You get +1 [willpower].  [reaction] When 1 or more [bless] tokens would be removed from the chaos bag during a skill test: Seal them on Nephthys, instead.  [fast] Exhaust Nephthys: Either release 3 [bless] tokens sealed on her, or return 3 [bless] tokens sealed on her to the token pool to deal 2 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: The Stygian Eye
text: Fast. Play only during your turn.  Reduce the cost to play The Stygian Eye by 1 for each [curse] token in the chaos bag.  Until the end of the round, you get +3 to each of your skills.

name: Hyperawareness
text: Uses (2 resources). Replenish these resources at the start of each round.  [fast] Spend 1 resource from your resource pool or from Hyperawareness: You get +1 [intellect] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: Geas
text: Exceptional. You get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility]. Forced - After Geas enters play: Make a promise using the following formula - "I shall not (draw/play/commit) any cards during each of my turns." If you break this promise while Geas is in play, discard it and add 10 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: Hard Knocks
text: Uses (2 resources). Replenish these resources at the start of each round.  [fast] Spend 1 resource from your resource pool or from Hard Knocks: You get +1 [combat] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: Ikiaq: The Council's Chosen
text: You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [intellect]. You get -1 [willpower] and -1 [intellect] for each weakness beneath Ikiaq.  [reaction] When an investigator at your location draws a basic weakness, exhaust Ikiaq: Cancel that weakness's effects and place it facedown beneath Ikiaq. Its owner must draw it if Ikiaq leaves play.

name: Flute of the Outer Gods
text: Exceptional. Seal (up to X [curse]).  [action] Exhaust Flute of the Outer Gods and release 1 [curse] token sealed on it: Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. Either move the chosen enemy to a connecting location, or deal its damage to any enemy at its location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Flute of the Outer Gods
text: Mutated. Seal (up to X [curse]). Limit 1 per deck.  [action] Exhaust Flute of the Outer Gods and release 1 [curse] token sealed on it: Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. Either move the chosen enemy to a connecting location, or deal its damage to any enemy at its location. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: A Watchful Peace
text: As an additional cost to play A Watchful Peace, search the chaos bag and/or cards in play for a total of 5 [bless] tokens and return them to the token pool.  Fast. Play when the "draw encounter cards" step of the mythos phase would begin.  Skip this step of the mythos phase.

name: A Watchful Peace
text: Mutated. As an additional cost to play A Watchful Peace, search the chaos bag and/or cards in play for a total of 5 [bless] tokens and return them to the token pool.  Fast. Play when the "draw encounter cards" step of the mythos phase would begin.  Skip this step of the mythos phase. Remove A Watchful Peace from the game.

name: Dig Deep
text: Uses (2 resources). Replenish these resources at the start of each round.  [fast] Spend 1 resource from your resource pool or from Dig Deep: You get +1 [willpower] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: Favor of the Moon
text: Fast. Seal (up to 3 [curse]). If there are no tokens sealed on Favor of the Moon, discard it.  [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag, exhaust Favor of the Moon: Resolve a token sealed here instead, as if it were just revealed from the chaos bag. Then, gain 1 resource.

name: Favor of the Sun
text: Fast. Seal (up to 3 [bless]). If there are no tokens sealed on Favor of the Sun, discard it.  [reaction] When you would reveal a chaos token from the chaos bag, exhaust Favor of the Sun: Resolve a token sealed here instead, as if it were just revealed from the chaos bag.

name: Purifying Corruption
text: [reaction] When you draw a non-weakness treachery, take 1 damage and 1 horror: Cancel that card's revelation effect and place 1 resource on this card, as corruption. If this card has 3 or more corruption, remove it from the game. [fast] Draw the top card of the encounter deck: Either heal 1 damage and 1 horror, or remove 1 corruption from this card. Card design by the Impure at Arkham Nights 2019.

name: The Lair of Dagon
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -1 for each key on this card.  [cultist]: 0. Reveal an additional chaos token. If you reveal 1 or more [curse] tokens during this test, you automatically fail.  [tablet]: -3. If you fail, place each key you control on your location.  [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag.

name: The Lair of Dagon
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -2 for each key on this card.  [cultist]: -2. Reveal an additional chaos token. If you reveal 1 or more [curse] tokens during this test, you automatically fail.  [tablet]: -3. Place each key you control on your location and take 1 damage.  [elder_thing]: -4. Add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: The Initiation (v. I)
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Encounter in the Deep
text: Add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag. Check Campaign Log. - If a jailbreak is listed under "Memories Recovered" in your Campaign Log, spawn the set-aside [[Suspect]] enemy at a [[Third Floor]] location, or at the Grand Entryway if a [[Third Floor]] location is not in play (ignoring that enemy's revelation ability). Place the set-aside blue key on that enemy. - Otherwise, the lead investigator searches the encounter deck for a [[Cultist]] enemy and spawns it in a connecting location. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: The Initiation (v. II)
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Encounter in the Deep
text: Remove 2 [curse] tokens from the chaos bag. Check Campaign Log. - If a jailbreak is listed under "Memories Recovered" in your Campaign Log, spawn the set-aside [[Suspect]] enemy at a [[Third Floor]] location, or at the Grand Entryway if a [[Third Floor]] location is not in play (ignoring that enemy's revelation ability). That enemy enters play exhausted. - Otherwise, nothing else happens.

name: What Lurks Below (v. I)
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Cursed Luck
text: Add 4 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: What Lurks Below (v. II)
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Dawson Returns
text: Remove 4 [curse] tokens from the chaos bag.  Choose an investigator to take control of the set-aside Thomas Dawson story asset. For the remainder of this scenario, Thomas Dawson does not take up an ally slot. That investigator may also take control of 1 spent key on the scenario reference card.

name: The Ritual Advances
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: An Awakening
text: Each investigator who has not resigned is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma. In your Campaign Log, record Dagon has awakened. (→R1)

name: The First Oath
text: Each [[Suspect]] enemy gets +1 [per_investigator] health, loses aloof, and cannot be parleyed with. [fast] Spend the blue, red, white, or yellow key: Discard each [[Obstacle]] card attached to your location. Objective - If each surviving investigator is at Grand Entryway and the investigators have "unlocked the entrance to the caves," advance.

name: Secrecy
text: If a [[Suspect]] enemy is in play, remove it from the game. Remove each location other than Grand Entryway from the game (or add them to the victory display if they have Victory X and no clues on them), discarding each card at those locations. Shuffle the set-aside Tidal Tunnel locations and put each of them into play. Increase the flood level of each location. Shuffle each set-aside Syzygy and Tidal Alignment card into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.

name: The Second Oath
text: Each [[Suspect]] enemy gets +1 [per_investigator] health, loses aloof, and cannot be parleyed with. [fast] Spend the blue, red, white, or yellow key: Discard each [[Obstacle]] card attached to your location. Objective - If an investigator has "unlocked the final depths," advance.

name: Loyalty
text: Put the set-aside Lair of Dagon location into play, fully flooded. Put the set-aside Dagon enemy into play at Lair of Dagon, (Deep in Slumber) side faceup. Check the current agenda. - If it is agenda 1a, add 10 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag. - If it is agenda 2a, add 5 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: The Third Oath
text: Each [[Suspect]] enemy gets +1 [per_investigator] health, loses aloof, and cannot be parleyed with. [fast] Spend the blue, red, white, or yellow key: Discard each [[Obstacle]] card attached to your location. Objective - Disrupt the Order's ritual by placing clues on this act. If there are 3 [per_investigator] clues on this act, advance.

name: Rebirth
text: In your Campaign Log, record the Order's ritual was disrupted. - If Dagon (Deep in Slumber) is in play, in your Campaign Log, record Dagon still slumbers. - If Dagon (Awakened and Enraged) is in play or in the victory display, in your Campaign Log, record Dagon has awakened. (→R1)

name: Grand Entryway
text: Grand Entryway is connected to each [[Cave]] location, and vice versa. [action] Resign. You've had enough of this place. [action] Investigators at the Grand Entryway spend the purple key and 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remember that you have "unlocked the entrance to the caves".

name: Hall of Blood
text: Forced - After Hall of Blood is revealed: Place the set-aside red key on it. Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Hall of Blood: Take 1 horror.

name: Hall of the Deep
text: [action] Spend the red key: There is an audible click as the crest of blood fits into the stone altar. Put the set-aside Y'ha-nthlei Statue story asset into play under your control, [[Cursed]] side faceup. Forced - After Hall of the Deep is revealed: Increase its flood level.

name: Foul Corridors
text: [action] Spend the black key: Remember that you have "unlocked the third floor."

name: Hall of Loyalty
text: [fast] Spend the blue, red, white, or yellow key: Choose 3 of the following -   - Heal 1 damage.  - Draw 2 cards.  - Gain 3 resources.  - Add 4 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: Hall of Rebirth
text: Forced - After you reveal Hall of Rebirth: Draw the set-aside Apostle of Dagon enemy.

name: Hall of Silence
text: Forced - After Hall of Silence is revealed: Place the set-aside purple key on it. Forced - After an investigator at this location fails a skill test: Add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag.

name: Third Floor Hall
text: Investigators cannot move to Third Floor Hall unless an investigator has "unlocked the third floor."

name: Doorway to the Depths
text: Forced - After Doorway to the Depths is revealed: Place the set-aside green key on the location with the most clues. [action] Investigators at the Doorway to the Depths spend the green key and 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remember that you have "unlocked the final depths."

name: Lair of Dagon
text: Forced - After you enter Lair of Dagon: Test your lowest skill (3). If you fail, take 1 horror. [action]: Test [willpower] (3) or [agility] (3). If you succeed, place 1 of your clues on the current act. You may spend 1 key to place 1 more of your clues on the current act.

name: Dagon: Deep in Slumber
text: Dagon is slumbering. He cannot attack or engage, and is immune to investigator actions and player card effects. Forced - After an investigator at this location fails a skill test: Place 1 resource on Dagon. Then, if there are at least 1 [per_investigator] +2 resources on Dagon, flip him. [action] Spend 1 key: Remove 1 resource from Dagon.

name: Dagon: Awakened and Enraged
text: Massive. Dagon gets +6 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After an investigator at this location fails a skill test: Ready Dagon. Dagon attacks that investigator.

name: Apostle of Dagon
text: Apostle of Dagon gets +1 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Apostle of Dagon enters play: Place the set-aside black key on it. Forced - When an investigator deals 1 or more damage to Apostle of Dagon: Add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag.

name: Cerenerian Deep One
text: Prey - Lowest [willpower]. Hunter. Forced - After Cerenerian Deep One engages you: Add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: Fulfill the Oaths
text: Revelation - If it is... - ... act 1, test [agility] (3). - ... act 2, test [agility] (3), then [combat] (2). - ... act 3, test [agility] (3), then [combat] (2), then [intellect] (2). For each of these skill tests you fail, take 1 damage.

name: Secret Gathering
text: Revelation - Add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag. Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, place 1 doom on each [[Cultist]] enemy and take 1 horror (2 horror instead if 1 or more [curse] tokens were revealed during this test).

name: Esoteric Ritual
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose and discard 2 cards from your hand or discard an asset you control (if 1 or more [curse] tokens were revealed during this test, do both instead).

name: Heralds of the Deep
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3) (5 instead if your location is flooded). For each point you fail by, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag (if you cannot, Heralds of the Deep gains surge).

name: Stone Barrier
text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location without a Stone Barrier attached. If attached location is flooded, Stone Barrier gains surge. While Stone Barrier is ready, investigators cannot move out of attached location. [action]: Test [agility] (1), [combat] (2), or [intellect] (3). If you succeed, exhaust Stone Barrier.

name: Y'ha-nthlei Statue: Mysterious Relic
text: [fast] Exhaust Y'ha-nthlei Statue and add 2 [curse] tokens to the chaos bag: Deal 1 damage to a [[Humanoid]] enemy at your location.  [action] Spend the blue, white, red, or yellow key: Ready Y'ha-nthlei Statue and flip it to its other side.

name: Y'ha-nthlei Statue: Dynamic Relic
text: [fast] Exhaust Y'ha-nthlei Statue: Deal 1 damage to a [[Humanoid]] enemy at your location.  [fast] Exhaust Y'ha-nthlei Statue: Remove 2 [curse] tokens from the chaos bag and replace them with an equal number of [bless] tokens.

name: Hallow
text: As an additional cost to play Hallow, return a total of 10 [bless] tokens to the token pool from the chaos bag or sealed on cards in play.  Remove 1 doom from any card in play.

name: Hallow
text: Mutated. As an additional cost to play Hallow, return a total of 10 [bless] tokens to the token pool from the chaos bag or sealed on cards in play.  Remove 1 doom from any card in play. Remove Hallow from the game.

name: Holy Spear
text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. When you initiate this ability, you may release a [bless] token sealed on Holy Spear. [action] Search the chaos bag for 2 [bless] tokens and seal them on Holy Spear: Fight. You get +4 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack.

name: Ancestral Knowledge
text: Permanent. Exceptional.  Your deck must include at least 10 skills. Your deck size is increased by 5.  [reaction] Before drawing your opening hand: Attach 5 random non-weakness skills from your deck facedown to this card.  [fast] Exhaust Ancestral Knowledge: Draw 1 attached skill.

name: Ariadne's Twine
text: Uses (0 secrets).  Secrets on Ariadne's Twine can be spent as if they were on any asset controlled by an investigator at your location.  [fast] Exhaust Ariadne's Twine: Move 1 secret from an asset you control to your resource pool, as a resource, or vice versa.

name: .25 Automatic
text: Fast. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. If the attacked enemy is exhausted, you get +2 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack. [reaction] After you evade an enemy at your location: Perform the above Fight ability without spending an action.

name: Justify the Means
text: You may commit Justify the Means to any type of test.  As an additional cost to commit Justify the Means to a skill test, add [curse] tokens to the chaos bag equal to this test's difficulty.  This test automatically succeeds.

name: Lucky Dice: ...Or Are They?
text: Exceptional.  [reaction] When you reveal a non-[curse], non-[auto_fail] chaos token, add 1 [curse] token to the chaos bag: Ignore the just revealed chaos token and reveal another one to resolve. If that token has a [curse] or [auto_fail] symbol, return Lucky Dice to your hand (cannot be ignored/canceled).

name: Rite of Equilibrium
text: Either (choose one):  - Add X [curse] tokens to the chaos bag to add X [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.  - Remove X [curse] and X [bless] tokens from the chaos bag to heal X total horror from among cards at your location.

name: Rite of Equilibrium
text: Either (choose one):  - Add X [curse] tokens to the chaos bag to add X [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.  - Remove X [curse] and X [bless] tokens from the chaos bag to heal X total horror from among cards at your location.

name: Jacob Morrison: Coast Guard Captain
text: Jacob Morrison does not ready during the upkeep phase.  [reaction] When you would fail a skill test, exhaust Jacob Morrison: You get +2 skill value for that test.  [reaction] After a [bless] token is revealed from the chaos bag during a skill test you are performing: Ready Jacob Morrison.

name: Shrine of the Moirai
text: Attach to your location. Uses (3 offerings). Attached location gains: "[fast] Draw the top card of the encounter deck, exhaust Shrine of the Moirai, and spend 1 offering: Return up to 2 cards with a total combined level of 5 or less from your discard pile to your hand. Any investigator at this location may trigger this ability." Card design by the Moirai at Arkham Nights 2019.

name: Into the Maelstrom
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if there are 4 or more unflooded [[Y'ha-nthlei]] locations in play).  [cultist]: -3. If you fail, place 1 doom on the current agenda (this may cause the current agenda to advance).  [tablet]: -4. If you fail, you must either increase the flood level of your location or take 1 damage.  [elder_thing]: -5. If you fail and there is a key on your location, take 1 horror.

name: Into the Maelstrom
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -2 (-4 instead if there are 4 or more unflooded [[Y'ha-nthlei]] locations in play).  [cultist]: -4. If you fail, place 1 doom on the current agenda (this may cause the current agenda to advance).  [tablet]: -5. If you fail, you must either increase the flood level of your location or take 1 damage.  [elder_thing]: -6. If you fail and there is a key on your location, take 1 horror.

name: Under the Surface
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Maelstrom Mutation
text: Shuffle the set-aside Lloigor enemy and the set-aside Aquatic Abomination enemy into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.

name: Celestial Alignment
text: Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Tyrants of the Deep
text: If Hydra is in play, flip her to her (Awakened and Enraged) side. If Dagon is in play and slumbering, flip him to his (Awakened and Enraged) side.

name: The Flood
text: If an [[Ancient One]] enemy is slumbering, flip it to its (Awakened and Enraged) side. Forced - When your turn begins, if you are at a fully flooded location, you struggle for air: When your turn ends, if you did not enter an unflooded or partially flooded location during your turn, take 5 direct damage.

name: Back into the Depths
text: Objective - If each investigator is at Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei and the investigators possess each of the following keys (blue, red, yellow, and green), you may choose to advance.

name: To Y'ha-nthlei
text: Remove each location other than Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei from the game (or add them to the victory display if they have Victory X and no clues remaining). Discard each card at those locations. Put set-aside locations into play as shown in the Campaign Guide, following the "Act 2 Setup" instructions. (Note that the number of Y'ha-nthlei locations used and the arrangement of the locations varies depending on the number of investigators in the game.) Put the set-aside Hydra enemy into play in the Lair of Hydra, (Deep in Slumber) side faceup. Put the set-aside Dagon enemy into play in the Lair of Dagon. Check Campaign Log. If Dagon has awakened, he enters play (Awakened and Enraged) side faceup. If Dagon still slumbers, he enters play (Deep in Slumber) side faceup.

name: City of the Deep (v. I)
text: [fast] Either remove 1 [per_investigator] damage from an [[Ancient One]] enemy at your location, or investigators at a [[Lair]] location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Decrease the flood level of any non-[[Sanctum]] location in play Objective - Stop the Deep Ones' ritual by draining the city. If each location in play is unflooded, advance.

name: Shattering the Alignment
text: Add this card to the victory display. - If there is another act card in play, you may choose to either continue playing in order to accomplish the objective on that act card, or proceed immediately to (→R1) without fulfilling that objective. - If there are no other act cards in play, proceed to (→R1). Victory 2.

name: City of the Deep (v. II)
text: Objective - Recover the riches of the Deep Ones. If the Lair of Dagon, the Lair of Hydra, and the Vault of Riches with the purple key have no clues on them, advance.

name: Conspiracy Fulfilled
text: Add this card to the victory display. - If there is another act card in play, you may choose to either continue playing in order to accomplish the objective on that act card, or proceed immediately to (→R1) without fulfilling that objective. - If there are no other act cards in play, proceed to (→R1). Victory 2.

name: City of the Deep (v. III)
text: Objective - Collapse the vault containing the Deep Ones' riches. If Dagon and Hydra each have at least 4 [per_investigator] damage on them, advance.

name: Conspiracy Dismantled
text: Add this card to the victory display. - If there is another act card in play, you may choose to either continue playing in order to accomplish the objective on that act card, or proceed immediately to (→R1) without fulfilling that objective. - If there are no other act cards in play, proceed to (→R1). Victory 2.

name: Dark Abyss
text: Forced - After Dark Abyss is revealed: Randomly choose 1 of the set-aside facedown keys and place it on Dark Abyss without looking at it. Forced - After the last clue is discovered from Dark Abyss: Dark Abyss becomes fully flooded. Increase the flood level of each location connected to Dark Abyss.

name: Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei
text: Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei enters play partially flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Sunken Halls
text: [action] If you control the black key: Place it on Sunken Halls. Forced - After an enemy enters Sunken Halls, if the black key is on Sunken Halls: Deal 2 damage to that enemy.

name: Y'ha-nthlei
text: Y'ha-nthlei enters play partially flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Vault of Riches
text: [action] If you control the purple key: Place it on Vault of Riches. Then, choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at any location. Automatically evade that enemy and move it to Vault of Riches. That enemy does not ready during the next upkeep phase. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Y'ha-nthlei
text: Y'ha-nthlei enters play partially flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Undersea Corridors
text: [action] If you control the white key: Place it on Undersea Corridors. [fast] If the white key is on Undersea Corridors: Move. Move to a connecting location. (Limit once per round.)

name: Y'ha-nthlei
text: Y'ha-nthlei enters play partially flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Statues in the Deep
text: [action] If you control the blue key, place it on this location and investigators here spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Automatically evade each [[Ancient One]] enemy. Unflood this location. For the remainder of the game, this location cannot be flooded. (Group limit once per game.) Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating this location: Take 1 damage.

name: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum
text: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum enters play fully flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Submerged Temple
text: Each [[Deep One]] enemy at this location gets +2 fight.  [action] If you control the green key, place it on this location and investigators here spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Automatically evade each [[Ancient One]] enemy. Unflood this location. For the remainder of the game, this location cannot be flooded. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum
text: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum enters play fully flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Syzygy Chamber
text: [action] If you control the red key, place it on this location and investigators here spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Automatically evade each [[Ancient One]] enemy. Unflood this location. For the remainder of the game, this location cannot be flooded. (Group limit once per game.) Forced - After any location's flood value is increased: Each investigator at this location takes 1 horror.

name: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum
text: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum enters play fully flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Onyx Guardians
text: During the enemy phase, each ready [[Ancient One]] enemy can attack investigators here as if they were engaged.  [action] If you control the yellow key, place it on this location and investigators here spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Automatically evade each [[Ancient One]] enemy. Unflood this location. For the remainder of the game, this location cannot be flooded. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum
text: Y'ha-nthlei Sanctum enters play fully flooded (even while it is unrevealed).

name: Lair of Dagon: Sanctuary of Father Dagon
text: Lair of Dagon gets -1 shroud for each [[Sanctum]] location with a key on it. [fast] Check Campaign Log. If all 7 keys are on locations and the Order's ritual was disrupted: You dig deep into your memories to recall what happened the last time you were here. Read Flashback XIV in the Campaign Guide.

name: Lair of Dagon: Sanctuary of Father Dagon
Lair of Hydra: High Temple of Mother Hydra
text: Lair of Hydra gets -1 shroud for each [[Sanctum]] location with a key on it.  [action] Place the black, purple, or white key on this location: Deal 3 damage to an [[Ancient One]] enemy that is not slumbering. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Lair of Hydra: High Temple of Mother Hydra
Dagon: Deep in Slumber
text: Dagon is slumbering. He cannot attack or engage, and is immune to investigator actions and player card effects. Forced - At the end of the investigation phase, if an investigator is in Lair of Dagon and Dagon is ready: Place 1 doom on him. [action]: Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, either exhaust Dagon or remove 1 doom from him. If you fail by 3 or more, place 1 doom on him.

name: Dagon: Awakened and Enraged
text: Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Dagon gets -1 fight for each [[Sanctum]] location with a key on it. Forced - After Dagon is evaded or dealt damage: Do the same to a copy of Dagon's Brood in play, as well.

name: Hydra: Deep in Slumber
text: Hydra is slumbering. She cannot attack or engage, and is immune to investigator actions and player card effects. Forced - At the end of the investigation phase, if an investigator is in Lair of Hydra and Hydra is ready: Place 1 doom on her. [action]: Test [willpower] (4). If you succeed, either exhaust Hydra or remove 1 doom from her. If you fail by 3 or more, place 1 doom on her.

name: Hydra: Awakened and Enraged
text: Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Hydra gets -1 fight for each [[Sanctum]] location with a key on it. Forced - After Hydra is evaded or dealt damage: Do the same to a copy of Hydra's Brood in play, as well.

name: Aquatic Abomination
text: Hunter.  While Aquatic Abomination is moving, fully flooded locations are considered to be connected to one another.  Aquatic Abomination cannot attack during the same phase it moved via its hunter keyword.

name: Dagon's Brood
text: Spawn - Lair of Dagon or Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei (whichever is farther from you). Hunter. Forced - After Dagon's Brood engages you, if Dagon is in play: Either place 1 doom on Dagon, or Dagon attacks you.

name: Hydra's Brood
text: Spawn - Lair of Hydra or Gateway to Y'ha-nthlei (whichever is farther from you). Hunter. Forced - After Hydra's Brood engages you, if Hydra is in play: Either place 1 doom on Hydra, or Hydra attacks you.

name: Treacherous Depths
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Increase the flood level of your current location. - Discard assets from your play area with a total resource cost of at least X, where X is your location's shroud value.

name: Conspiracy of Deep Ones
text: Peril. Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). This test gets +1 difficulty for each [[Sanctum]] location with a key on it. If you fail, you must either place 1 doom on the current agenda (this effect may cause the current agenda to advance), or the nearest [[Ancient One]] enemy in play attacks you.

name: Thalassophobia
text: Revelation - If no investigators are at flooded locations, Thalassophobia gains surge. Otherwise, each investigator at a partially flooded location takes 1 horror, and each investigator at a fully flooded location takes 1 direct horror that cannot be prevented.

name: Diving Suit
text: You ignore the Forced ability on the current agenda. Forced - When any amount of damage would be placed on you: Place 1 of that damage on Diving Suit. Forced - When Diving Suit leaves play: Remove it from the game.

name: Daniela Reyes: The Mechanic
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: [reaction] After an enemy attacks you (except an attack of opportunity you provoked), even if that attack was canceled: Either deal 1 damage to that enemy, or automatically evade it.  [elder_sign] effect: +1. If you were attacked by an enemy this round, you automatically succeed, instead.

name: Daniela Reyes: The Mechanic
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0, Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Mechanic's Wrench, Mob Goons, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Mechanic's Wrench
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Daniela Reyes deck only. [fast] Exhaust Mechanic's Wrench: Choose an enemy at your location. That enemy attacks you. [action]: Fight. Use this ability only against an enemy that has attacked you since the end of your last turn. You get +2 [combat] for this attack and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Mob Goons
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Hunter. Prey - Daniela Reyes only. This enemy's attacks cannot be canceled. Damage/horror dealt by this enemy's attacks is treated as direct.

name: Norman Withers: The Astronomer
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

name: Norman Withers: The Astronomer
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Livre d'Eibon, The Harbinger, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Livre d'Eibon: Hyperborean Grimoire
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Norman Withers deck only.  [fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand.  [fast] Exhaust Livre d'Eibon: Commit the top card of your deck to an eligible skill test performed by an investigator at your location.

name: The Harbinger
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - Place this card on top of your deck. While The Harbinger is revealed and on top of your deck, cards in your deck cannot be searched, drawn, or manipulated in any way except by the below ability. [action] [action]: Discard The Harbinger. This ability may be activated while The Harbinger is on top of your deck, as if it were in your threat area.

name: Monterey Jack: The Archaeologist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: [reaction] At the end of your turn, if you started this round 1 location away from your current location: Either gain 1 resource or draw 1 card (if you started this round 2 or more locations away, do both instead).  [elder_sign] effect: +1. If you started this round 1 or more locations away from your current location, gain 1 resource or draw 1 card.

name: Monterey Jack: The Archaeologist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0, Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Trusty Bullwhip, Buried Secrets, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Trusty Bullwhip
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Monterey Jack deck only. [action]: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. If this attack succeeds, you may exhaust Trusty Bullwhip to either automatically evade the attacked enemy or deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Buried Secrets
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - Put Buried Secrets into play in your threat area. If your location can be investigated, you cannot move except by scenario card effects. [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, discard Buried Secrets. If you fail, you may take 2 horror to shuffle it into your deck.

name: Lily Chen: The Martial Artist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: You begin the game with each Discipline in your deck in play, [[Unbroken]] side faceup.  [elder_sign] effect: +2. After this test ends, flip a [[Broken]] Discipline you control to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Lily Chen: The Martial Artist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0, Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 1 Burden of Destiny for each Discipline asset (see below), 1 random basic weakness. Deckbuilding Restrictions: No [[Firearm]] assets. Additional Requirements: At deck creation, choose a Discipline asset to add to your deck. It is considered part of your Deckbuilding Requirements. For every 15 experience you've earned in total, you may choose and add a different Discipline asset to your deck.

name: Discipline: Alignment of Spirit
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  You get +1 [willpower].  [action]: Take 1 direct damage to heal 3 horror, or take 1 direct horror to heal 3 damage. Flip this asset over.

name: Discipline: Alignment of Spirit
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  [reaction] After the round ends, if you took no damage or horror this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline: Quiescence of Thought
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  You get +1 [intellect].  [action]: If you have fewer than 5 cards in your hand: Draw cards until there are 5 cards in your hand. Flip this asset over.

name: Discipline: Quiescence of Thought
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  [reaction] After the round ends, if your hand did not have 2 or more cards in it at any point this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline: Prescience of Fate
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  You get +1 [combat].  [action]: You get +5 skill value for the next skill test you perform this turn. After that skill test ends, flip this asset over. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Discipline: Prescience of Fate
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  [reaction] After the round ends, if you performed no skill tests this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Discipline: Balance of Body
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  You get +1 [agility].  [action]: One at a time, take up to 3 different fight or evade actions. Flip this asset over. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Discipline: Balance of Body
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Lily Chen deck only. Permanent.  [reaction] After the round ends, if no enemies were at the same location as you at any point this round: Flip this asset over to its [[Unbroken]] side.

name: Burden of Destiny
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Flip a Discipline you control to its [[Broken]] side. It cannot be flipped back this round. - Take 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: Bob Jenkins: The Salesman
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: At any time, an investigator at your location may reveal to you the [[Item]] assets in their hand.  You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to play an [[Item]] asset from the hand of an investigator at your location, under their control. (Both investigators may spend resources to pay its cost).  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each [[Item]] asset you control.

name: Bob Jenkins: The Salesman
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Shrewd Dealings, Greed, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Shrewd Dealings
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Bob Jenkins deck only.  Reduce the cost of each [[Item]] asset you play by 1.  [reaction] When you play an [[Item]] asset: Play it under the control of any investigator at your location.

name: Greed
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - Take 1 horror. If you have... - ...10 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...5 or fewer resources, take 1 additional horror. - ...0 resources, take 1 additional horror.

name: Geared Up
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: One at a time, play any number of [[Item]] assets from your hand, reducing the cost of each by 1. During this turn, you have 3 fewer actions to take.

name: Geared Up
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Mutated. Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation. Forced - When your first turn of the game begins: One at a time, play up to 5 [[Item]] assets from your hand, reducing the cost of each by 1. During this turn, you have 3 fewer actions to take.

name: Toe to Toe
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fight. This attack deals +1 damage and is automatically successful. As an additional cost to perform this attack, the chosen enemy makes an attack against you.

name: Get behind me!
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window.  Until the end of the phase, whenever an enemy would attack another investigator at your location, it attacks you instead, then engages you. Cancel 1 horror dealt by each attack made in this way.

name: Gang Up
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fight. For each different class among cards you control, you get +1 [combat] and deal +1 damage for this attack.

name: Sweeping Kick
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fight. Add your [agility] to your skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If you succeed, automatically evade the attacked enemy.

name: Defensive Stance
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: While Defensive Stance is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [combat] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [combat].

name: Butterfly Swords
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. After this attack, you may exhaust Butterfly Swords to fight again, adding your [agility] to your skill value for that attack. That attack deals +1 damage.

name: Dodge
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play when an enemy attacks an investigator at your location.  Cancel that attack. Then, test [agility] (1). If you succeed, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Combat Training
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.  You get +1 [combat] and +1 [agility].  Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Combat Training before it can be assigned to your investigator card.  [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [combat] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: On the Hunt
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play when you would draw an encounter card during the mythos phase. Instead, search the encounter deck for an enemy, spawn it engaged with you (instead of its normal spawn location), attach On the Hunt to it, and shuffle the encounter deck. [reaction] When you defeat attached enemy: Gain 3 resources.

name: Fang of Tyr'thrha
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fight. Choose an enemy at any revealed location as the target for this attack. Before resolving this attack, you may move to that enemy's location. Add your [agility] to your [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +3 damage.

name: Butterfly Swords
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. After this attack, you may fight again, adding your [agility] to your skill value for that attack. If both attacks are successful, you may exhaust Butterfly Swords to have the second attack deal +1 damage.

name: Forced Learning
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.  Increase your deck size by 15.  During each upkeep phase, instead of drawing 1 card, draw 2 cards and discard 1 of them.

name: Jeremiah Kirby: Arctic Archaeologist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: You get +1 [intellect].  [reaction] After Jeremiah Kirby enters play, choose "even" or "odd:" Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each card with a cost that matches the chosen option. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck.

name: Jeremiah Kirby: Arctic Archaeologist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: You get +1 [intellect].  [reaction] After Jeremiah Kirby enters play, choose "even" or "odd:" Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each card with a cost that matches the chosen option. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck.

name: Jeremiah Kirby: Arctic Archaeologist
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Mutated.  You get +1 [intellect].  [reaction] After Jeremiah Kirby enters play, choose "even" or "odd:" Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck. Draw each card with a cost that matches the chosen option. Shuffle the remaining cards into your deck. (Max twice per game.)

name: Archive of Conduits: Unidentified
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Limit 1 per deck. As an additional cost to play this asset, place 1 resource on 4 different locations, as leylines.  [reaction] After you successfully investigate a location with a leyline, exhaust this asset: Move that leyline onto this asset. Then, if there are 4 leylines on it, discard it, take its leylines as resources, and record in your Campaign Log that "you have identified the gateway."

name: Written in the Stars
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play only during your turn.  Discard the top card of your deck. If that card is a weakness, shuffle it back into your deck. Otherwise, for the remainder of your turn, while that card is in your discard pile, commit it to each eligible skill test you perform.

name: Hiking Boots
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Limit 1 [[Footwear]] per investigator.  You get +1 [agility].  [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from your location, exhaust Hiking Boots: Move to a connecting location with at least 1 clue, or to a connecting unrevealed location.

name: Join the Caravan
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play only during your turn. Reduce the cost of this card by 1 for each different class among cards you control.  Move to any revealed location.

name: Survey the Area
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: While Survey the Area is in your hand or committed to a skill test, it gains [intellect] icons equal to your [agility], and [agility] icons equal to your [intellect].

name: Medical Texts
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: [action]: Choose an investigator at your location and test [intellect] (2). If you succeed, heal 1 damage from that investigator (2 damage instead if you succeed by 2 or more). If you fail, you must either exhaust Medical Texts or deal 1 damage to that investigator.

name: Unearth the Ancients
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Investigate. Choose up to 2 [seeker] assets in your hand. The difficulty of this skill test is equal to the combined cost of the chosen assets. If you succeed, put the chosen assets into play, one at a time. For each [[Relic]] asset put into play by this ability, draw 1 card.

name: Scientific Theory
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.  You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [combat].  Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Scientific Theory before it can be assigned to your investigator card.  [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] or +1 [combat] for this skill test.

name: Archive of Conduits: Gateway to Tindalos
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.  [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy.  [action]: Choose an investigator, and an enemy with a leyline at a revealed location. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Archive of Conduits: Gateway to Acheron
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.  [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a revealed location.  [action]: Choose an investigator and a revealed location with a leyline. That investigator moves to that location. You may remove the leyline to have them take an investigate action.

name: Archive of Conduits: Gateway to Aldebaran
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.  [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to a non-[[Elite]] enemy.  [action]: Choose an investigator engaged with an enemy with a leyline. That investigator disengages from that enemy and moves to a connecting location. You may remove the leyline to automatically evade that enemy. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Archive of Conduits: Gateway to Paradise
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Researched. Uses (4 leylines). Limit 1 per deck.  [fast]: Move 1 leyline from this asset to an investigator.  [action]: Choose an investigator with a leyline. That investigator draws 1 card and heals 1 damage or 1 horror. You may remove the leyline to have them instead draw 2 cards and heal 2 damage or 2 horror.

name: Prophesiae Profana: Atlas of the Unknowable
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: While you are not at the locus, you get +1 [intellect], +1 [agility], and you may ignore attacks of opportunity.  [reaction] After Prophesiae Profana enters play: Choose a revealed location. That location is "the locus" until Prophesiae Profana leaves play.  [action]: Move any investigator to the locus.

name: Prophesiae Profana: Atlas of the Unknowable
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Mutated.  While you are not at the locus, you get +1 [intellect], +1 [agility], and ignore the first attack of opportunity you take each turn.  [reaction]After Prophesiae Profana enters play: Choose a revealed location. That location is "the locus" until Prophesiae Profana leaves play.  [action]: Move any investigator to the locus.

name: Underworld Support
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.  Your deck cannot include more than 1 copy of each non-weakness, non-signature card (by title).  Reduce your deck size by 5.

name: Scout Ahead
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Move. Move up to 3 times. Enemies do not engage you during this movement.

name: 21 or Bust
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: One at a time, reveal random tokens from the chaos bag until you choose to stop. Treat each [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] as a 5; the [auto_fail] as a 10; and the [elder_sign] as either a 1 or an 11. If the combined value of those tokens (ignoring +/-) is...  - ...18 or less, gain 4 resources.  - ...19, gain 5 resources.  - ...20, gain 6 resources.  - ...21, gain 9 resources.

name: Counterespionage
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play when you draw a non-weakness treachery.  Cancel that card's revelation effect and draw the top card of the encounter deck.  [reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "the encounter deck" to "your deck".  [reaction] When you play Counterespionage, increase its cost by 2: Change "you" to "any investigator".

name: Cheat the System
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window.  Gain 1 resource for each different class among cards you control.

name: Untimely Transaction
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Reveal an [[Item]] asset in your hand. Another investigator at your location may play that asset as if it were in their hand. If they do, draw 1 card and gain resources equal to that asset's printed cost.

name: Savant
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Savant gains [wild] icons equal to your lowest skill other than the skill being tested.

name: The Red Clock: Broken but Reliable
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: Either place 1 charge here, or take all charges here, as resources. Then, if it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +3 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 2 times. - 3 charges, you may take an additional action this turn.

name: Money Talks
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at any location initiates a skill test.  Instead of the skill type indicated for this test ([willpower], [intellect], [combat], or [agility]), this is a resource skill test. The performing investigator's base skill value for this test is equal to half the number of resources in your resource pool (rounded down). Draw 1 card.

name: Black Market
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play at the start of the investigation phase.  One at a time, reveal cards from the top of any investigator deck(s) until exactly 5 cards have been revealed. Set those cards aside, out of play. While set aside, any investigator may play any of those cards as if they were in their hand. At the start of the next investigation phase, shuffle each of those cards still set aside into its owner's deck.

name: Black Market
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Mutated. Fast. Play at the start of the investigation phase. Max once per round.  One at a time, reveal cards from the top of any investigator deck(s) until exactly 5 cards have been revealed. Set those cards aside, out of play. While set aside, any investigator may play any of those cards as if they were in their hand. At the start of the next investigation phase, shuffle each of those cards still set aside into its owner's deck.

name: Moxie
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Limit 1 [[Composure]] in play.  You get +1 [willpower] and +1 [agility].  Non-direct damage/horror must be assigned to Moxie before it can be assigned to your investigator card.  [fast] Spend 1 resource: You get +1 [willpower] or +1 [agility] for this skill test.

name: The Black Fan: Symbol of Power
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Exceptional.  While you have...  - ...10+ resources, you get +1 health and +1 sanity.  - ...15+ resources, you may take one additional action during your turn.  - ...20+ resources, you get +1 to each of your skills.

name: The Red Clock: Broken but Reliable
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Exceptional. Uses (0 charges). Forced - After your turn begins: You may take all charges here, as resources. Place 1 charge here. If it has exactly... - 1 charge, you get +4 skill value for your next skill test. - 2 charges, you may move up to 3 times. - 3 charges, you may take 2 additional actions this turn.

name: Down the Rabbit Hole
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck. Purchase at deck creation.  After each scenario of a campaign, reduce the experience cost of the first 2 cards you upgrade before the next scenario by 1.  Increase the experience cost for you to purchase new cards by 1.

name: Dragon Pole
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: You have 1 additional arcane slot. [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack for each of your arcane slots that is filled. If at least 2 of your arcane slots are filled, this attack deals +1 damage.

name: Meditative Trance
packName: Edge of the Earth Investigator Expansion
text: For each of your arcane slots that is filled, either heal 1 damage or 1 horror.

name: Close the Circle

name: The Last Breath
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text:
If there are no [[Eidolon]] enemies in play:
The last of the nightmarish creatures falls, its miasmatic body at once dissolving into inky, prismatic liquid and dissipating into wisps of gray mist filled with screaming shapes. Then, silence.
(→R1)
If the investigators advanced by resigning:
You follow a makeshift path through a jagged split in the ice shelf, making your way deeper into the mainland, toward the mountains. You don't know if these creatures can follow human tracks - or indeed if they need tracks at all in order to pursue you - but you take the time to cover them, regardless. Hopefully, with this shortcut you've found, you'll be safe...
(→R2)

text: Revelation - Attach to the nearest location with at least 1 clue, and without a copy of Polar Mirage attached. Forced - After you discover or take control of 1 or more clues at attached location: Discard each non-weakness card in your hand. Discard Polar Mirage.

name: Dark Aurora
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each [frost] token revealed during this test, take 1 horror. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Professor William Dyer: Professor of Geology
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets).  [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Professor William Dyer: Heal 2 horror from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Danforth: Brilliant Student
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (5 secrets).  [reaction] After an investigator at your location resolves a Tekeli-li weakness, exhaust Danforth and spend 1 secret: That investigator draws 2 cards.

name: Eliyah Ashevak: Dog Handler
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Eliyah Ashevak: Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] skill of 5. If you succeed, you may move to a connecting location.

name: Dr. Mala Sinha: Daring Physician
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (3 supplies).  [action] Spend 1 supply and exhaust Dr. Mala Sinha: Heal 2 damage from an investigator or another [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Avery Claypool: Antarctic Guide
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (5 supplies).  [reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a [frost] token during a skill test, exhaust Avery Claypool and spend 1 supply: Cancel that token and reveal a new one.

name: James "Cookie" Fredericks: Dubious Choice
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo and exhaust James "Cookie" Fredericks: Fight. Fight with a base [combat] skill of 5. If you succeed and the attacked enemy is non-[[Elite]], it cannot attack for the remainder of the round.

name: Dr. Amy Kensler: Professor of Biology
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (3 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret and exhaust Dr. Amy Kensler: Investigate. Investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5. If you succeed, look at the top card of any investigator's deck or the encounter deck. You may discard that card.

name: Roald Ellsworth: Intrepid Explorer
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (5 supplies).  [fast] During an investigator's turn, exhaust Roald Ellsworth and spend 1 supply: Choose a treachery attached to any location. Treat that treachery's text box as if it were blank until the end of this turn.

name: Takada Hiroko: Aeroplane Mechanic
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Partner. Uses (9 resources).  [action] Exhaust Takada Hiroko: Move up to 3 resources from Takada Hiroko to your resource pool.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Take 1 horror. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Take 1 damage. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Discard 1 card at random from your hand. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Lose 2 resources. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - If it is your turn, lose 1 action. Otherwise, lose 1 action during your next turn. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Place 1 of your clues on your location. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Tekeli-li
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Revelation - Discard an asset you control. Place Tekeli-li on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck.

name: Claypool's Furs
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Fast.  [reaction] When you reveal a [frost] token during a skill test you are performing, deal 1 damage to Claypool's Furs: Cancel that chaos token and return it to the bag. Reveal a new chaos token.

name: Collected Works of Poe
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Uses (3 charges).  [action] Spend 1 charge: Choose an investigator at your location to search the top 6 cards of their deck for each copy of Tekeli-li and place each of them on the bottom of the Tekeli-li deck. Shuffle that investigator's deck. That investigator draws 1 card.

name: Cookie's Custom .32
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Fast. Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. Either fight with a base [combat] skill of 5, or get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage.

name: Dyer's Sketches
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window.  Draw 3 cards.

name: Ellsworth's Boots
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Limit 1 [[Footwear]] per investigator.  [reaction] After the last clue is discovered from your location, exhaust Ellsworth's Boots: Move to a connecting location, or discard Ellsworth's Boots to move to any revealed location.

name: Kensler's Log
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Fast. Uses (2 secrets). [action] Spend 1 secret: Investigate. Either investigate with a base [intellect] skill of 5, or get +2 [intellect] for this investigation. If you succeed, you discover 1 additional clue at your location.

name: Sinha's Medical Kit
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Uses (3 supplies).  [fast] Exhaust Sinha's Medical Kit and spend 1 supply: Heal 1 damage or 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Takada's Cache
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window.  Gain 3 resources and draw 1 card. Remove Takada's Cache from the game.

name: Anyu: Faithful Companion
packName: Edge of the Earth Campaign Expansion
text: [fast] Exhaust Anyu: Choose one, or discard Anyu to choose up to three, in any order - - Move to a connecting location. - You get +2 skill value for your next skill test this round. - Evade. Attempt to evade with a base [agility] skill of 4.

name: Carson Sinclair: The Butler
text: You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used on the below [action] ability.  [action]: Choose another investigator at your location. They immediately take an action as if it were their turn. (Limit once per round for each investigator.)  [elder_sign] effect: +0. Draw 1 card. You may resolve this effect anytime another investigator at your location resolves their [elder_sign] effect.

name: Carson Sinclair: The Butler
text: Deck Size: 30. Secondary Class Choice: At deck creation, choose Seeker ([seeker]), Mystic ([mystic]), or Survivor ([survivor]). Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 level 0-1 events and/or skills of your chosen secondary class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of "As you wish", Selfless to a Fault, 1 random basic weakness.

name: As you wish
text: Carson Sinclair deck only.  Commit only to a skill test being performed by another investigator.  If this test succeeds, the performing investigator draws 1 card. If this test fails, you draw 1 card.

name: Selfless to a Fault
text: Revelation - Put Selfless to a Fault into play in your threat area. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you did not commit at least 1 card to a skill test performed by another investigator this turn: Take 1 horror and shuffle Selfless to a Fault into your deck.

name: Vincent Lee: The Doctor
text: [reaction] After one of your card effects heals damage from an investigator or an investigator's [[Ally]] asset: Add one of your set-aside On the Mend skills to that investigator's hand.  [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may heal 1 damage from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Vincent Lee: The Doctor
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, cards that "heal damage" level 0-5, up to 15 other Guardian and/or Survivor cards level 0-1 ([guardian] and/or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Bonesaw, 1 [per_investigator] copies of On the Mend, Wounded Bystander, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Setup: You begin each game with 1 [per_investigator] copies of On the Mend set aside, out of play.

name: Bonesaw
text: Vincent Lee deck only. [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. If this attack is successful, you may take 1 damage to deal +1 damage for this attack. [action]: Heal 5 damage from an investigator at your location. Test [intellect] (4). If you fail, that investigator suffers 1 physical trauma. (Max once per game.)

name: On the Mend
text: Limit 1 On the Mend in your hand. Commit only to a test you are performing. Forced - When On the Mend would be discarded from anywhere: Set it aside, out of play, instead.

name: Wounded Bystander: On Death's Doorstep
text: Revelation - Put Wounded Bystander into play in your play area with 3 damage on it. It cannot leave play while it has damage (unless it is defeated). If it has no damage, discard it. Forced - When you take non-direct damage: At least 1 of it must be assigned to Wounded Bystander, if able. Forced - If Wounded Bystander is defeated: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

name: Kymani Jones: The Security Consultant
text: [fast]: Engage an exhausted enemy at your location.  [reaction] When you attempt to evade an exhausted non-[[Elite]] enemy: Add your [intellect] to your skill value for this attempt. If you succeed by at least X, discard that enemy. X is that enemy's remaining health.  [elder_sign] effect: +1. If there is an exhausted enemy at your location, you automatically succeed instead.

name: Kymani Jones: The Security Consultant
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, [[Tool]] cards level 0-4, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Grappling Hook, Agent Fletcher, 1 random basic weakness. Bonus Experience: You begin the campaign with 5 additional experience (does not affect the number of weaknesses you must take in Standalone Mode).

name: Grappling Hook
text: Kymani Jones deck only.  Actions performed using Grappling Hook do not provoke attacks of opportunity.  [action][action] Exhaust Grappling Hook: Take up to 3 different basic actions from the following list, in any order (engage, evade, investigate, or move). If you investigate, use your [agility] instead of your [intellect].

name: Agent Fletcher
text: Alert. Hunter. Prey - Kymani Jones only. While Kymani Jones is evading Agent Fletcher, reduce their [intellect] value to 0.

name: Amina Zidane: The Operator
text: [reaction] When you play an asset: Reduce its resource cost by 3. It enters play with 1 doom on it. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may move all doom from a card at your location to another card at your location.

name: Amina Zidane: The Operator
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, [[Charm]] cards level 0-4. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Word of Woe, Word of Weal, Deafening Silence, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Word of Woe
text: Amina Zidane deck only. Fast. Play only during your turn. Place 1 doom on an asset you control to resolve an [action] ability on it, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost). Then, if Word of Weal is in your discard pile, you may shuffle it into your deck.

name: Word of Weal
text: Amina Zidane deck only.  Fast. Play when you perform a skill test on an asset with 1 or more doom on it.  Add your [willpower] to your skill value for this test. Then, if Word of Woe is in your discard pile, you may shuffle it into your deck.

name: Deafening Silence
text: Revelation - Move 1 doom from an asset you control to the current agenda. This may cause the current agenda to advance. If no doom is moved in this way, shuffle Deafening Silence back into your deck.

name: Darrell Simmons: The Photographer
text: You begin the game with Darrell's Kodak in play.  [fast] During a skill test at your location, spend 1 evidence from an asset you control: Reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. (Limit once per test.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1. Place 1 evidence on an asset you control.

name: Darrell Simmons: The Photographer
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Darrell's Kodak, Ruined Film, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Darrell's Kodak: Proof in the Pudding
text: Darrell Simmons deck only. [reaction] After an enemy or treachery enters play, exhaust Darrell's Kodak: Place 1 resource (from the token pool) on that enemy or treachery, as evidence. [reaction] After you discover any number of clues: Move that many evidence on enemies or treacheries at that location (or not at any location) to Darrell's Kodak.

name: Ruined Film
text: Revelation - Remove 4 evidence from cards you control. For each evidence you cannot remove in this way, take 1 horror.

name: Charlie Kane: The Politician
text: You have 3 additional ally slots.
