text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate Jardines de la Tropical by 3 or more: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it. Forced - After you fail by 3 or more while investigating Jardines de la Tropical: Choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: Gran Teatro de La Habana
text: [fast] During your turn, spend 2 resources: Reduce Gran Teatro de La Habana's shroud by 2 until the end of your turn. (Limit once per turn.)

name: Miramar Yacht Club
text: [action]: Investigate. Instead of discovering clues, look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at Miramar Yacht Club. For every 2 points you succeed by, look at the revealed side of an additional concealed mini-card at Miramar Yacht Club.

name: Plaza Hotel
text: [fast] Take 1 horror: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card at Plaza Hotel or at a connecting location (without exposing it). (Group limit once per round.)

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez: The Man in the Blood-Soaked Suit
text: Alert. Concealed 1 [per_investigator]. Hunter. Retaliate. Desiderio Delgado Álvarez gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When Desiderio Delgado Álvarez takes damage during act 1 or 2: Instead, automatically evade him. [reaction] After Desiderio Delgado Álvarez is evaded by 2 or more and there is another copy of him at your location, that copy deals this one 2 damage.

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez: The Man in the Blood-Soaked Suit
text: Alert. Concealed 1 [per_investigator]. Hunter. Retaliate. Desiderio Delgado Álvarez gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When Desiderio Delgado Álvarez takes damage during act 1 or 2: Instead, automatically evade him. [reaction] After Desiderio Delgado Álvarez is evaded by 2 or more and there is another copy of him at your location, that copy deals this one 2 damage.

name: Desiderio Delgado Álvarez: In Your Debt, Despite it All
text: [reaction] When an attack from a [[Monster]] enemy deals damage to Desiderio Delgado Álvarez, exhaust him: Cancel 1 of that damage and deal 1 damage to the attacking enemy.

name: Body Snatched
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, choose an [[Ally]] or [[Item]] asset you control and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow (if you cannot, take 2 horror instead).

name: On Thin Ice
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Hazard]] treacheries in play.  [cultist]: -4. If you fail, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.  [tablet]: -2 (-5 instead if Void Chimera is at your location).  [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: On Thin Ice
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the number of [[Hazard]] treacheries in play.  [cultist]: -5. Choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.  [tablet]: -3. If Void Chimera is at your location, you automatically fail, instead.  [elder_thing]: -4. Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: Frozen Thoughts
text: Each investigator chooses an [[Ally]] or [[Item]] asset in their hand or play area and sets it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: The Heartless Mountain
text: Each investigator chooses an [[Ally]] or [[Item]] asset in their hand or play area and sets it aside, out of play, as a hollow.

name: This Never Happened
text: Remove each hollow from the game. Gather each hollow that was removed from the game throughout this scenario. Each investigator finds their hollow with the highest experience cost and exiles it. In the Campaign Log, record erased from existence: and next to this, record the names of each unique card exiled in this way. For the rest of the campaign, players cannot include any copies of those cards (by title) in their decks (immediately remove any copies from each investigator's deck). (→R4) (page 35)

name: Quest for the Sable Glass
text: Objective - Only investigators at the Condemned Gold Mine may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Negotiations
text:
If it is agenda 1:
Ignoring signs warning that the mine is condemned and dangerous, you trace a path to the branch Landry wrote about in his journal and find the Sable Glass buried in the rock. When you emerge, however, you are not alone.
If it is agenda 2 or 3:
As you approach the condemned mine, you see from the broken barricades and tracks in the snow that Thorne and the Coterie have already arrived. Before you can backtrack, two guards emerge from the shadows brandishing shotguns. "Don't move," one of them says.
In either case: Read Scenario Interlude: Raw Deal in the Campaign Guide.

name: If It Bleeds...
text: [action] If your location has the [[Wilderness]] trait and investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Place 1 resource on your location, as a scouting report. (Limit 1 scouting report per [[Wilderness]] location.) Objective - You may advance at the end of any round. (Hint: You will lure out the predator when you advance. Advance when you believe you are prepared.)

name: The True Face of Terror
text: Spawn Void Chimera (True Form) in the shadows and resolve its concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each [[Wilderness]] location in play. For each location with a scouting report on it, you may look at the revealed side of the concealed mini-card just placed at that location.

name: Prowling Nightmare
text: Objective - After Void Chimera (True Form) is exposed, advance the act.

name: Outsiders' Lair
text: Revelation - Put Outsiders' Lair into play and move Void Chimera (True Form) and each investigator at its location to Outsiders' Lair. While Outsiders' Lair has no clues on it, Void Chimera (True Form) gets -1 fight and -1 evade.

name: Last Stand
text: The location where Void Chimera (True Form) was exposed is connected to Outsiders' Lair (but not vice versa.) Objective - If Void Chimera (True Form) is defeated, advance the act.

name: The Killing Blow
text: Check which version of Thorne is in play: - If the Thorne story asset is in play, (→R1) (page 35). - If the Thorne enemy is in play, (→R2) (page 35). - If Thorne is not in play, (→R3) (page 35).

name: Anchorage
text: [action]: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it. (Limit once per round.) [action]: Resign. "I thought Alaska was supposed to be nice this time of year!"

name: Fairbanks
text: [reaction] When an investigator at Fairbanks draws a [[Hazard]] treachery: Spend 2 resources to cancel that treachery's effects and discard it.

name: Mountain Stream
text: Forced - After you enter Mountain Stream: Test [intellect] or [agility] (1). If you fail, take 1 damage. Forced - After the last clue is discovered from Mountain Stream: Put the 3 set-aside Outer Wilderness locations into play adjacent to it.

name: Frozen Lake
text: Forced - After an investigator at this location reveals a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol during a skill test they are performing: They must either choose and discard 1 card from their hand, or take 1 horror.

name: Isolated Road
text: The first [[Hazard]] treachery revealed by an investigator at this location each round gains surge.

name: Forgotten Outpost
text: [action]: Draw 3 cards. (Limit once per game.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
text: Forced - When you reveal Hunter's Lodge: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (3) to talk the hunter down. If you fail, take 1 damage. Forced - When a [[Monster]] enemy enters this location: Deal 1 damage to it.

name: Condemned Gold Mine
text: [action]: Reveal 1 random chaos token from the chaos bag plus 1 additional token for each depletion token on Condemned Gold Mine. If you did not reveal any [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbols in this way, gain 4 resources and place 1 resource (from the token pool) on Condemned Gold Mine, as a depletion token.

name: Thorne: The One with the Red Cravat
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Thorne gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After a [[Hazard]] treachery is drawn: Thorne shifts each of their attached keys. Forced - When Thorne is defeated: If The Sable Glass is attached to Thorne, attach it to any investigator, under that investigator's control.

name: Thorne: Consummate Professional
text: [reaction] After an investigator at your location sets a card aside as a hollow, exhaust Thorne: That investigator may take an immediate action as if it were their turn.

name: Void Chimera: True Form
text: Concealed 4. Massive. You cannot expose any concealed mini-cards while one of Void Chimera's other forms is in play. Forced - After you expose one of Void Chimera's decoys: Find the set-aside version of Void Chimera with the matching subtitle and spawn it at your location.

name: Void Chimera: Fellbeak
text: Patrol ([[Wilderness]] location with the most investigators). Retaliate. Void Chimera (Fellbeak) gets +1 [per_investigator] health.

name: Void Chimera: Earsplitter
text: Alert. Hunter. Void Chimera (Earsplitter) gets +1 [per_investigator] health.

name: Void Chimera: Gorefeaster
text: Hunter. Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) gets +1 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) attacks you: Look at the top card of your deck. If it is not a weakness, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow, and heal damage from Void Chimera (Gorefeaster) equal to that hollow's printed cost.

name: Void Chimera: Fellhound
text: Hunter. Void Chimera (Fellhound) gets +1 [per_investigator] health. While you are attacking or attempting to evade Void Chimera (Fellhound), if you own any set-aside hollows, it gains alert and retaliate.

name: Ravenous Grizzly
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Spawn - Nearest [[Wilderness]] location. Ravenous Grizzly cannot enter non-[[Wilderness]] locations. While Ravenous Grizzly is moving, it skips over connecting non-[[Wilderness]] locations.

name: Cracking Ice
text: Revelation - Put Cracking Ice into play next to the agenda deck. Then, if there are 3 or more copies of Cracking Ice next to the agenda deck, discard them all and each investigator at a [[Wilderness]] location tests [agility] (4). Each investigator who fails must take 1 damage, take 1 horror, or lose 1 action for each point they failed by.

name: Snowslide
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, you and each asset with health you control takes 1 direct damage.

name: The Sable Glass: Translocated Lens
text: Shift - Look at the revealed side of each concealed mini-card at your location (without exposing them). Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Sable Glass: Translocated Lens
text: Shift - Each investigator sets the non-weakness card in their hand with the highest printed cost aside, out of play, as a hollow. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Dogs of War
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -1 (-3 instead if you are at a location with a Key Locus).  [cultist]: -3. If you fail, either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or place 1 doom on the nearest Key Locus or [[Locus Site]] location.  [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against an enemy with patrol, after this attack, it disengages and resolves its patrol keyword.  [elder_thing]: -2. For each point you fail by, lose 1 resource (max 3).

name: Dogs of War
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -2 (-4 instead if you are at a location with a Key Locus).  [cultist]: -5. If you fail, either take 1 damage and 1 horror, or place 1 doom on the nearest Key Locus or [[Locus Site]] location.  [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against an enemy with patrol, after this attack, it attacks you, disengages, and resolves its patrol keyword.  [elder_thing]: -3. For each point you fail by, lose 1 resource.

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. I)
text: Each enemy loses hunter and gains patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). While there are no other Key Locuses in play, The Claret Knight counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities. When checking the doom threshold, doom on cards other than this agenda subtract from the total doom in play instead of adding to it. Objective - Defend the Knight! If The Claret Knight is defeated, advance this agenda.

name: Final Stand
text:
If this agenda advanced by reaching its doom threshold:
The storm rages on. Doors batter and foundations shake. The Key Locuses dim. You've stood your ground for as long as you can. Weary and terrified that you have chosen an impossible course, you and your unlikely Coterie allies retreat to the Claret Knight's office as a last line of defense. The mood is tense and quiet. Any moment you suspect the Beast or its devotees will tear down the door and turn this chamber into a bloodbath...
Advance the act.
If The Claret Knight was defeated:
The storm rages on. Doors batter and foundations shake. The Key Locuses have failed. You've stood your ground for as long as you could. Weary and terrified that you have chosen an impossible course, you are forced to lay low for a moment to lick your wounds. That is when the Beast strikes...
(→R3) (page 42)

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. II)
text: While there are no other Key Locuses in play, The Bourse counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities.

name: Power Retained
text: The investigators must decide (choose one):  - Each surviving investigator immediately takes 1 direct damage and suffers 1 physical trauma. Flip this agenda back over and place 10 doom on it.  - Each surviving investigator immediately resigns.

name: Brewing Catastrophe (v. III)
text: While there are no other Key Locuses in play, Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa counts as a Key Locus for the purposes of card abilities.

name: Overrun
text: The investigators must decide (choose one):  - Each surviving investigator immediately takes 1 direct damage and suffers 1 physical trauma. Flip this agenda back over and place 10 doom on it.  - Each surviving investigator immediately resigns.

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. I)
text: During the "enemies attack" step of the enemy phase, in addition to their standard attacks, each ready enemy attacks each Key Locus at its location as if it were an engaged investigator. Horror dealt by these attacks is dealt as damage, instead. Objective - Defend the Key and hold out for as long as you can. (The agenda represents how long you must defend it. You will be instructed when to advance.)

name: Knight's Stronghold
text: Add The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson to the victory display. Add each Key Locus in play to the victory display. (→R1) (page 42)

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. II)
text: Objective - If The Claret Knight is defeated, or if an investigator controls The Light of Pharos, advance.

name: Fallen Stronghold
text:
If the investigators took control of the Light of Pharos:
You safely enter the office where you met with the Coterie earlier and crack open the vault. The light inside shines on undisturbed. You snatch the Key from its resting place and abscond before the rest of the knight's enforcers catch up to you.
(→R2) (page 42) If the investigators defeated The Claret Knight:
"Fools," the knight utters, clutching his side. "Do you not understand? We are the last guardians of humanity. Without us..." Cutting him off, several of his bodyguards suddenly rush into the chamber, but they are too late to stop you. Rather than confront you, they pull their leader to safety. "You will pay for this," the elderly man shouts through a barrage of coughs as he is escorted off the premises. "We will all pay for this."
(→R2) (page 42)

name: Rabbits Who Run (v. III)
text: Objective - If The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson is defeated, or if an investigator controls The Light of Pharos, advance.

name: Den of Evil
text:
If the investigators took control of the Light of Pharos:
You sneak carefully through the catacombs, searching for the place where the Beast has hidden the Light of Pharos. Eventually, you find a hidden passage leading to a tomb much deeper beneath the city. Inside, a telltale glow emanates from the cracks of an ancient sarcophagus. You push off the stone lid and claim the Key from within, fleeing before the Beast realizes what you have done.
If the investigators defeated the Beast in a Cowl of Crimson:
The Beast lets out a sinister growl and retreats, leaving a trail of ichorous blood in its wake. You could pursue it, but your prize lies deeper in the catacombs, and besides, you worry how dangerous such a creature might become when cornered...
In either case: Check the Campaign Log: - If the cell made a deal with the Claret Knight, (→R5) (page 43) - If the cell is assisting Agent Sirry, (→R6) (page 43)

name: The Bourse: Locus Safeguard
text: Unless The Claret Knight is the only Key Locus in play, enemies cannot enter The Bourse (if an enemy would spawn here, spawn it at a connecting location instead).  [action] Investigators at The Bourse spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remove 1 doom from any location or from an asset you control. Any player may trigger this ability.

name: The Bourse: Locus Safeguard
text: The entrance to the offices is secure. Unless The Claret Knight is the only Key Locus in play, enemies cannot enter The Bourse (if an enemy would spawn here, spawn it at a connecting location instead).

name: The Bourse: Coterie Post
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

name: The Bourse: Coterie Post
text: The entrance to the offices is guarded. You cannot enter The Bourse unless it is the only Key Locus in play.

name: The Bourse: Commercial Center
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, gain 4 resources. You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, gain 2 fewer resources if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Windsor Palace Hotel
text: While you are at Windsor Palace Hotel...  - ...if there is a Key Locus here, increase the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1.  - ...if there is no Key Locus here, reduce the cost of each [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you play by 1.

name: Victoria College
text: [reaction] When you would draw exactly 1 card from your deck while you are at Victoria College: Instead, look at the top 2 cards of your deck, choose 1 to draw, and shuffle the other back into your deck. (Limit once per round.)

name: Qaitbay Citadel
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Qaitbay Citadel: You cannot discover clues or expose concealed mini-cards at Qaitbay Citadel for the remainder of the round.

name: The Corniche
text: Forced - After The Corniche is successfully investigated: Increase the difficulty of each other test performed at The Corniche this round by 2.

name: Zan'et el Settat
text: Forced - When you fight an enemy while at Zan'et el Settat: You must either spend 1 action or increase that enemy's fight by 2 for this attack.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Den of the Beast
text: [action]: Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to place 1 resource on the Light of Pharos. Then, if there are 3 resources on the Light of Pharos, choose an investigator at this location to take control of it.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Den of the Beast
text: The way into the catacombs is hidden. You cannot enter the Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa unless it is the only Key Locus in play.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Bloody Nexus
text: [action]: Test [willpower] (6). If you succeed, automatically evade The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson (regardless of its current location). (Group limit once per game.)

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Bloody Nexus
text: The way into the catacombs is blocked. You cannot enter the Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa. The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson cannot leave Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa. Forced - If there is 6 or more doom on the current agenda: Reveal Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa.

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Ancient Tomb
text: [action]: Investigate. If you succeed, instead of discovering clues, draw 3 cards. You may reduce the difficulty of this test by 2. If you do, draw 1 fewer card if you succeed. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa: Ancient Tomb
Key Locus: Defensive Barrier
text: You may attack Key Locus as if it were an enemy with 4 fight. [action] Spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to Key Locus. Forced - If Key Locus is defeated: Add it to the victory display.

name: Key Locus: Last Bastion
text: [action] Spend 1 clue: Test [willpower] (2). Heal 1 damage from Key Locus, plus 1 additional damage for each point you succeed by. Forced - If Key Locus is defeated: Remove it from the game (do not add it to the victory display).

name: The Claret Knight: Coterie Kingpin
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at The Claret Knight's location, if he is ready: He shifts each of his attached keys.

name: The Claret Knight: Her Sworn Champion
text: [fast] Exhaust The Claret Knight: Move up to 3 resources from your resource pool to The Claret Knight.  [fast] Exhaust The Claret Knight: Move up to 3 resources from The Claret Knight to your resource pool, or to an asset you control as charges, ammo, supplies, or secrets.

name: The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson: Ravager in Red
text: Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). Retaliate. Forced - When The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from it, exhaust it, and move it to Catacombs of Kom el Shoqafa, unengaged.

name: The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson: Wolf in Sheep's Clothing
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while at The Beast in a Cowl of Crimson's location, if it is ready: It shifts each of its attached keys.

name: Scarlet Beast
text: Alert. Hunter. Retaliate.  Scarlet Beast gets +2 fight and -2 evade while it is at a [[Locus Site]] location.

name: Coterie Provocateur
text: Aloof. Patrol (nearest location with a Key Locus). Spawn - Nearest location with a Key Locus. While Coterie Provocateur is ready, investigators at its location cannot attack anything with a title other than Coterie Provocateur.

name: Locus Pulse
text: Revelation - Attach Locus Pulse to the nearest location with a Key Locus. Each investigator at that location takes 1 damage and 1 horror. Forced - If there is no Key Locus at attached location: Discard Locus Pulse.

name: The Light of Pharos: Coral Prism
text: Shift - Play a card from your hand, at -3 cost. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Light of Pharos: Coral Prism
text: Shift - Each investigator must discard 2 random non-weakness cards from their hand. Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Shades of Suffering
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is half the number of charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (X cannot be greater than 6).  [cultist]: -4. If you fail by 2 or more, place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper.  [tablet]: -1. If you are at a location with a [[Geist]] enemy, reveal an additional chaos token.  [elder_thing]: -4. You may place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper to treat this token's modifier as 0 instead.

name: Shades of Suffering
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is the number of charges on The Shade Reaper.  [cultist]: -5. Place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper.  [tablet]: -3. If you are at a location with a [[Geist]] enemy, you automatically fail.  [elder_thing]: -6. You may place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper to treat this token's modifier as -3 instead.

name: Strange Whispers
text: Each investigator loses all of their clues. The lead investigator must decide (choose one): - Discard the [[Ally]] asset in play with the highest printed cost. Test [willpower] (X), where X is that asset's printed cost. If you fail, place charges on The Shade Reaper equal to the discarded asset's printed cost. - Place 1 doom on Tzu San Niang. If it is act 1, advance the act (to act 1b).

name: Restless Dead
text: If there is only one investigator in the game, this agenda gets +1 doom threshold. Forced - When you engage Tzu San Niang: Investigators at your location must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group. If they cannot, draw the top card of the encounter deck instead. (Hint: When this agenda advances, Tzu San Niang will harvest a nearby spirit if her location is unknown!)

name: Hungry for Pain
text:
If Tzu San Niang is in play at any location: Tzu San Niang attacks each investigator at her location. Return her to the shadows and resolve her concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each location with a non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy. Flip this card back to agenda 2a.
If Tzu San Niang is in the shadows: Reveal all concealed mini-cards in play and set each decoy aside, out of play. Swap the Tzu San Niang enemy with her concealed mini-card. Place each non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy at her location facedown beneath her, then place 4 charges on The Shade Reaper. If there are no non-weakness [[Geist]] enemies in play, advance the act to act 2b. Otherwise, return Tzu San Niang to the shadows and resolve her concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each location with a non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy. Flip this card back to agenda 2a.

name: Fear The Reaper
text: Each [[Geist]] enemy gain hunter and retaliate and cannot be flipped over. Forced - When doom is placed on this agenda: Remove 1 [[Geist]] enemy from beneath Tzu San Niang and spawn it faceup at her location.

name: Don't Be Afraid
text: Each investigator is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma. (→R3)

name: The Lady with the Red Parasol
text: Objective - Find Tzu San Niang before the agenda advances. When you engage Tzu San Niang, investigators must spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance. If they cannot, return her to the shadows and resolve her concealed keyword.

name: The Bomoh's Shop
text: Put the set-aside Melati's Shop location into play and reveal it. Disengage each investigator from each enemy engaged with them and move each investigator to Melati's Shop. Read Scenario Interlude: The Bomoh (page 47).

name: Ghost Light
text: [[Geist]] enemies cannot leave [[Haunted]] locations. Objective - Quell the restless spirits before they are consumed by Tzu San Niang! At the end of the round, if there are no non-weakness [[Geist]] enemies in play, advance.

name: Reap the Whirlwind
text:
If there are no enemies facedown beneath Tzu San Niang:
A petite figure emerges from the yellow haze. Tzu San Niang points at you accusingly. "How dare you! You have no right to interfere with my work," she seethes. The parasol in her hand glows with strange energy.
Reveal all concealed mini-cards and remove them from the game. Flip Tzu San Niang to her (Out for Blood) side and spawn her at the location where her mini-card was. Advance the agenda directly to agenda 3a (do not resolve agenda 2b).
If there is at least 1 enemy facedown beneath Tzu San Niang:
A petite figure emerges from the yellow haze. Tzu San Niang smirks as she twirls her parasol overhead. "What is it? You're still thirsty?" she coos, speaking to something you can't see. "They're ready to harvest." The parasol in her hand glows with strange energy.
The lead investigator exposes all concealed mini-cards. Flip Tzu San Niang to her (Out for Blood) side and heal all damage from her. She engages the lead investigator. Advance the agenda directly to agenda 3a (do not resolve agenda 2b).

name: Harvester of Woe
text: [reaction] When you are dealt damage and/or horror from Tzu San Niang's forced effect, investigators at your location may spend any number of clues: Cancel that much damage/horror. Objective - If Tzu San Niang is defeated, advance.

name: Don't Fear the Reaper
text: The investigators must decide (choose one): - Use the parasol against her. (→R1) - Let her go. (→R2)

name: Kuala Lumpur Station: East Wing
text: [fast] During your turn, pay 2 resources: Move (to a connecting location). (Limit once per turn.) [action] Discard an asset you control from play: Gain resources equal to half the discarded asset's printed cost, rounded down, and remember that you "traded for a kitten." (Group limit once per game.)

name: Kuala Lumpur Station: West Wing
text: [action]: Resign. "There's nothing more we can do here." You hastily book passage out of the city. [action] Investigators at this location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Heal 2 horror. Remember that you "found a cheap memento."

name: Selangor Club
text: Each investigator at Selangor Club does not collect resources during the upkeep phase. [action] Spend 2 resources: Parley. You enjoy a pleasant meal and drinks. Heal 1 damage and 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location. (Limit once per round.)

name: Selangor Club Padang
text: [action]: Parley. Test [combat] (4) to join the games. If you fail, remember that you "embarrassed the consulate." If you succeed, gain 3 resources. (Max one success per round.)

name: Melati's Shop
text: [action] Investigators at Melati's Shop spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Remember that you "peered beyond." Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card or the other side of a [[Geist]] enemy in play.

name: Wayang Kulit Theater
text: X is equal to half the charges on The Shade Reaper, rounded up (to a max of 8).  [action] Investigators at Wayang Kulit Theater spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Heal 2 damage. Remember that you "shared a deep pain."

name: Tin Mine
text: [action]: Test [agility] (6). Investigators at Tin Mine may spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group, to automatically succeed. If you succeed, draw 2 cards and remember that you "found hidden bones." (Group limit once per game.) Forced - After you fail a skill test while at Tin Mine: Take 1 damage.

name: Uncanny Shadow
text: Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Playful Shadows
text:
If an investigator has "embarrassed the consulate," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
The sound of laughter turns to weeping, then turns back to laughter. "It is the spirit of a boy," Melati tells you. A round ball rolls out from the darkness to your feet as you look up at the trembling forms. "The padang where he once played is now the ground of one of Ms. Tzu's endeavors. Your small gesture amused him. I think he will be at peace now."
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Uncanny Shadow
text: Uncanny Shadow gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard 1-3 cards from your hand at random: Parley. Test [willpower] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each card you discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Uncanny Shadow would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Timorous Shadows
text:
If an investigator has "peered beyond," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
"It is the spirit of a girl. She watched many stories unfold in this very theater," says Melati. The shadow on the screen forms a hungry smile filled with sharp teeth that turns to a fearful frown. "She is loathe to let go of this place, for she does not know if her story will continue." As Melati translates, you assure the spirit that you have looked beyond the veil and she can leave this plane of existence. As the hoary shadows dissipate, you feel a coldness as you reflect on what you saw - and didn't see - in the beyond. Was it wrong to reassure her?
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Buried Miner
text: Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: A Lost Memento
text:
If an investigator has "found a cheap memento," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
"These are the spirits of fallen miners," says Melati, holding onto the flimsy tin figurine you found. "This belonged to one of them. It is sculpted from tin from this very mine. Tzu San Niang's heartless business separated the workers from their families. And now, they will never be reunited, except in death." She holds the tin figurine over the surface of the water and lets go of it. You think you can see the outline of wispy, spectral hands grasping at it as it sinks to the bottom of the pit.
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Buried Miner
text: Buried Miner gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Take 1-3 horror: Parley. Test [combat] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by 1 for each horror you took as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Buried Miner would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Exhume the Bones
text:
If an investigator has "found hidden bones," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
"These are the spirits of fallen miners," says Melati, gesturing to the oily dark water. "Compelled by Tzu San Niang's relentless greed, the foreman of the mine has worked them... well, literally to the bone. Their bodies lie, unburied, in these deep pits." With her help, you begin exhuming the bones of the fallen miners. It is gruesome, awful work, but as you do it, you can feel a sense of gratitude wash over you. Only when you are finished can you feel a final wave of relief emanate from your surroundings.
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Slain Foreman
text: Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Sympathy Pain
text:
If an investigator has "shared a deep pain," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
Melati prepares a ritual of banishment as you stare into the spirit's eyes. While the bomoh chants, you feel a ripple of pain resonate in your own mind, and for a moment you glimpse a memory from the rail worker's life: them, holding a sledgehammer, as a shadowy figure stood above them, smiling cruelly. A sudden blur of motion, followed by an awful screech. As the memory fades, so too does the spirit.
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Slain Foreman
text: Slain Foreman gets +1 [per_investigator] health. [action] Discard an asset you control: Parley. Test [intellect] (6). Reduce the difficulty of this test by the printed cost of the asset discarded as part of this action's cost. If you succeed, flip this card and resolve the text on its other side. Forced - When Slain Foreman would be defeated: Flip it over and resolve the text on its other side.

name: Familial Pain
text:
If an investigator has "traded for a kitten," read the following (otherwise, flip this card back to its enemy side, heal all damage from it, disengage it from all investigators, and exhaust it):
Melati gestures for you to hold the kitten out to the spirit. "This one had two daughters and many cats," the bomoh says. "They simply want to know their loved ones are cared for." The spirit reaches out and strokes the kitten's fur with a glimmering, spectral hand. After speaking rapidly in Malay, Melati looks to you. "Bringing this animal to the family of the departed would comfort them. I have told the spirit I will bring it as a gift soon." When you look, the spirit has vanished.
Add this card to the victory display.

name: Excruciate
text: Revelation - Place 1 charge on The Shade Reaper. Test [willpower] (3) (6 instead if there are 8 or more charges on The Shade Reaper). If you fail, you must either discard 1 card from your hand for each point you fail by, or take 2 damage.

name: Spirit Harvest
text: Peril. Revelation - Either (choose one): - Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror. - Tzu San Niang shifts The Shade Reaper and then places 2 charges on it.

name: Tzu San Niang: The Lady with the Red Parasol
text: Concealed 2. Forced - When Tzu San Niang would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from her, remove all doom from play, return her to the shadows, and resolve her concealed keyword, distributing each of those concealed mini-cards as evenly as possible among each location with a non-weakness [[Geist]] enemy.

name: Tzu San Niang: Out for Blood
text: Hunter. Retaliate. Tzu San Niang gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When you succeed at a skill test while attempting to fight or evade Tzu San Niang: Remove 1 charge from The Shade Reaper for each point you succeeded by. Take damage and/or horror equal to the number of charges removed, divided as equally as possible.

name: The Shade Reaper: Harvester of Woe
text: Shift - Choose a non-[[Elite]] enemy at your location. You may move that enemy to a connecting location. You may force that enemy to attack another enemy at its location, dealing its horror as damage. Flip this key to its [[Unstable]] side.

name: The Shade Reaper: Harvester of Woe
text: Shift - Each investigator loses 1 action (or if it is not their turn, loses 1 action during their next turn). Then, if an investigator shifted this key, flip it to its [[Stable]] side.

name: Without a Trace
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is half the number of locations in play, rounded down.  [cultist]: -4. If you fail, the nearest [[Outsider]] enemy readies, moves once toward you, and attacks you if it is at your location.  [tablet]: -X. X is the number of set-aside hollows you own (max 5).  [elder_thing]: -3. If you fail, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, as a hollow.

name: Without a Trace
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is the number of locations in play.  [cultist]: -6. If you fail, the nearest [[Outsider]] enemy readies, moves once toward you, and attacks you if it is at your location.  [tablet]: -X. X is 1 plus the number of set-aside hollows you own.  [elder_thing]: -3. Choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, as a hollow.

name: Otherworldly Horror
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location).

name: Alien Sky
text: Shuffle the set-aside Apocalyptic Presage and Protoplasmic Reassembler enemies into the encounter deck.  The investigators must choose two options, as a group:  - Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror.  - Each investigator chooses a non-weakness card they control in their hand or play area and sets it aside, out of play, as a hollow.  - Shuffle all concealed mini-cards facedown, then place them at random in the positions they were in.

name: Otherworldly Lambs
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location).

name: Alien Earth
text: The investigators must choose two options, as a group:  - Each investigator takes 1 damage and 1 horror.  - Each investigator chooses a non-weakness card they control in their hand or play area and sets it aside, out of play, as a hollow.  - Shuffle all concealed mini-cards facedown, then place them at random in the positions they were in.

name: Otherworldly Slaughter
text: As an additional cost to enter an unrevealed location, investigators at your location must spend 1[per_investigator] clues, as a group. [reaction] After you expose a location: Move to that location (from an adjacent location). [fast] Take 1 direct damage or 1 direct horror: Look at the revealed side of a concealed mini-card (without exposing it). (Group limit once per round.)

name: Coin-Sides
text: Each investigator who has not resigned is driven insane, and is never seen or heard from again. All memory of their existence is purged from reality.  If any investigators resigned, those investigators may immediately advance to act 3b.

name: Traversing the Outside
text: Objective - Find the heart of the Outsiders' domain. When the Outsiders' Lair is revealed, advance.

name: Illusions within Illusions
text: Spawn the set-aside Mimetic Nemesis enemy at Outsiders' Lair, exhausted. Each investigator chooses 2 non-weakness cards in their discard pile and sets them aside, out of play, as hollows. Find the set-aside The Red-Gloved Man story asset and place him with the other set-aside hollows, as a hollow. He is considered to be owned by all of the investigators. If he is the bearer of any keys, do not attach those keys to him.

name: Red Ruin
text: The Red-Gloved Man cannot be discarded or drawn. [action] If Mimetic Nemesis is at your location, spend 1 clue: Deal 2 damage to it. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity from Mimetic Nemesis. Objective - When The Red-Gloved man enters play, advance.

name: Escaping the Otherworld
text: Each [[Outsider]] enemy loses aloof. Forced - If The Red-Gloved Man is defeated: Remove him from the game. Objective - Time to get the hell out of here! If each surviving investigator has resigned, advance.

name: The Real World
text: Check which [[Conspirator]] assets are in the victory display. - If both The Red-Gloved Man and Aliki Zoni Uperetria are in the victory display, proceed to (→R1) (page 57). - If The Red-Gloved Man is in the victory display, proceed to (→R2) (page 58). - If Aliki Zoni Uperetria is in the victory display, proceed to (→R3) (page 58). - If neither The Red-Gloved Man nor Aliki Zoni Uperetria are in the victory display, proceed to (→R4) (page 58).

name: Court of the Outsiders
text: [action]: Resign. Test [willpower] or [agility] (4). If you succeed, you resign, adding each [[Conspirator]] asset you control to the victory display. If you fail, you remain trapped here, and this test gets -1 difficulty until the end of your turn. If each surviving investigator has resigned, immediately advance to act 3b.

name: Outsiders' Lair
text: Each [[Outsider]] enemy at this location loses aloof and gets +1 fight and +1 evade.  [fast] If The Red-Gloved Man is the only set-aside hollow: Put him into play under the control of any investigator at Outsiders' Lair.

name: City of Remnants
text: Concealed 1. Forced - When you expose this location: - If it is in the left position in the shadows, take 1 damage. - If it is in the middle position in the shadows, choose a non-weakness card in your hand and set it aside, out of play, as a hollow. - If it is on the right position in the shadows, take 1 horror.

name: Mimetic Nemesis: Otherworldly Subjugator
text: Alert. Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Forced - When you would deal damage to this enemy: Instead, choose and discard that many set-aside hollows. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator at this enemy's location must either choose a non-weakness card in their hand and set it aside, as a hollow, or this enemy attacks them.

name: Protoplasmic Reassembler
text: Massive. Spawn - Location farthest from all investigators. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if this enemy is ready: Spawn the top card of the nearest investigator's deck facedown at its location as a Golem enemy. Golems have: "[[Monster. Outsider.]] Hunter. 1 fight, 1 health, 1 evade, 1 damage value. If Golem is defeated, set it aside, out of play, as a hollow."

name: The Red-Gloved Man: He Was Always There
text: [reaction] After you successfully fight or evade an [[Outsider]] enemy by 2 or more, exhaust The Red-Gloved Man: Deal 1 damage to that enemy and discover 1 clue at your location.

name: Aliki Zoni Uperetria: The Maid with the Scarlet Sash
text: [reaction] After a concealed mini-card is exposed, exhaust Aliki Zoni Uperetria: Choose a set-aside hollow. Its owner draws it.

name: Congress of the Keys
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the current act number.  [cultist]: -5. You may flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side to treat this token's modifier as -2, instead.  [tablet]: -2. If this is an attack against a ready [[Outsider]] enemy, you automatically fail, instead.  [elder_thing]: -3. Cancel the effects and icons of each card committed to this test and set each of them aside, out of play, as hollows.

name: Congress of the Keys
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the current act number.  [cultist]: -7. You may flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side to treat this token's modifier as -4, instead.  [tablet]: -2. If there is a ready [[Outsider]] enemy at your location, you automatically fail, instead.  [elder_thing]: -4. Cancel the effects and icons of each card committed to this test and set each of them aside, out of play, as hollows.

name: Conflux of Consequence
text: Forced - When this agenda advances, if it is act 2, 3, or 4: Skip the "b" side of this agenda and proceed directly to agenda 2a.

name: Swift as Scarlet
text:
If the current act is Secrets and Lies (v. I):
Leylines of paradimensional energy surround you, threatening to tear you apart.
Each enemy shifts each of their attached keys. Immediately resolve an additional enemy phase (then resume the current phase).
If the current act is Secrets and Lies (v. II):
The portal the red-gloved man opened is almost shut! With no time left to prepare, you leap inside just before it closes.
Place 4 doom on agenda 2a. Advance the act.
If the current act is Secrets and Lies (v. III):
Extradimensional entities surround you, threatening to erase your very existence.
Flip 1 [per_investigator] keys from their [[Stable]] side to their [[Unstable]] side. Immediately resolve an additional enemy phase (then resume with the current phase).

name: Transdimensional Shock
text: Flip each decoy over. Shuffle all concealed mini-cards in play, then place them at random in the positions they were in.  Each investigator takes 2 damage and 2 horror but may either (choose one, or neither):  - Shift an [[Unstable]] key they control without flipping it to its [[Stable]] side to cancel all of the damage and horror just dealt to them by the above effect.  - Flip any number of [[Stable]] keys they control to their [[Unstable]] side to cancel that much damage/horror just dealt to them by the above effect.

name: Red Sky Falling
text: Each investigator is defeated.

name: Secrets and Lies (v. I)
text: The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged. Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Another World (v. I)
text: Remove each location from the game. (Investigators are not defeated during this process. Other enemies and attachments at those locations are discarded, and concealed mini-cards are set aside.) Put The Knotted Tower, Gravity-Defying Climb, and The Towering Vertex locations into play in a straight vertical line, with The Towering Vertex at the top and The Knotted Tower at the bottom. Take the top 3 locations in the Otherworld deck and place them in the shadows, arranged in a line from left to right. Take the 3 City of Remnants mini-cards, shuffle them facedown, and arrange them around The Knotted Tower as follows: One to its left, one to its right, and one below. Place each investigator at The Knotted Tower and The Red-Gloved Man enemy at the Towering Vertex. Remove the encounter deck and encounter discard pile from the game, replacing them with the second encounter deck.

name: Secrets and Lies (v. II)
text: Do not draw cards from the encounter deck during the mythos phase. Objective - Prepare for your journey into the Outside, and proceed when you are ready. At the end of any round, if each investigator is at the same location, they may advance. The sooner, the better. (Hint - You will also be forced to advance automatically when the agenda advances.)

name: Another World (v. II)
text: Remove agenda 1a from the game, moving all of its doom to agenda 2a. Remove each location from the game. (Investigators are not defeated during this process. Other enemies and attachments at those locations are discarded, and concealed mini-cards are set aside.) Put The Knotted Tower, Gravity-Defying Climb, and The Towering Vertex locations into play in a straight vertical line, with The Towering Vertex at the top and The Knotted Tower at the bottom. Take the top 3 locations in the Otherworld deck and place them in the shadows, arranged in a line from left to right. Take the 3 City of Remnants mini-cards and X decoys, where X is the amount of doom on agenda 2a, shuffle them facedown, and distribute them as evenly as possible around The Knotted Tower to its left, right, and below. Place each investigator at The Knotted Tower and The Red-Gloved Man enemy at the Towering Vertex. Shuffle each other set-aside [[Coterie]] enemy into the encounter deck. (Note: From now on, draw cards from the encounter deck during each mythos phase, as normal.)

name: Secrets and Lies (v. III)
text: The Red-Gloved Man gains concealed 1 [per_investigator] and cannot be damaged. Objective - At the end of the round, if each investigator is at the same location as The Red-Gloved Man, they may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance.

name: Another World (v. III)
text: Remove each location from the game. (Investigators are not defeated during this process. Other enemies and attachments at those locations are discarded, and concealed mini-cards are set aside.) Put The Knotted Tower, Gravity-Defying Climb, and The Towering Vertex locations into play in a straight vertical line, with The Towering Vertex at the top and The Knotted Tower at the bottom. Take the top 3 locations in the Otherworld deck and place them in the shadows, arranged in a line from left to right. Take the 3 City of Remnants mini-cards, shuffle them facedown, and arrange them around The Knotted Tower as follows: One to its left, one to its right, and one below. Place each investigator at The Knotted Tower and The Red-Gloved Man enemy at the Towering Vertex.

name: To the Tower
text: Locations and concealed mini-cards cannot be placed adjacent to [[Tower]] locations. Objective - Find a way into the tower where the infiltrator lies in wait. If an investigator enters the Gravity-Defying Climb, advance.

name: Into the Tower
text: Set each concealed mini-card aside, out of play. Remove each City of Remnants in the shadows and the remainder of the Otherworld deck from the game.  Take the 3 City of Remnants concealed mini-cards and 1 [per_investigator] decoys, shuffle them facedown, and arrange them around Gravity-Defying Climb in a random order.

name: The Ascent
text: Objective - Ascend. If an investigator enters The Towering Vertex, advance.

name: Windows and Doors
text: Set each concealed mini-card aside, out of play.  Swap the set-aside Mimetic Nemesis enemy with The Red-Gloved Man enemy at The Towering Vertex.  Take the Mimetic Nemesis's mini-card and 2 [per_investigator] decoys, shuffle them facedown, and arrange them around The Towering Vertex in a random order.

name: The Final Err
text: [action] Flip a [[Stable]] key you control to its [[Unstable]] side: Remove an exposed decoy from the game. Objective - If Mimetic Nemesis is defeated, advance.

name: Scarlet Halls
text: [fast] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Move (to a connecting location).

name: Scarlet Halls
text: Forced - After you enter Scarlet Halls: For the remainder of your turn, as an additional cost for you to move from Scarlet Halls to a connecting location, you must either exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control or spend an additional action.

name: Congress Chamber
text: [action] Exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset you control: Search the top 6 cards of your deck for an asset, draw it, and shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Congress Chamber
text: While there is a ready [[Coterie]] enemy at Congress Chamber, increase the cost of each asset played by each investigator at Congress Chamber by 2.

name: Coterie Library
text: [action]: Reduce the cost of the next asset you play this round by 2. You may exhaust a [[Conspirator]] asset to treat this ability as a [fast] ability instead of an [action] ability for this activation.

name: Coterie Library
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating Coterie Library: The nearest [[Coterie]] enemy with an attached key shifts each of their attached keys.

name: The Key Reliquary
text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate The Key Reliquary: Instead of discovering clues, choose an unempowered key attached to an investigator at your location. Place a resource (from the token pool) on that key, as an empowerment; that key is empowered (if it is shifted, its controller may spend the empowerment instead of flipping it to its [[Unstable]] side).

name: The Key Reliquary
text: The Key Reliquary gets +2 shroud for each [[Unstable]] key in play.

name: The Knotted Tower
text: [reaction] After a location is placed adjacent to The Knotted Tower: Move to that location (from The Knotted Tower).

name: Gravity-Defying Climb
text: Forced - When a concealed mini-card around Gravity-Defying Climb is exposed: If it is... - ...the next in the sequence listed on The Towering Vertex, it remains in play and exposed, and you may expose another concealed mini-card. - ...any other mini-card, flip it and each other concealed mini-card facedown (without shuffling them).

name: Gravity-Defying Climb
text: The gate to Gravity-Defying Climb is sealed and forgotten. As an additional cost to enter Gravity-Defying Climb, investigators at The Knotted Tower must spend 4 [per_investigator] clues.

name: The Towering Vertex: Ruinous Conflux
text: Forced - When a concealed mini-card around The Towering Vertex is exposed: If it is... - ...the Mimetic Nemesis's mini-card, deal the Mimetic Nemesis 3 damage, then flip all concealed mini-cards facedown and shuffle them facedown. - ...a decoy, it remains in play and exposed.

name: The Towering Vertex: Ruinous Conflux
text: The Red-Gloved Man cannot be defeated. The way to The Towering Vertex is impossibly perplexing. In order for an investigator to enter The Towering Vertex, concealed mini-cards around Gravity-Defying Climb must be exposed in the following sequence: First, City of Remnants (L); second, City of Remnants (M); third, City of Remnants (R).

name: Mimetic Nemesis: Infiltrator of Realities
text: Massive. Cannot make attacks of opportunity. Mimetic Nemesis gets +3 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When Mimetic Nemesis would take 1 or more damage from an attack or player card: Choose and reveal a concealed mini-card. If it is a decoy, cancel all damage just dealt (the decoy remains in play and faceup). Otherwise, the damage is dealt as normal, then flip all revealed mini-cards facedown and shuffle them.

name: Coterie Agent (A)
text: Concealed 2. Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it. [reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

name: Coterie Agent (B)
text: Concealed 2. Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it. [reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

name: Coterie Agent (C)
text: Concealed 2. Forced - After Coterie Agent enters the shadows: Place 1 doom on it. [reaction] When Coterie Agent is exposed: Discard it.

name: Conspiracy in Red
text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on an enemy in the shadows. If there are no enemies in the shadows, search the encounter deck and discard pile for an enemy with the concealed keyword and draw it. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Pinch in Reality
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): Spend 1 clue or choose and discard half of the non-weakness cards in your hand (rounded up).

name: Heavy Rain
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must either take 1 horror, or place 1 of your clues on your location.

name: Coterie Envoy

text: Mutated. Parley. Choose an enemy at your location and an [[Item]] asset in your hand. Perform a fight action against the chosen enemy. If you succeed, play the chosen asset, reducing its cost by the amount you succeeded by.

name: Task Force
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
