name: The Key of Solomon: Secrets of the Unknown
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [fast] If there are more [bless] than [curse] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [bless] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Heal up to 2 damage and/or horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.  [fast] If there are more [curse] than [bless] tokens in the chaos bag, remove 1 [curse] token from the chaos bag and exhaust The Key of Solomon: Gain 2 resources.

name: Seal of the Elders
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play after a skill test at your location ends in which at least 2 [curse] tokens or 2 [bless] tokens were revealed.  If 2 [curse] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for 1 copy of Servant of Brass and put it into play. If 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, search your bonded cards for Keeper of the Key and put it into play. If 2 [curse] tokens and 2 [bless] tokens were revealed, do both instead. Remove Seal of the Elders from the game.

name: Keeper of the Key: Celestial Ward
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [bless] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 horror to Keeper of the Key and discover 1 clue at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Keeper of the Key would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

name: Servant of Brass: Daemonaic Vassal
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Bonded (Seal of the Elders). [reaction] When a [curse] token is revealed during a skill test at your location: Deal 1 damage to Servant of Brass and 2 damage to an enemy at your location or a connecting location. Forced - When Servant of Brass would leave play: Set it aside, out of play.

name: Matchbox
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Uses (3 supplies). If Matchbox has no supplies, discard it.  [fast] During any investigator's turn, exhaust Matchbox and spend 1 supply: Your location gets -1 shroud until the end of this turn.

name: Pelt Shipment
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: While Pelt Shipment is in your hand, your maximum hand size is reduced by 3.  [reaction] When the game ends or you resign, if Pelt Shipment is in your hand: Reduce the experience cost of the next new card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

name: Pitchfork
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [action]: Fight. You get +1 [combat] and deal +2 damage for this attack. If this attack is successful, lose control of Pitchfork and attach it to your location. Attached location gains: "[action]: Take control of Pitchfork. Any investigator at Pitchfork's location may trigger this ability."

name: Sparrow Mask: The Wanderer's Companion
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.  Uses (2 offerings). Replenish 1 of these offerings after you take 1 or more damage and/or horror.  [fast] Spend 1 offering: You get +2 [willpower] or +2 [agility] for this skill test. (Limit once per test.)

name: Elaborate Distraction
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: As an additional cost to play Elaborate Distraction, spend an action. Playing Elaborate Distraction does not provoke attacks of opportunity. For each enemy at your location and at each connecting location (choose one): - Automatically evade that enemy if it is non-[[Elite]]. - Deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Pushed to the Limit
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Choose a [[Weapon]] or [[Tool]] asset in your discard pile. Resolve an [action] ability on that asset, ignoring all costs (including its [action] cost). After this effect resolves, shuffle the chosen asset into your deck. Playing this card does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Stall for Time
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Parley. Choose an enemy at your location. Test [willpower] (X), where X is the chosen enemy's fight or evade value, whichever is lower. If you succeed, exhaust the chosen enemy (but do not disengage from it). If it is non-[[Elite]], it does not ready during the next upkeep phase. If you fail, return Stall for Time to your hand.

name: Wrong Place, Right Time
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: As an additional cost to play Wrong Place, Right Time, spend an action.  Move up to 5 damage and/or horror from your investigator to assets controlled by investigators at your location. For each asset defeated by this effect, draw 1 card. Remove Wrong Place, Right Time from the game.

name: Long Shot
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: You may commit Long Shot to a fight or evasion test against an enemy at your location or a connecting location.  If this test is successful, deal 1 damage to that enemy.

name: Hatchet
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [action]: Fight. Add your [agility] to your skill value for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy, discard Hatchet. Otherwise, lose control of Hatchet and attach it to the attacked enemy. Attached enemy gains: "[reaction] When attached enemy is defeated: Take control of Hatchet. Any investigator at Hatchet's location may trigger this ability."

name: Persistence
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: You may commit Persistence to a skill test from your discard pile. If you do, shuffle it into your deck after this test ends.

name: Devil: Friend or Foe?
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Forced - When your turn begins: Move 1 damage from your investigator to "Devil". Forced - When "Devil" is defeated: Deal 2 damage to each enemy and investigator at your location.

name: Fire Axe
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. [action]: Fight. If you have no resources in your resource pool, this attack deals +1 damage. [fast] During an attack using Fire Axe, spend 1 resource: You get +2 [combat] for this skill test. (Limit three times per attack.)

name: Hunting Jacket
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [fast] Exhaust Hunting Jacket: Choose 1 non-weakness card in your hand and attach it facedown to Hunting Jacket (max 3 cards attached). Then, gain 1 resource for each attached card.  [reaction] When Hunting Jacket is defeated: Draw each attached card.

name: Mariner's Compass
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [action] Exhaust Mariner's Compass: Investigate. If you fail, ready Mariner's Compass. If you succeed and have no resources in your resource pool, discover 1 additional clue at your location. [fast] During an investigation using Mariner's Compass, spend 1 resource: You get +1 [intellect] for this skill test. (Limit three times per investigation.)

name: Survival Technique
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [fast] Choose a card you own that is attached to your location and exhaust Survival Technique: Add that card to your hand.  [fast] During a skill test on a location or on a treachery attached to your location, exhaust Survival Technique: You get +2 skill value for this test.

name: Keep Faith
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play during any [fast] window.  Add 4 [bless] tokens to the chaos bag.

name: Providential
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: If this skill test is successful, add 1 [bless] token to the chaos bag for each damage or horror on you (whichever is less).

name: Token of Faith
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: [reaction] After a skill test ends in which 1 or more [curse] or [auto_fail] tokens were revealed, exhaust Token of Faith: Add that many [bless] tokens to the chaos bag. If this skill test failed, after resolving all effects from the failed test, the performing investigator may attempt that test again. (Max once per test.)

name: Dark Horse
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck.  During the upkeep phase, you may choose to not gain resources.  While you have no resources in your resource pool, you get +1 [willpower], +1 [intellect], +1 [combat], and +1 [agility].

name: Eldritch Tongue
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Uses (4 charges).  You may play events with "parley" from your discard pile as if they were in your hand. As an additional cost to play an event this way, spend 1 charge from Eldritch Tongue. After that event resolves, remove it from the game.

name: Bide Your Time
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: As an additional cost to play Bide Your Time, spend an action.  During your next turn, you may take two additional actions.

name: Well-Dressed
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: While Well-Dressed is committed to a skill test during a parley action, it gains [wild] [wild] [wild].

name: Dawn Star
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Fast. Play after revealing chaos tokens during a skill test at your location.  Ignore the modifiers of each [curse] token revealed during this test. For each [curse] token ignored, deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.

name: Occult Reliquary: Dubious Source
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck.  You have 1 additional hand, accessory, or arcane slot, which can only be used to hold a [[Blessed]] or [[Cursed]] asset.

name: Broken Diadem: Crown of Dying Light
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Limit 1 per deck. Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.  [reaction] After a skill test at your location ends in which both a [bless] and [curse] token were revealed: Place 1 resource on this card, as an offering. Then, if there are 3 offerings on this card, search your bonded cards for Twilight Diadem and swap it with this card, moving all offerings from this card to Twilight Diadem.

name: Twilight Diadem: Crown of Dying Light
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Bonded (Broken Diadem). Limit 1 [[Mask]] per investigator.  [reaction] When you reveal either a [bless] or [curse] token during a skill test, spend 1 offering and exhaust this card: Treat the revealed token as an [elder_sign] token instead, returning it to the chaos bag. Then, if this card has no offerings, search your bonded cards for Broken Diadem and swap it with this card.

name: Maimed Hand
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - You must either put Maimed Hand into play in your threat area, or take 1 damage and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 health. [action] [action]: Discard Maimed Hand.

name: Back Injury
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - You must either put Back Injury into play in your threat area, or take 1 damage and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 health. [action] [action]: Discard Back Injury.

name: The Silver Moth
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - You must either put The Silver Moth into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard The Silver Moth.

name: Vow of Drzytelech
packName: The Feast of Hemlock Vale Investigator Expansion
text: Revelation - You must either put Vow of Drzytelech into play in your threat area, or take 1 horror and shuffle it into your deck. It cannot leave play except by the [action] [action] ability below. You get -1 sanity. [action] [action]: Discard Vow of Drzytelech.

name: Marion Tavares: The Trawler
text: You have 1 fewer hand slots.  [reaction] After you play an event during your turn: Draw 1 card. Then, you may play a different event. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1. Search the top 3 cards of your deck for an event and draw it. Shuffle your deck.

name: Marion Tavares: The Trawler
text: Deck Size: 30. Trait Choice: At deck creation, choose one of the following traits: [[Fortune]], [[Gambit]], or [[Improvised]]. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, events with your chosen [[Trait]] level 0-2, up to 5 other level 0 Survivor cards ([survivor]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Two copies of Determined, "I'll do it myself," 1 random basic weakness.

name: Determined
text: Marion Tavares deck only.  If this skill test is successful and it is on an event you played, you may return Determined to your hand instead of discarding it.

name: I'll do it myself
text: Revelation - Put "I'll do it myself" into play in your threat area. As an additional cost for you to play an event, take 1 horror. [fast] Discard 3 events from your hand: Discard "I'll do it myself."

name: Lucius Galloway: The Poet
text: [reaction] After you successfully evade an enemy by 2 or more: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each enemy at your location.

name: Lucius Galloway: The Poet
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Book of Verse, Dreams of the Flood, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Book of Verse: Un-Commonplace Book
text: Lucius Galloway deck only.  Uses (1 inspiration). Replenish this inspiration the first time you discover a clue each round.  [reaction] After revealing chaos tokens during a skill test, spend 1 inspiration: You get +1 skill value for this skill test. If you succeed by exactly 0, draw 1 card.

name: Dreams of the Flood
text: Revelation - Put Dreams of the Flood into play in your threat area. Forced - The first time you discover 1 or more clues during your turn: Take 1 horror and shuffle Dreams of the Flood into your deck.

name: Agatha Crane: The Parapsychologist
text: [reaction] When your turn ends, if you sealed, canceled, or ignored 1 or more chaos tokens this round: Play a [[Spell]] or [[Insight]] event from your discard pile. After that event resolves, remove it from the game.  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may cancel this token and draw another in its place. If you do, draw 1 card.

name: Agatha Crane: The Parapsychologist
text: Deck Size: 35. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, [[Insight]] events level 0-3, up to 10 other level 0 Mystic cards ([mystic]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Ocula Obscura, Glimpse the Void, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Agatha Crane: The Parapsychologist
text: [reaction] When your turn ends, if you sealed, canceled, or ignored 1 or more chaos tokens this round: Play a [[Spell]] or [[Insight]] event from your discard pile. After that event resolves, remove it from the game.  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may cancel this token and draw another in its place. If you do, draw 1 card.

name: Agatha Crane: The Parapsychologist
text: Deck Size: 35. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, [[Spell]] events level 0-3, up to 10 other level 0 Seeker cards ([seeker]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Ocula Obscura, Glimpse the Void, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Ocula Obscura: Esoteric Eyepiece
text: Agatha Crane deck only. [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test, if no tokens are sealed here and you did not release a token from Ocula Obscura during this skill test: Seal a non-symbol token revealed during this skill test on Ocula Obscura. (Limit once per phase.) Forced - When you would reveal a token from the chaos bag: Resolve the token sealed here instead, then release that token.

name: Glimpse the Void
text: Revelation - Put Glimpse the Void into play in your threat area. The first time you reveal 1 or more chaos tokens during each skill test, you must reveal 1 additional chaos token (and resolve its effects). [action]: Shuffle Glimpse the Void into your deck.

name: Michael McGlen: The Gangster
text: [reaction] After you spend 1 or more ammo from a [[Firearm]] asset: Gain 1 resource. (Limit once per [[Firearm]] asset per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may place 1 ammo on a [[Firearm]] asset you control.

name: Michael McGlen: The Gangster
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, cards with [[Firearm]] either as their Trait or in their text box level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): "Viola" Case, Confiscation, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Viola Case
text: Michael McGlen deck only.  You have 2 additional hand slots, which can only be used to hold [[Firearm]] assets.  [reaction] After you play "Viola" Case: Search the top 9 cards of your deck for a [[Firearm]] asset and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Confiscation
text: Revelation - Shuffle each [[Firearm]] asset in your play area into your deck. If no asset was shuffled into your deck by this effect, take 1 damage and shuffle Confiscation back into your deck.

name: Gloria Goldberg: The Writer
text: You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.  [reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).  [elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Gloria Goldberg: The Writer
text: Deck Size: 30. Secondary Class Choice: At deck creation, choose Guardian ([guardian]), Seeker ([seeker]), or Rogue ([rogue]). Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 level 0-1 events and/or skills of your chosen secondary class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 3 copies of Psychic Sensitivity, 3 copies of Prophecy of the End (shuffled into the encounter deck), 1 random basic weakness.

name: Psychic Sensitivity
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only.  Fast. Play when an investigator at any location draws an encounter card, if there is a copy of that encounter card beneath Gloria Goldberg.  Cancel all of that card's effects and discard both copies of it. Then, draw 1 card.

name: Prophecy of the End
text: Surge. Forced - If Gloria Goldberg uses her [reaction] ability and this treachery is among the looked-at cards, it must be chosen and placed facedown beneath her (if you cannot, discard a non-weakness card beneath her first). Then, if there are 3 copies of this treachery beneath her, she is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma.

name: George Barnaby: The Lawyer
text: Your max hand size is equal to the number of facedown cards beneath George Barnaby. (Limit 5 cards.)  You may commit facedown cards beneath George Barnaby to skill tests as if they were in your hand.  [reaction] After you discard a card from your hand: Place it facedown beneath George Barnaby, then draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1. Draw 1 card.

name: George Barnaby: The Lawyer
text: Deck Size: 35. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 other level 0 Seeker and/or Rogue cards ([seeker]/[rogue]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 3 copies of Grim Resolve, Cast Adrift, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Setup: After drawing your opening hand, you may place any number of cards in your hand facedown beneath George Barnaby.

name: Grim Resolve
text: George Barnaby deck only.  After this skill test resolves, you may swap any number of cards beneath George Barnaby with the same number of non-weakness cards in your hand.

name: Cast Adrift
text: Revelation - If there are no cards beneath George Barnaby, shuffle Cast Adrift into your deck. Otherwise, discard each card beneath George Barnaby.

name: The Book of War: Sun Tzu's Legacy
text: Uses (3 secrets).  [reaction] After you play a [[Tactic]] event, spend 1 secret and exhaust The Book of War: When your turn ends, return that event to your hand.

name: Crowbar
text: [action] Exhaust Crowbar: Investigate. This investigation attempt uses [combat] instead of [intellect]. [action] Exhaust Crowbar: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack.

name: Remington Model 1858
text: Uses (2 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] When Remington Model 1858 leaves play: Immediately trigger the above [action] ability, ignoring all costs.

name: Primed for Action
text: Play only as your first action.  Play a [[Firearm]] asset from your hand, reducing its cost by 2. Then, you may play an [[Upgrade]] event from your hand, attaching it to that asset if able.

name: Ready for Anything
text: Play only as your first action.  Draw 1 card (2 cards instead if you drew an enemy this round). Then, heal 1 horror. This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Hardboiled
text: Max 1 committed per skill test.  Hardboiled gains [combat] [wild] for each successful attack you performed this round.

name: Hunter's Mark
text: Fast. Attach to an enemy at your location. Limit 1 per enemy.  Investigators get +1 [combat] while fighting this enemy.  [reaction] When damage is dealt to attached enemy, discard Hunter's Mark: Deal 1 additional damage to that enemy. Any investigator may trigger this ability.

name: Alice Luxley: Fearless Flatfoot
text: You get +1 [intellect]. The first investigate action you perform each turn does not provoke attacks of opportunity. [reaction] After you discover a clue, exhaust Alice Luxley: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. Card design inspired by the Council in Exile 2022.

name: Bulwark
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Seal ([elder_sign] or +1). You may resolve this keyword again after you defeat an enemy.  [reaction] When an enemy would attack an investigator at your location, exhaust Bulwark and release a token sealed here: Cancel that attack. Ready another asset you control.

name: Inspiring Presence
text: If this skill test is successful, ready an [[Ally]] asset at your location and heal 1 damage and 1 horror from it.

name: Locked and Loaded
text: Permanent. Limit 1 per deck.  Your [[Firearm]] assets with "Uses (ammo)" enter play with 1 additional ammo on them.

name: Quick Shot
text: Myriad. Fast. Play only during your turn.  Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.  [reaction] After you draw Quick Shot during your turn: Play it, reducing its resource cost by 2.

name: Quick Shot
text: Myriad. Fast. Play only during your turn.  Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location.  [reaction] After you draw Quick Shot during your turn: Play it, reducing its resource cost by 2.

name: Remington Model 1858
text: Uses (3 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. This attack deals +1 damage. [reaction] When Remington Model 1858 enters or leaves play: Immediately trigger the above [action] ability, ignoring all costs.

name: Alton O'Connell: Ghost Hunter
text: You get +1 [agility].  [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test by exactly 3: Place 1 resource on Alton O'Connell, as evidence.  [fast] Exhaust Alton O'Connell and spend X evidence: Discover 1 clue at your location. X is the shroud value of your location.

name: Artistic Inspiration
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Uses (1 inspiration).  [fast] Exhaust Artistic Inspiration and discard 1 card from your hand: Replenish 1 inspiration on this card.  [reaction] After revealing chaos tokens for a skill test you are performing, spend 1 inspiration: You get +1 or -1 skill value for this skill test.

name: Dial of Ancients: Unidentified
text: Limit 1 per deck. Uses (0 charges).  [reaction] After an enemy at your location is evaded: Place 1 charge on Dial of Ancients. Then, if there are 4 or more charges on Dial of Ancients, record in your campaign log that "you have calculated the day of reckoning."

name: Forensic Kit
text: Uses (4 supplies). [action] Spend 1 supply: Investigate. For this investigation, you may use [agility] instead of [intellect], and you get +1 skill value. If you succeed and there is an exhausted enemy at your location, heal 1 horror.

name: Mortar and Pestle
text: Uses (0 resources). Resources on Mortar and Pestle may be spent to pay for [[Spell]] cards. [reaction] After you discover 1 or more clues, exhaust Mortar and Pestle: Place 1 resource on it (from the token pool).

name: Oculus Mortuum
text: Uses (0 evidence).  [reaction] After you seal, cancel, or ignore a chaos token, exhaust Oculus Mortuum: Place 1 evidence on it.  [reaction] When an enemy attacks an investigator at your location, spend 1 evidence and exhaust Oculus Mortuum: Discover 1 clue at your location. If that enemy has the [[Geist]] trait, deal 1 damage to it.

name: Uncanny Specimen
text: Myriad. Fast.  Up to 3 Uncanny Specimen cards take up 1 arcane slot.  [reaction] When a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], or [elder_thing] symbol is revealed during a skill test at your location, discard Uncanny Specimen: Cancel that chaos token, return it to the chaos bag, and reveal a new one. If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

name: Correlate All Its Contents
text: Investigate. You may cancel the first chaos token revealed for this skill test, return it to the bag, and reveal a new one. If you succeed at this skill test, place 1 charge or secret on an asset controlled by an investigator at your location (if you succeed by exactly 1 or 3, place 2 charges or secrets on that asset instead).

name: Cosmic Revelation
text: Choose "even" or "odd". Each investigator reveals each non-weakness card in their hand with a cost matching the chosen option. In player order, each investigator may choose to either draw 1 card from their deck, or play 1 card they revealed from their hand (paying its cost).

name: Quick-Witted
text: Myriad.  Quick-Witted gains [intellect] [agility] for each other copy of Quick-Witted in your discard pile.  After this skill test ends, you may shuffle each other copy of Quick-Witted in your discard pile into your deck.

name: Misdirection
text: Limit 1 per investigator. Seal (+1 or 0). You may resolve this keyword again after you discover the last clue at your location.  [reaction] When an enemy attacks an investigator at your location, exhaust Misdirection and release a token sealed here: Cancel that attack. Then, that investigator may move to a connecting location.

name: Scientific Studies Grant
text: Limit 1 per investigator.  You have 2 additional hand slots, which may only be used to hold [[Science]] and/or [[Tool]] assets.

name: Working a Hunch
text: Fast. Play only during your turn.  Discover 1 clue from any revealed location.

name: Dial of Ancients: Signs of Cataclysm
text: Researched. Limit 1 per deck. Uses (4 charges). [reaction] When an investigator fails a skill test at your location, exhaust Dial of Ancients: Seal 1 chaos token revealed during that test on Dial of Ancients. Forced - When the round ends: For each chaos token sealed here, you must spend 1 charge or release that token.

name: Dial of Ancients: Signs of Aberration
text: Researched. Limit 1 per deck. Uses (4 charges). [action]: Fight/Evade. When you reveal a chaos token during this attack or evasion attempt, you may spend 1 charge to cancel that token, return it to the bag, and reveal a new one. You may do this any number of times. If this test succeeds, deal 1 damage to the targeted enemy.

name: Dial of Ancients: Signs of Revelation
text: Researched. Limit 1 per deck. Uses (4 charges). [fast] During your turn, exhaust Dial of Ancients and spend 1 charge: Investigate. When revealing chaos tokens for this test, reveal X additional tokens, where X is the number of enemies at your location. Choose 1 of the revealed tokens to resolve and ignore the rest.

name: Antikythera: Prophetic Timepiece
text: [reaction] After you succeed at a skill test, exhaust Antikythera: If you succeeded by...  -...exactly 1 or 3, discover 1 clue at your location.  -...exactly 2 or 4, draw 1 card and gain 1 resource.  -...exactly 5, you may take an additional action during your next turn.

name: Luger P08
text: Uses (2 ammo). [fast] Exhaust Luger P08 and spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +1 [combat] for this attack. [action] Spend 1 resource: Replenish all ammo on Luger P08 and ready it.

name: Robert Castaigne: Has Your Back
text: You get +1 [combat]. [action] Discard a [[Firearm]] asset that takes up 1 or fewer hand slots from your hand and exhaust Robert Castaigne: Resolve a Fight ability on the discarded asset, ignoring all costs. This does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: String Along
text: [reaction] When you attempt to evade an enemy, exhaust String Along: For this evasion attempt, you get +1 skill value and that enemy gains alert. If you succeed, draw 1 card and do not disengage from that enemy.

name: Where's the party?
text: Parley. Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a non-[[Elite]] enemy and spawn it exhausted and engaged with you. Draw cards equal to that enemy's combined damage and horror values.

name: You've had worse...
text: Fast. Play when an investigator at your location or a connecting location is dealt damage and/or horror.  That investigator may spend up to 3 resources. For each resource spent, that investigator cancels 1 damage or 1 horror just dealt.

name: Bum's Rush

text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). For each point you fail by, you must either lose 1 action or place 1 of your clues on your location.

name: Crossfire
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (3). If you fail, each investigator at your location takes 1 damage.

name: Whippoorwill
text: Aloof. Hunter.  Each investigator at Whippoorwill's location gets -1 [willpower], -1 [intellect], -1 [combat], and -1 [agility].

name: Eager for Death
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (2). Increase this skill test's difficulty by 1 for each damage on you. If you fail, take 2 horror.

name: Queen of Ash
text: Easy / Standard  [skull] -X. X is the number of Fire! treacheries in play.  [cultist] -2. If this is an attack or evasion targeting a [[Cultist]] enemy, reveal another token.  [tablet] -2 (-4 instead if you are at a [[Ritual Site]] location).  [elder_thing] -3. If you fail, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.

name: Queen of Ash
text: Hard / Expert  [skull] -X. X is twice the number of Fire! treacheries in play.  [cultist] -3. If this is an attack or evasion targeting a [[Cultist]] enemy, reveal another token.  [tablet] -4. If you are at a [[Ritual Site]] location, you automatically fail instead.  [elder_thing] -5. If you fail, draw the topmost copy of Fire! in the encounter discard pile.

name: A Gathering
text: Each enemy at a location with a copy of Fire! attached cannot be damaged.

name: Flame in the Dark
text: If the Servant of Flame enemy is set aside, spawn it at Underground Cistern.  Each investigator must test [willpower] (4). Each investigator who fails takes 1 direct horror.

name: A Ritual
text: Each enemy at a location with a copy of Fire! attached cannot be damaged.

name: The Mother Arrives
text:
If it is act 1:
Hungry flames spread through the tunnels, and the chants below intensify. You were too late to stop the summoning.
Reveal Underground Cistern and spawn Elokoss at it, (Mother of Flame) side faceup. Replace the current act and agenda with special agenda 3a: Brethren of Ash. It is both the current act and the current agenda.
Otherwise:
The ancient queen of ash awakens with a horrific wail.
Flip Elokoss to her (Mother of Flame) side, keeping all damage and attachments on her. Replace the current act and agenda with special agenda 3a: Brethren of Ash. It is both the current act and the current agenda.

name: Brethren of Ash
text: Forced - When doom would be placed on a card: Each investigator takes 1 direct damage, instead. Forced - If each remaining investigator is defeated: Advance. Objective - If Elokoss is defeated, (→R1) (page 13).

name: Out Like a Light
text: Each investigator is killed.

name: Search the Sewers
text: Objective - When an investigator enters Underground Cistern, advance.

name: The Ritual Site
text: Spawn the set-aside Elokoss enemy at Underground Cistern, (Faint Embers) side faceup. The investigator at Underground Cistern draws one of the set-aside Fire! treacheries. Shuffle each other copy of Fire! into the encounter deck, along with the set-aside Queen's Knight and Herald of Flame enemies. Put the set-aside Sluice Control location into play.

name: Stop the Rite
text: [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Discard a copy of Fire! at your location. Forced - When the round ends: Each [[Cultist]] enemy moves once toward Underground Cistern. Objective/b> - If Elokoss is defeated, advance.

name: Underground Cistern
text: Forced - If there are no clues on Underground Cistern: Place clues (from the token pool) on it up to its clue value. Forced - When the investigation phase ends: Discard each ready non-[[Elite]] [[Cultist]] enemy at this location. Place 1 doom on the agenda for each enemy discarded in this way.

name: Underground Cistern
text: As an additional cost to enter Underground Cistern, investigators must spend 3 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

name: Sluice Control
text: [action]: "Stop them at all costs!" You try to open the sluice valve. Test [agility] or [combat] (5). If you succeed, each enemy is defeated and each investigator who has not resigned is killed (→R3) (page 14)

name: Sluice Control
text: As an additional cost to enter Sluice Control, investigators must spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group.

name: Ashen Rebirth
text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, you must either take 2 direct damage or 2 direct horror (whichever you have more of).

name: Queen's Knight
text: Hunter. Forced - When Queen's Knight takes 1 or more damage: Deal 1 damage to Elokoss.

name: Herald of Flame
text: Hunter. Forced - After this enemy attacks: Heal 1 damage from each enemy at its location.

name: Elokoss: Faint Embers
text: Massive. Retaliate. Elokoss gets +5 [per_investigator] health, cannot move, and cannot make attacks of opportunity. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues: Place 1 clue on Elokoss. If Elokoss has 5 clues on her, (→R2) (page 14).

name: Elokoss: Mother of Flame
text: Hunter. Massive. Retaliate. Elokoss gets +5 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After you evade Elokoss: Ready her. She cannot attack you for the remainder of the round.

text:
Perform the setup as indicated in the Night of the Zealot Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions:

- Remove the original Hallway location from the game.

[fast] If there are 1 [per_investigator] resources on Clover Club Stage: Gain 1 [per_investigator] clues from the token pool. (Group limit once per game.)"

name: Clover Club Stage
encounterSet: Return to The House Always Wins
text: Clover Club Bar is connected to Clover Club Stage.

name: Caught Cheating
encounterSet: Return to The House Always Wins
text: Surge. Revelation - Each player who has "cheated" must lose 2 resources and take 1 damage.

name: Raise the Stakes
encounterSet: Return to The House Always Wins
text: Revelation - You must (choose one): - Remember that you have "cheated." - Lose 5 resources. - Put Raise the Stakes into play in your threat area. It gains: "Each [[Criminal]] enemy at your location loses aloof. If it is Act 2 or 3, each [[Criminal]] enemy engaged with you gets +1 fight and +1 evade."

name: Return to The Miskatonic Museum
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Miskatonic Museum shown here. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to The Miskatonic Museum
text:
- Before creating the "Exhibit Deck," add the 2 new Exhibit Hall locations to the original 6 Exhibit Hall locations. Set Exhibit Hall (Restricted Hall) aside and randomly remove 2 Exhibit Hall locations from the game. Then, continue creating the Exhibit Deck as normal.
For the duration of this scenario, the following additional rule applies: "While an investigator is resolving the text on agenda 1b and agenda 2b, the Forced ability on the next agenda in the agenda deck is considered to be active." Attach this card to the scenario reference card as a reminder.

name: Exhibit Hall: Medieval Exhibit
text: Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating this location: Take 1 damage.

name: Exhibit Hall: The Archives
text: [action] [action]: Gain 2 clues (from the token bank). Then, if Hunting Horror is in play, place 1 resource on Shadow-spawned. Otherwise, search the encounter deck, discard pile, and the void for Hunting Horror and spawn it in the Museum Halls. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Dark Bidding
text: Revelation - Attach Dark Bidding to Hunting Horror, even if it is out of play. Dark Bidding remains attached to Hunting Horror if it enters the void. Forced - When Hunting Horror attacks an investigator: That investigator must take 1 additional damage and 1 additional horror. Heal 2 damage from Hunting Horror. Discard Dark Bidding. (Max once per attack.)

name: Night Beyond Void
text: Revelation - Place 1 resource on Shadow-spawned, even if it is out of play.

name: Return to The Essex County Express
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Essex County Express shown here. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to The Essex County Express
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: - Remove Agenda 1a - "A Tear in Reality," from the game and replace it with the new Agenda 0a - "Where There's Smoke" and the new agenda 1a - "A Tear in Reality (v.II)." (When you construct the agenda deck, agenda 0a should be on top.)  - When choosing 6 Train Car locations to put into play at random, include the 2 new Train Car locations in this encounter set, for a total of 10 possible cards.  - When choosing an Engine Car location to put into play at random, include the new Engine Car location in this encounter set, for a total of 4 possible cards.  Set the Engineer story asset aside, out of play.

name: Where There's Smoke
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express

name: The Conductor: Beast from beyond the Gate
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Spawn - Leftmost location. Hunter. Massive. Forced - When The Conductor is defeated: Attach it to the current agenda. After you advance the attached agenda, draw The Conductor. Forced - When The Conductor's location leaves play: Instead of discarding The Conductor, move it one location to the right.

name: A Tear in Reality (v.II)
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express

name: Keep Moving!
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Remove the leftmost location from the game (or place it in the victory display if it has Victory X and no clues on it). Each investigator at that location is defeated. Each enemy and asset at that location is discarded.  Discard all clues controlled by the investigators.

name: Engine Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Engine Car is connected to the location to the left of it. Engine Car cannot be investigated. Forced - After you reveal Engine Car: Put the set-aside Engineer into play at the Engine Car.

name: Engine Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Engine Car is connected to the location to the left of it.  You cannot enter Engine Car unless all of the clues on the location to its left have been discovered.

name: Freight Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Freight Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it. Forced - At the end of the round: Each investigator on the Freight Car must test [agility] (1). Each investigator who fails must test [agility] (1) again. Each investigator who fails this second test is pulled into the vortex above and is defeated.

name: Train Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Train Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it.  You cannot enter Train Car unless all of the clues on the location to its left have been discovered.

name: Baggage Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Baggage Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it.  Baggage Car cannot be investigated.  [action] Choose and discard a card from your hand: Discover 1 clue in the Baggage Car.

name: Train Car
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: Train Car is connected to the locations to the left and right of it.  You cannot enter Train Car unless all of the clues on the location to its left have been discovered.

name: Engineer
encounterSet: Return to The Essex County Express
text: [action] If Engineer is ready: Parley. Test [willpower] or [intellect] (4). If you succeed, take control of Engineer. If you already control Engineer, discover 1 clue from your location instead. Any investigator at Engineer's location may trigger this action. Forced - When Engineer would be discarded: Instead, heal all damage and horror from it, lose control of it, and exhaust it.

name: Return to Blood on the Altar
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Blood on the Altar shown here. - Set each copy of Hired Gun aside, out of play. - Remove the original Village Commons location from the game and replace it with the new Village Commons (Silent Decay). (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Blood on the Altar
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: - Add the new locations to the original locations from the Blood on the Altar encounter set. Remove 1 of the 3 copies of each of these locations from the game at random. Then, choose 1 of the 6 remaining locations at random and remove it from the game as well. Put the remaining locations into play. - When placing encounter cards underneath locations, do not include the 6 cards from the Naomi's Crew encounter set. - Check Campaign Log. If the O'Bannion gang has a bone to pick with the investigators: Spawn one set-aside Hired Gun at one of the locations not connected to Village Commons. Shuffle the other set-aside Hired Gun into the encounter deck.

name: Village Commons: Silent Decay
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Each investigator at Village Commons cannot take draw or resource actions. [action]: Resign. "This is suicide! We're better off hiding out the night."

name: Village Commons: Silent Decay
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Bishop's Brook
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Forced - After you reveal Bishop's Brook: Test [agility] (4). If you fail, take 2 damage. [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath Bishop's Brook. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Bishop's Brook
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Burned Ruins
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Forced - After you successfully investigate Burned Ruins: Take 1 damage. [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath Burned Ruins. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Burned Ruins
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Osborn's General Store
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Forced - After you reveal Osborn's General Store: Gain 2 resources. [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath Osborn's General Store. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Osborn's General Store
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Congregational Church
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Forced - After you reveal Congregational Church: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Kidnapped! and draw it. Shuffle the encounter deck. [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath Congregational Church. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Congregational Church
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: House in the Reeds
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: While you are in the House in the Reeds, you cannot play assets.  [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath House in the Reeds. (Group limit once per game.)

name: House in the Reeds
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Schoolhouse
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Forced - After you discover a clue from this location: Search the encounter deck and discard pile for a copy of Servant of Many Mouths and draw it. Shuffle the encounter deck. [fast] If there are no clues here: Draw the encounter card underneath Schoolhouse. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Schoolhouse
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar

name: Hired Gun
encounterSet: Return to Blood on the Altar
text: Each [[Criminal]] enemy (including Hired Gun) gains: "Hunter. Prey - Most resources." Each copy of Hunted Down gains peril and surge.

name: Return to Undimensioned and Unseen
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Undimensioned and Unseen shown here. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Undimensioned and Unseen
text:
- Remove 4 copies of Brood of Yog-Sothoth from the original scenario and replace them with the 4 new versions of Brood of Yog-Sothoth from the Return to Undimensioned and Unseen encounter set.
For the duration of this scenario, the following additional rule applies: "If a Brood of Yog-Sothoth would be put into play, it is chosen at random from among the set-aside versions of Brood of Yog-Sothoth." Attach this card to the scenario reference card as a reminder.

name: Brood of Yog-Sothoth: Charging Beast
text: Massive. Brood of Yog-Sothoth gets +1 [per_investigator] health and cannot be damaged or attacked except using the ability on Esoteric Formula. Forced - After Brood of Yog-Sothoth moves for the first time each round, if it is unengaged: It immediately moves again toward a random location.

name: Brood of Yog-Sothoth: Swelling Devourer
text: Massive.  Brood of Yog-Sothoth gets +2 [per_investigator] health and cannot be damaged or attacked except using the ability on Esoteric Formula.

name: Brood of Yog-Sothoth: Thrashing Spawn
text: Massive. Retaliate.  Brood of Yog-Sothoth gets +1 [per_investigator] health and cannot be damaged or attacked except using the ability on Esoteric Formula.

name: Brood of Yog-Sothoth: Amorphous Terror
text: Massive. Retaliate. Brood of Yog-Sothoth gets +1 [per_investigator] health and cannot be damaged or attacked except using the ability on Esoteric Formula. Forced - After Brood of Yog-Sothoth enters your location, or vice versa: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 horror.

name: Imperceptible Creature
text: Surge. Revelation - Attach to a Brood of Yog-Sothoth enemy in play without a copy of Imperceptible Creature attached. Remove 1 clue from that enemy. Attached enemy gains [[Elite]].

name: Return to Where Doom Awaits
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Where Doom Awaits shown here. - Set Naomi O'Bannion aside, out of play. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Where Doom Awaits
text: - Replace the original Base of the Hill and Ascending Path with the new Base of the Hill (Warped and Twisted) and Ascending Path (Warped and Twisted). - Add the new Diverging Path and Altered Path to the original Diverging Paths and Altered Paths. Then, randomly remove 1 of each from the game. (You will remove an additional copy of each during standard setup.) - Check Campaign Log. If Naomi has your back: Instead of gaining clues from the token bank via the effect from Part 1 in the Campaign Guide, the lead investigator may choose an investigator to add the set-aside Naomi O'Bannion to his or her deck. This card does not count toward that investigator's deck size.

name: Base of the Hill: Warped and Twisted
text: Base of the Hill is connected to each copy of Diverging Path. Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues from Base of the Hill: Spend those clues and put that many random set-aside Diverging Path locations into play. [action]: Resign. "This is more than I signed up for!"

name: Base of the Hill: Warped and Twisted
Ascending Path: Warped and Twisted
text: Ascending Path is connected to each copy of Altered Path. Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues from Ascending Path: Spend those clues and put that many random set-aside Altered Path locations into play.

name: Ascending Path: Warped and Twisted
text: The path leading farther up the hill is masked. You cannot move into Ascending Path.

name: Abandoned Camp
text: Forced - After you reveal Abandoned Camp: Lose 2 resources for each action you have performed this round (including this one, if applicable).

name: Fathomless Lake
text: Forced - After you reveal Fathomless Lake: If you have 2 or more actions remaining, place 1 doom on the current agenda.

name: Naomi O'Bannion: Ruthless Tactician
text: You get +1 [intellect] and +1 [combat].  [reaction] When an investigator at your location reveals a non-[auto_fail] chaos token during an [intellect] or [combat] test, exhaust Naomi O'Bannion: Cancel that chaos token and reveal a new chaos token. For the remainder of this test, if another copy of the canceled chaos token is revealed, cancel it and reveal a new chaos token.

name: Return to Lost in Time and Space
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Dunwich Legacy Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Lost in Time and Space shown here. - Set Seth Bishop (Thrall of Yog-Sothoth) aside, out of play. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Lost in Time and Space
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: - Check Campaign Log. If the Ritual was completed: Replace Act 2a - "Into the Beyond" with the new Act 2a - "Into the Beyond (v. II)" included in this encounter set. - Replace Agenda 3a - "Breaking Through" with the new Agenda 3a - "Breaking Through (v. II)" included in this encounter set. - Put the single-sided Realms Beyond location into play and spawn Yog-Sothoth there.

name: Breaking Through (v. II)
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Forced - After you are moved to a location by an encounter card effect: Take 1 horror.

name: The Key and the Gate (v. II)
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Revelation - Move Yog-Sothoth to The Edge of the Universe (or Another Dimension if The Edge of the Universe is not in play). Remove Realms Beyond from the game and advance to agenda 4a. Ignore the text on Realms Beyond while resolving this ability.

name: Into the Beyond (v. II)
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: [action]: Discard the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Choose a location discarded by this effect and resolve its 'revelation' ability. Objective - If an investigator enters The Edge of the Universe, advance.

name: The Vessel Awaits
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Spawn the set-aside Seth Bishop (Thrall of Yog-Sothoth) enemy at The Edge of the Universe.

name: Seth Bishop: Thrall of Yog-Sothoth
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Retaliate. Forced - When Seth Bishop attacks you during the enemy phase: Either move to Another Dimension after this attack, or Seth Bishop deals +2 damage for this attack. Forced - After Yog-Sothoth enters Seth Bishop's location (or vice versa): Seth is devoured whole. Remove Seth Bishop from the game. Heal 6 damage from Yog-Sothoth.

name: Realms Beyond: All-In-One
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Yog-Sothoth is immune to player card effects, cannot take damage, and cannot leave Realms Beyond. As an additional cost for you to leave Realms Beyond, test [willpower] or [agility] (3). If you fail, cancel the effects of the move. Forced - When a forced effect would move an investigator or enemy to Another Dimension: Move them here instead. Cannot be canceled.

name: Indecipherable Stairs
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Revelation - Put Indecipherable Stairs into play and discard the top 3 cards of your deck. Forced - After you leave Indecipherable Stairs: You must either take 2 horror, or discard Indecipherable Stairs.

name: Towering Luminosity
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Revelation - Put Towering Luminosity into play and either place 1 doom on it or take 2 damage. Forced - After you fail a test while at this location: You must either flip 1 clue on Towering Luminosity to its doom side, or discard Towering Luminosity.

name: Unstable Vortex
encounterSet: Return to Lost in Time and Space
text: Revelation - Put Unstable Vortex into play and discard 1 copy of Tear Through Space, if able. Forced - At the end of your turn, if you are at Unstable Vortex: You must either draw the top card of the encounter deck, or shuffle Unstable Vortex into the encounter deck.

name: Haunting Recollections
text: Revelation - For each card in your hand, if there is a copy of that card in your discard pile, take 1 horror (to a maximum of 3 horror). If you take no horror from this effect, discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

name: A Baleful Welcome
text: Peril. Revelation - Choose two of the following actions (investigate, fight, evade, move, or play). For the remainder of the round, each investigator cannot perform each chosen action. If this is not the first copy of A Baleful Welcome drawn this phase, choose three of those actions instead.

name: Infinite Doorway
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. As an additional cost to move into or out of attached location, discard the top card of your deck. If the discarded card is a weakness, draw it. Otherwise, for each copy of the discarded card in your hand or play area, you must either take 1 horror or discard that card.

name: Resurgent Evils
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Draw the top 2 cards of the encounter deck. - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

name: Secret Door
text: Revelation - Attach to the location with the most investigators, and without a Secret Door attached. Investigators cannot leave this location. [action]: Test [willpower] (3) to search for the passage or [intellect] (3) to discern the way out. If you succeed, discard Secret Door.

name: Inexplicable Cold
text: Revelation - Test [agility] (4). For each point you fail by, you must either choose and discard 1 card from your play area or from your hand, or take 1 damage.

name: Oppressive Mists
text: Revelation - Attach to your location. Limit 1 per location. Forced - After an investigator at this location draws 1 or more cards, that investigator must test [willpower] (3). If that investigator fails, he or she chooses and discards an equal number of cards. [action] [action]: Discard Oppressive Mists.

name: Violent Commands
text: Revelation - Put Violent Commands into play in your threat area. [action]: Deal 2 damage to an investigator at your location and discard Violent Commands. Forced - At the end of your turn: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, take 1 horror.

name: Idle Hands
text: Revelation - Put Idle Hands into play in your threat area. [fast] If Idle Hands is in your threat area, during your turn, take 2 damage and discard Idle Hands: You may take an additional action this turn. Forced - At the end of your turn: Take 1 horror.

name: Need for Knowledge
text: Revelation - If you have no clues, Need for Knowledge gains surge. Otherwise, test [intellect] (X), where X equals the number of clues you have (to a maximum of 5). For each point you fail by, you must either take 1 horror or place 1 of your clues on your location.

name: Vassal of the Lurker
text: Hunter. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Each investigator at Vassal of the Lurker's location discards 1 card from the top of his or her deck.

name: Eldritch Accord
text: Peril. Revelation - You may draw 1 card. You may choose and discard up to 2 cards from your hand. Test [willpower] (X). If you fail, take 2 horror. X equals the number of cards in your hand when this test begins.

name: .32 Colt
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Uses (6 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You deal +1 damage for this attack. [fast] Spend 1 resource: Return .32 Colt to your hand.

name: Eat lead!
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Fast. Play when you activate the Fight ability on a [[Firearm]] asset. Spend 1 additional ammo token from that asset. When you reveal chaos tokens for this attack, reveal 1 additional chaos token. Choose one to resolve and ignore the other.

name: Logical Reasoning
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: For each clue you have (to a maximum of 3), either heal 2 horror from an investigator at your location or discard a [[Terror]] card at your location.

name: Archaic Glyphs: Markings of Isis
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Researched. Uses (3 charges). [action] Spend 1 charge: Investigate. If you succeed, you may put an asset with printed cost of X or lower into play from your hand. X is the amount you succeeded by.

name: Stealth
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: [fast] During your turn, exhaust Stealth: Evade. The chosen enemy gets -2 evade for this evasion attempt. If you successfully evade the enemy, disengage with it but do not exhaust it. Until the end of your turn, that enemy cannot engage you.

name: Suggestion
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Uses (3 charges). If Suggestion has no charges, discard it. [action] Exhaust Suggestion: Evade. Add your [willpower] value to your skill value for this evasion attempt. If you do not succeed by at least 2, remove 1 charge from Suggestion.

name: Alchemical Transmutation
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Uses (4 charges).  [action] Exhaust Alchemical Transmutation, spend 1 charge: Test [willpower] (0). For each point you succeed by, gain 1 resource (to a maximum of 4). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, take 1 damage.

name: Storm of Spirits
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Fight. This attack uses [willpower] instead of [combat]. You get +2 [willpower] for this attack. If you succeed, instead of its standard damage, this attack deals 3 damage to each enemy at the attacked enemy's location (any additional damage is dealt to the attacked enemy). If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] token is revealed during this attack, deal 2 damage to each investigator at the attacked enemy's location.

name: Lantern
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: [action]: Investigate. Your location gets -1 shroud for this investigation. [action] Discard Lantern: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location (or remove Lantern from the game to deal 2 damage, instead). This action does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Gravedigger's Shovel
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: [action]: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack. [action] Discard Gravedigger's Shovel: Discover 1 clue at your location (or remove Gravedigger's Shovel from the game to discover 2 clues, instead).

name: Unspeakable Oath: Bloodthirst
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [reaction] When you deal damage to an enemy in excess of its remaining health: Discard this card from your hand.

name: Unspeakable Oath: Curiosity
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [reaction] After you successfully investigate a location with no clues on it: Discard this card from your hand.

name: Unspeakable Oath: Cowardice
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Campaign Mode only. Peril. Hidden. Revelation - Secretly add this card to your hand. Forced - When the game ends or you are eliminated, if this card is in your hand: You earn 2 fewer experience. [action]: Evade. Use only on an exhausted unengaged enemy at your location. If you succeed, discard this card from your hand.

name: Return to Curtain Call
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Path to Carcosa Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Curtain Call shown here. - Construct the act deck using all six copies of Act 2a - "The Stranger." (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Curtain Call
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: - Attach this card to Royal Emissary. It gains the following text: "This card cannot be detached from Royal Emissary (even if Royal Emissary leaves play). Forced - After Royal Emissary is added to the victory display: Place 1 resource on this card, as a warning. For each warning on this card, Royal Emissary gets +1 [per_investigator] health."

name: The Stranger
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: Alaran Mists
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Instead of discarding The Man in the Pallid Mask, move him to the Lobby. Add 1 [cultist] and 1 [tablet] token to the chaos bag. Place 1 horror on Backstage. Until the end of the scenario, horror on locations represents the creeping mist, and each location with horror gains: "Forced - When you would leave this location: Test [willpower] (3). If you fail, you must either cancel the effects of the move or lose all remaining actions and end your turn after completing the effects of the move." Keep this card next to the act deck as a reminder, and advance to act 3a.

name: The Stranger
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: Under the City
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Instead of discarding The Man in the Pallid Mask, move him to the Lobby. Add 1 [cultist] and 1 [elder_thing] token to the chaos bag. Place 1 horror on the Balcony. Until the end of the scenario, horror on locations represents entangling overgrowth, and each location with horror gains: "Forced - After you leave this location: Test [willpower] (4). If you fail, discard an [[Item]] or [[Ally]] asset you control (if you cannot, take 2 damage instead)." Keep this card next to the act deck as a reminder, and advance to act 3a.

name: The Stranger
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Objective - When The Man in the Pallid Mask would be discarded from play, advance.

name: Here Is My Reply
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Instead of discarding The Man in the Pallid Mask, move him to the Lobby. Add 1 [tablet] and 1 [elder_thing] token to the chaos bag. Place 1 horror on the Lobby. Until the end of the scenario, horror on locations represents the awful screeching of the Stranger, and each location with horror gains: "Forced - After you enter this location or end your turn at this location: Test [willpower] (2). If you fail, take 1 horror. (Limit once per round.)" Keep this card next to the act deck as a reminder, and advance to act 3a.

name: Theatre Lounge
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Forced - After you reveal the Theatre Lounge: Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Search the encounter deck for the 2 topmost hidden cards and secretly add both of those cards to your hand. Shuffle the encounter deck.

name: Lobby Doorway
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa

name: Prop Shop
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: While you are investigating Prop Shop, it gets -1 shroud for each horror on you. Forced - After you fail a skill test while investigating the Prop Shop: Take 1 horror.

name: Backstage Doorway
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa

name: La Comtesse: Subverter of Plans
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Spawn - Balcony. Hunter. Forced - After you defeat La Comtesse: Place her in your hand, as a hidden card. While La Comtesse is in your hand, she gains: "La Comtesse counts as 4 cards instead of 1 while checking your hand size. Forced - After you discard 1 or more cards from your hand during the upkeep phase: Take 1 horror."

name: Return to The Last King
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Path to Carcosa Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Last King shown here. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to The Last King
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: - Remove Agenda 1a - "Fashionably Late" from the game and replace it with the new Agenda 1a - "Better Never Than Late." - Remove the original Dianne Devine (Mercurial and Mischevious) from the game and replace it with the new version of Dianne Devine (Hiding an Oath Unspoken). - Place the 3 new "Sickening Reality" cards underneath the scenario reference card, along with the 5 original ones, for a total of 8. - Set the Shocking Display treachery aside, out of play.

name: Better Never Than Late
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa

name: Guest of Honor
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Find the [[Bystander]] asset with the fewest clues on it (among [[Bystander]] assets with at least one clue). Spawn the set-aside Dianne Devine asset at that asset's location.  Shuffle Shocking Display into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.

name: Dianne Devine: Knows What You're Up To
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Prey - Most clues. Hunter. Dianne Devine gets +3 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After any investigator performs a parley action: Move Dianne Devine once toward that investigator.

name: Sickening Reality
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Each investigator at Dianne Devine's location takes 1 horror.  Flip this card to its enemy side, and switch it with the asset version of Dianne Devine, removing that version from the game.

name: Crazed Guest
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Hunter. [action]: Parley. Test [intellect] (4). If you succeed, you manage to get through to them for just a moment; automatically evade Crazed Guest. If you fail, your words fall on deaf ears.

name: Sickening Reality
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text:
If there are no Party Guests in play, place this card back underneath the scenario reference card and randomly choose a new Sickening Reality card to resolve. Otherwise, read the following:
A chorus of laughter erupts nearby as one of the guests dances to the bizarre music. You head over to discover what is so funny, but what you find is no laughing matter at all. The guest's dance partner lies sprawled on the floor, limp and bloodied, a gaping, gory hole in their chest. The guest turns to you with a disturbing look in their eye and a wicked grin spreading on their lips.
Choose a Party Guest in play. Each investigator at that Party Guest's location takes 1 damage. Place 1 doom on the current agenda. Flip this card to its enemy side, and switch it with the chosen version of Party Guest, removing that version from the game.

name: Dianne Devine: Hiding an Oath Unspoken
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Each investigator at Dianne Devine's location cannot discover or take control of clues. Forced - At the beginning of the enemy phase: Find the [[Bystander]] asset with the fewest clues on it (among [[Bystander]] assets with at least one clue). Move Dianne Devine to that asset's location, if able.

name: Party Guest
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Revelation - Find the [[Bystander]] asset with the most clues on it, and put Party Guest into play at that asset's location. Investigators cannot parley with [[Bystander]] assets at Party Guest's location. [action] Spend 2 resources: Parley. Move Party Guest to a connecting location.

name: Shocking Display
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Revelation - Randomly resolve one of the Sickening Reality cards underneath the scenario reference card. Cannot be canceled.

name: Return to Echoes of the Past
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Path to Carcosa Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to Echoes of the Past shown here. - Randomly choose one [[Basement]] Historical Society location and remove it from the game, without looking at its revealed side. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to Echoes of the Past
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text:
- When putting locations into play, put all 3 copies of Quiet Halls into play, along with the remaining 8 Historical Society locations. (The 3 [[basement]] locations should be placed to form a bottom row below the 3 [[ground floor]] locations.) - Set both Keeper of the Oath enemies aside, out of play.
For the duration of this scenario, the following additional rule applies: "Forced - After the investigators advance to act 2 or act 3: Spawn a set-aside Keeper of the Oath in any empty Historical Society location." Attach this card to the scenario reference card as a reminder.

name: Quiet Halls
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Entry Hall is connected to Quiet Halls. Quiet Halls is connected to each other [[Basement]] location. [action] If each location in play is revealed and there are no clues on locations in play: Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on Quiet Halls (from the token bank).

name: Quiet Halls
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Entry Hall is connected to Quiet Halls.  Quiet Halls is connected to each other [[Basement]] location.

name: Historical Society: Dusty Archives
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: While you have at least 1 hidden card in your hand, you cannot investigate this location.

name: Historical Society
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Forced - When an enemy spawns at this location: Reveal this location.

name: Historical Society: Museum Storage
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Forced - When you investigate this location, if there is at least 1 [[Cultist]] enemy in play: This location gets -3 shroud for this investigation. If a [skull], [cultist], [tablet], [elder_thing], or [auto_fail] symbol is revealed during this test, move 1 clue from this location to the [[Cultist]] enemy farthest from you (before resolving the effects of the test).

name: Historical Society
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Forced - When an enemy spawns at this location: Reveal this location.

name: Historical Society: Boiler Room
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Forced - After you discover 1 or more clues at this location: One at a time, draw that many cards from the top of the encounter deck.

name: Historical Society
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: Forced - When an enemy spawns at this location: Reveal this location.

name: Keeper of the Oath
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to Echoes of the Past
text: While the number of the current act is greater than the number of the current agenda, Keeper of the Oath gains hunter. Forced - At the end of the enemy phase: Find each investigator whose location shares a [[Trait]] with Keeper of the Oath's location. Move 1 clue from each of those investigators to Keeper of the Oath.

name: Return to The Unspeakable Oath
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Path to Carcosa Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to The Unspeakable Oath shown here. (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to The Unspeakable Oath
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: - Set the Host of Insanity enemy and the Radical Treatment treachery aside, out of play. - When determining which version of act 2 to use, do not follow the original setup instructions. Instead, remove the original versions of act 2 from the game, and check the Campaign Log. If you have more (or equal) Conviction than Doubt, use the new Act 2 - "The Really Bad Ones" (v. III). If you have more Doubt than Conviction, use the new Act 2 - "The Really Bad Ones" (v. IV).

name: The Really Bad Ones (v. III)
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Ignore the text on the unrevealed side of [[Arkham Asylum]] locations. Objective - Find the Patient Confinement location with Daniel Chesterfield. (You will be instructed when to advance.)

name: The Tale Retold
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Spawn the set-aside Host of Insanity at Patient Confinement (Daniel's Cell). Shuffle the encounter discard pile and each enemy beneath the act deck into the encounter deck.

name: The Really Bad Ones (v. IV)
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Ignore the text on the unrevealed side of [[Arkham Asylum]] locations. Objective - Find the Patient Confinement location with Daniel Chesterfield. (You will be instructed when to advance.)

name: Again and Again
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Choose an investigator at Patient Confinement (Daniel's Cell). Put the set-aside Daniel Chesterfield card (asset side faceup) into play under that investigator's control. Then, attach the set-aside Radical Treatment treachery to Daniel Chesterfield. Shuffle the encounter discard pile and each enemy beneath the act deck into the encounter deck.

name: Host of Insanity
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Massive. Hunter. Host of Insanity gets +2 [per_investigator] health. [action] If you control Clasp of Black Onyx: Parley. You reveal the clasp to the creature. It freezes in place, whispering a garbled prayer. Automatically evade Host of Insanity.

name: Radical Treatment
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Forced - At the end of the round: Daniel Chesterfield's controller takes 2 horror. [action] If you are at Infirmary: Test [willpower] or [intellect] (6). If you succeed, detach Radical Treatment and add it to the victory display. If you control Clasp of Black Onyx, reduce the difficulty of this test by 3.

name: Clouded Memory
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
text: Peril. Revelation - You must either (choose one): - Forget something an investigator has "remembered" from an ability on a location. (It is no longer true.) - Take 1 horror and Clouded Memory gains surge.

name: Return to A Phantom of Truth
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: Perform the setup as indicated in The Path to Carcosa Campaign Guide, with the following exceptions: - When gathering encounter sets, also gather the new encounter sets for Return to A Phantom of Truth shown here. - Randomly choose 1 of the 2 Montparnasse locations, 1 of the 2 Grand Guignol locations, 1 of the 2 Père Lachaise Cemetery locations... (Continued on reverse side.)

name: Return to A Phantom of Truth
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text:
...1 of the 2 Canal Saint-Martin locations, 1 of the 2 Notre-Dame locations, and 1 of the 2 Gardens of Luxembourg locations. Put those locations into play. Remove the other versions of those locations from the game. - Set both copies of Figure in the Shadows aside, out of play.
For the duration of this scenario, the following additional rules apply: "Forced - After The Organist enters play: Shuffle both set-aside copies of Figure in the Shadows into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile." Attach this card to the scenario reference card as a reminder.

name: Montparnasse
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: Forced - After you discover any number of clues from Montparnasse: Discard cards from your hand with that many [willpower] icons among them. If you cannot, take 1 horror.

name: Montparnasse
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth

name: Grand Guignol: Theatre of the Great Puppet
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: [action] Spend 5 resources: Either place 1 doom on the current agenda, or remove 1 doom from the current agenda. (Group limit once per game.)

name: Grand Guignol: Theatre of the Great Puppet
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth

name: Père Lachaise Cemetery
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: Forced - After an enemy moves into Père Lachaise Cemetery: It gets +1 horror value for the remainder of the round.

name: Père Lachaise Cemetery
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth

name: Canal Saint-Martin
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: While you are at Canal Saint-Martin, you must use your [combat] in place of your [agility], and vice versa.

name: Canal Saint-Martin
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth

name: Notre-Dame
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
text: Each enemy at Notre-Dame gets +1 fight and -1 evade.  [reaction] After you successfully evade an enemy at Notre-Dame by 3 or more during your turn: You may take an additional action this turn. (Group limit once per round.)

name: Notre-Dame
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth

name: Gardens of Luxembourg
packName: Return to the Path to Carcosa
encounterSet: Return to A Phantom of Truth
