text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -1 for every 5 cards Subject 8L-08 has devoured.  [cultist]: -2. If this token is revealed during an attack against an enemy, that enemy gains retaliate for this attack.  [tablet]: -3. After this skill test ends, Subject 8L-08 devours each card that was committed to the test.  [elder_thing]: -5. Choose up to 5 cards from your hand. Subject 8L-08 devours each of those cards. You get +1 skill value for this test for each card devoured in this way.

name: The Blob That Ate Everything
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -1 for every 3 cards Subject 8L-08 has devoured.  [cultist]: -3. If this token is revealed during an attack against an enemy, it gains retaliate for this test.  [tablet]: -4. After this skill test ends, Subject 8L-08 devours each card that was committed to the test.  [elder_thing]: -7. Choose up to 7 cards from your hand. Subject 8L-08 devours each of those cards. You get +1 skill value for this test for each card devoured in this way.

name: The Anomaly Spreads
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally).

name: Cracks in the Earth
text: Choose 2 [[Oozified]] locations, other than The Crater, without a copy of Vulnerable Heart. Subject 8L-08 devours both of those locations, along with all non-[[Ooze]] cards at those locations ([[Ooze]] enemies are instead discarded).  Shuffle 1 set-aside copy of Cubic Ooze and 1 set-aside copy of Grasping Ooze into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.

name: The Anomaly Swells
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally).

name: Unfettered Growth
text: Choose 2 [[Oozified]] locations, other than The Crater, without a copy of Vulnerable Heart. Subject 8L-08 devours both of those locations, along with all non-[[Ooze]] cards at those locations ([[Ooze]] enemies are instead discarded).  Shuffle both set-aside copies of Oozewraith into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.

name: The Anomaly Consumes
text: Each location is connected to each location adjacent to it (orthogonally).

name: The Blob Ate Everything
text: Subject 8L-08 devours all cards in play and out of play, all cards in your collection, all cards that ever were, and all cards that ever will be. (→R1)

name: Expose the Anomaly
text: *This act has a global clue threshold (see page 6 of the rules for details). Only clues on copies of this act among all groups contribute to the global clue threshold. [fast] Place up to 3 of your clues on this act. (Limit once per round.) Objective - At the start of the round, if the global clue threshold has been reached, you must advance. The event organizer will announce when this threshold has been reached. (Beware - advancing will expose the anomaly's weak spot. Be ready for a fight.)

name: It Is Exposed!
text:
If this is the first time this act has advanced, read the following:
You've seen the anomaly's true heart. It lies beneath the surface of the ooze, pulsing with unseen power and guiding its myriad forms with alien hunger. You suspect this organ, whatever it may be, holds the secret to destroying the anomaly once and for all.
Regardless of how many times this act has advanced, read the following:
After hours of investigation, you believe that you have pinpointed the creature's heart. Due to the way it shifts throughout the surface of its all-encompassing body, you know it won't stay at its current location for very long. Then you'll have to track it down again...
Choose any [[Oozified]] location. Spawn the set-aside Vulnerable Heart enemy at the chosen location.

name: Expose the Anomaly
text: Objective - At the start of the round, investigators may spend the requisite number of clues, as a group, to advance. (Beware - advancing will expose the anomaly's weak spot. Be ready for a fight.)

name: It Is Exposed!
text:
If this is the first time this act has advanced, read the following:
You've seen the anomaly's true heart. It lies beneath the surface of the ooze, pulsing with unseen power and guiding its myriad forms with alien hunger. You suspect this organ, whatever it may be, holds the secret to destroying the anomaly once and for all.
Regardless of how many times this act has advanced, read the following:
After hours of investigation, you believe that you have pinpointed the creature's heart. Due to the way it shifts throughout the surface of its all-encompassing body, you know it won't stay at its current location for very long. Then you'll have to track it down again...
Choose any [[Oozified]] location. Spawn the set-aside Vulnerable Heart enemy at the chosen location.

name: Extraterrestrial Physiology
text: Forced - After any amount of damage is placed on Vulnerable Heart: Place twice that much damage on Subject 8L-08 as well. [fast] While an investigator at your location is attacking Vulnerable Heart, spend 1 clue: That investigator gets +2 [combat] for this attack. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance.

name: Rain of Ooze
text:
Remove all damage from Vulnerable Heart and set it aside, out of play. The amount of damage that is removed from Vulnerable Heart in this way is X.
If X is at least 1, read the following:
All around you, the anomaly reels back for a moment. Then it erupts into the sky in a massive geyser of anger and hate. You duck for cover as gobs of ooze slam into the ground all over the city, splitting into even more sentient masses.
Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck and discard cards from the top until [[Manifold]] enemies with a total of at least X health have been discarded. One at a time, in a random order, spawn each of those enemies at different [[Oozified]] locations.

name: Blackwater's Bane
text: Each [[Ooze]] enemy gains retaliate and loses the Blob X keyword. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance. (The scenario will not end when this act advances.)

name: A Moment of Respite
text:
If this is the first time this act has advanced, read the following:
Throughout your struggles, an alien presence has watched your progress with curiosity. Now, they descend from orbit in order to hatch their plot.
Shuffle each of the set-aside Mi-Go Drone enemies into the encounter deck, along with the encounter discard pile.
Regardless of how many times this act has advanced, read the following:
As the hours pass, the ooze seeps back into the ground and lies dormant once more.
Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on each revealed [[Oozified]] location, to a maximum of its clue value. Draw the set-aside story card chosen as determined by the event organizer, resolving the side with the [[Part 1]] trait. Reset the act deck to act 1a.

name: Blackwater's Bane
text: Each [[Ooze]] enemy gains retaliate and loses the Blob X keyword. Objective - At the end of the round, you must advance. (The scenario will not end when this act advances.)

name: A Moment of Respite
text:
If this is the first time this act has advanced, read the following:
