name: Escort the Car
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: Revelation - Put the set-aside Armored Car into play at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Destroyer enemy at the Fungus Mound. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - After Armored Car enters the Fungus Mound: Remember that "the car reached its target." Flip this card over. Forced - If Armored Car is defeated or devoured: Remember that "the escort failed." Flip this card over.

name: Escort the Car
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text:
Read only if "the escort failed:" Remove Mi-Go Destroyer, Armored Car, and this card from the game. Each investigator takes 1 damage. Lose 1 countermeasure.
Read only if "the car reached its target:"
It's chilling what a machine of war can do when it's fully unleashed, but in this case, you're relieved at the thundering of its gun and the crunch of its tires on alien ground. With this area secure, the military can focus its efforts on the anomaly itself. Although they don't thank you for your efforts directly, the detachment of agents following you around tells you they view you as an asset.
Put the set-aside G-Men story asset into play under any investigator's control. Remove Armored Car from the game. Add Mi-Go Destroyer and this card to the victory display. Deal 5 damage to Subject 8L-08.

name: Armored Car
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: During the enemy phase, each ready enemy at Armored Car's location attacks it, instead of any other target.  During the investigation phase, investigators at this location may spend 1 [per_investigator] actions, as a group, to move Armored Car to a connecting location.

name: Mi-Go Destroyer
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: While Mi-Go Destroyer is ready, it gains: "Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: Move Mi-Go Destroyer once toward Armored Car." While attacking Armored Car, Mi-Go Destroyer deals +2 damage.

name: Reclaim the Brain
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: Revelation - Spawn the set-aside Mi-Go Scientist enemy at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Attach the set-aside Brain Case asset to Mi-Go Scientist. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - If Brain Case is at Research Site and under an investigator's control: Remember that "the brain was recovered." Flip this card over. Forced - If Brain Case is at Fungus Mound and attached to Mi-Go Scientist: Remember that "the brain was taken." Flip this card over.

name: Reclaim the Brain
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text:
Read only if "the brain was taken:" Remove Mi-Go Scientist, Brain Case, and this card from the game. The investigators, as a group, return 3 of their clues to the token pool.
Read only if "the brain was recovered:"
The scientists listen to your story and examine the cylinder. To your surprise, you hear a distorted voice from what must be a strange speaker stemming from the jar. The brain vibrates within. "Oh, thank the heavens. I can hear you. Where am I?" it asks. You explain what has transpired, and ask why the creatures were after it. "I know something they needed. Here, I can teach you - do you have a pen?"
Put the set-aside Corrosive Cloud story asset into play under any investigator's control. Remove Brain Case from the game. Add Mi-Go Scientist and this card to the victory display. Any investigator discovers 1 clue each from up to 2 locations. Gain 1 countermeasure.

name: Mi-Go Scientist
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: While Mi-Go Scientist is ready, it gains: "Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: If Brain Case is attached to Mi-Go Scientist, move Mi-Go Scientist once toward the Fungus Mound. Otherwise, move Mi‑Go Scientist once toward Brain Case's location, and if it is at Brain Case's location, attach Brain Case to it (if it is under an investigator's control, they lose control of it)."

name: Brain Case
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: If uncontrolled and unattached, attach Brain Case to its location.  While attached to a location or an exhausted enemy, Brain Case gains: "[action]: Test [intellect] or [agility] (6). If you succeed, detach Brain Case and take control of it."

name: Prevent Their Research
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: Revelation - Spawn both set-aside Mi-Go Researcher enemies, one at the Fungus Mound, and the other at the location farthest from the Fungus Mound. Put this card into play next to the act deck. Forced - If there are no Mi-Go Researcher enemies in play: Remember that "the Mi-Go research was stopped." Flip this card over. Forced - If there are 6 resources on this story card: Remember that "the Mi-Go completed their research." Flip this card over.

name: Prevent Their Research
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text:
Read only if "the Mi-Go completed their research:" Remove both Mi-Go Researchers and this card from the game. Each [[Ooze]] enemy that was researched readies and heals all damage on it. An investigator returns 1 of their clues to the token pool.
Read only if "the Mi-Go research was stopped:"
Eventually, the creatures' thirst for knowledge isn't enough to keep them in this hostile environment, and they flee back to the void of space - at least, for now. In the aftermath, you recover one of the strange tools the creatures were carrying: a scalpel of some glasslike, razor-sharp material.
Put the set-aside Alien Instruments story asset into play under any investigator's control. Add both Mi‑Go Researchers and this card to the victory display. Until the end of the game, each [[Mi-Go]] enemy gets -2 health and -2 evade. Any investigator discovers 1 clue at any revealed location.

name: Mi-Go Researcher
packName: The Blob That Ate Everything ELSE!
text: Aloof. While Mi-Go Researcher is ready, it gains: "Forced - At the start of the enemy phase: Move Mi-Go Researcher once toward the nearest [[Ooze]] enemy that has not been researched. For each such enemy at its location, place 1 resource on Prevent Their Research and 1 resource on that enemy; that enemy is 'researched.'"

name: Agnes Baker: The Waitress
text: [reaction] After 1 or more horror is placed on Agnes Baker: Deal 1 damage to an enemy at your location. (Limit once per phase.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each horror on Agnes Baker.

name: Heirloom of Hyperborea: Artifact from Another Life
text: Agnes Baker deck only. Advanced.  Only damage and/or horror from player card effects can be assigned to Heirloom of Hyperborea.  [reaction] After you play a [[Spell]] card: Draw 1 card.

name: Dark Memory
text: Advanced. Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance. Forced - If Dark Memory is in your hand at the end of your turn, reveal it and take 2 horror.

name: Bad Blood
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of memories Agnes Baker has collected.  [cultist]: -2. Ready Elspeth Baudin and resolve her patrol keyword.  [tablet]: -3. If you fail and there is a memory at Elspeth Baudin's location, place this token on that location.  [elder_thing]: -6. Agnes Baker may take up to 3 damage to increase your skill value by 2 for each damage taken.

name: Bad Blood
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the number of memories Agnes Baker has collected.  [cultist]: -3. Ready Elspeth Baudin and resolve her patrol keyword. If she is engaged with an investigator, she makes an attack.  [tablet]: -5. If you fail and there is a memory at Elspeth Baudin's location, place this token on that location.  [elder_thing]: -8. Agnes Baker may take up to 3 damage to increase your skill value by 2 for each damage taken.

name: Hyperborean Blood
text: Forced - At the end of the enemy phase, if Elspeth Baudin is ready and there is a memory at her location: Reveal a random token from the chaos bag and place it on that location. Forced - If there are 1 or more chaos tokens on a location without a memory: Return them to the chaos bag. Forced - If there are chaos tokens on a location with a memory that have a combined value of 6 or more (ignoring +/- and treating each [auto_fail] and [elder_sign] as a -6): Return them to the chaos bag, and Elspeth Baudin collects that memory.

name: Out For Blood
text: Elspeth Baudin attacks each investigator in player order, regardless of their current location (even if she is exhausted). Flip this agenda back over.

name: A Walk Down Memory Lane
text: [fast] Investigators at Agnes Baker's location spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Agnes Baker collects the memory at her location. Forced - If Agnes Baker is defeated, proceed to (→R2). Objective - Collect more memories than Elspeth. If all 9 memories have been collected (by either party), advance.

name: Memory of Eternal Conquest
text:
If Agnes collected more memories than Elspeth:
Elspeth falls before you, pain coursing through her body. "Go on, then. Finish it," she hisses through her teeth, glaring up at you with seething hatred. Arcane power crackles in your hand. She is your enemy. Your conquest. Her life, her memories, they are in your hands. You should take what is rightfully yours.
(→R1)
If Elspeth collected more memories than Agnes:
You fall to your knees, overcome by pain. Elspeth looms over you, her hands crackling with arcane energy. "You are weak," she taunts. "You are not deserving of this power. But I..." she grins. "I will be so much better."
(→R2)

name: Elspeth Baudin: Hyperborean Sorceress
text: Alert. Patrol (nearest location with at least 1 memory). Retaliate. Elspeth Baudin cannot be automatically evaded and gets -1 fight and -1 evade for each memory she has collected. Forced - When Elspeth Baudin would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from her, flip her over, and resolve the text on her other side.

name: Triumph and Subjugation
text: Agnes Baker must decide (choose one):  - Agnes Baker collects 1 memory from Elspeth Baudin.  - Agnes Baker gains 2 [per_investigator] clues from the token bank.  Then, flip this card over, exhausted and unengaged.

name: Roland Banks: The Fed
text: At deck creation, choose 3 different Directive assets to add to your deck. [fast]: Flip a Directive asset facedown (ignoring its permanent keyword). (Limit once per game.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. Choose a Directive asset. You may ignore its regulation ability this round.

name: Directive: Due Diligence
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot fight more than twice each round. [fast] During a skill test while investigating, evading, or parleying, exhaust this Directive: You get +2 skill value for this test for each enemy engaged with you.

name: Directive: Red Tape
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot play more than 2 cards each round. [reaction] When you play an [[Insight]] or [[Tactic]] event, exhaust this Directive: That event gains fast.

name: Directive: Consult Experts
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot voluntarily assign damage or horror to [[Ally]] assets. You have 1 additional ally slot.

name: Directive: Seek the Truth
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - When your location has 1 or more clues, you cannot commit cards to skill tests unless you have discovered a clue this round. [reaction] After you discover a clue, if an enemy is at your location, exhaust this Directive: Draw 1 card.

name: Directive: Leave No Doubt
text: Roland Banks deck only. Permanent. Regulation - You cannot move more than twice each round. You get +3 sanity.

name: Roland's .38 Special
text: Roland Banks deck only. Advanced. Uses (4 ammo). [action] Spend 1 ammo: Fight. You get +2 [combat] for this attack (if there are 1 or more clues on your location, you get +4 [combat], instead). This attack deals +1 damage. If this attack defeats an enemy and there are no clues on your location, place 1 ammo on Roland's .38 Special

name: Cover Up
text: Advanced. Revelation - Put Cover Up into play in your threat area, with 4 clues on it. [reaction] When you would discover 1 or more clues at your location: Discard that many clues from Cover Up instead. Forced - When the game ends, if there are any clues on Cover Up: You suffer 1 mental trauma.

name: By the Book
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display, to a maximum of 5.  [cultist]: -2. If a [[Cultist]] enemy is engaged with you, reveal an additional chaos token.  [tablet]: -3. Ready each [[Cultist]] enemy engaged with you.  [elder_thing]: -4. If you fail, Roland Banks takes 1 damage.

name: By the Book
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 plus the number of [[Cultist]] enemies in the victory display.  [cultist]: -3. If a [[Cultist]] enemy is engaged with you, reveal an additional chaos token.  [tablet]: -4. Ready each [[Cultist]] enemy engaged with you.  [elder_thing]: -5. If you fail, Roland Banks takes 1 damage.

name: A Covert Conspiracy
text: Forced - When a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy would be defeated: Heal damage from that enemy until it has 1 remaining health, instead. Forced - If Roland Banks is defeated: Proceed to (→R2) [action]: Resign. You don't want to miss your deadline, so you close the case.

name: Mr. Grey: Corrupt Politician
text: Spawn - Engaged with Roland Banks. Hunter. Mr. Grey gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - After Mr. Grey attacks an investigator: That investigator draws the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Your Deadline Nears
text: Forced - When a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy would be defeated: Heal damage from that enemy until it has 1 remaining health, instead. Forced - If Roland Banks is defeated: Proceed to (→R2) [action]: Resign. You don't want to miss your deadline, so you close the case.

name: Time Has Run Out
text: Remove a [[Cultist]] enemy in the victory display from the game (Mr. Grey, if able). (→R1).

name: Capture the Conspirators
text: [fast] The investigators spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Flip over a facedown conspirator at your location and put it into play engaged with you. [fast] Spend 1 resource: Exhaust a [[Cultist]] enemy engaged with you (it remains engaged). Only Roland Banks may trigger this ability.] Objective - Parley with as many conspirators as you can. If 10 [[Cultist]] enemies are in the victory display, advance.

name: Arkham Police Station
text: Arkham Police Station is connected to Rivertown, Downtown, and Easttown, and vice versa. [fast]: Move to a connecting location. [fast] Choose a non-weakness [[Cultist]] enemy at this location and spend clues equal to its remaining health: Parley. Add that enemy to the victory display.

name: Arkham Police Station
text: Arkham Police Station is connected to Rivertown, Downtown, and Easttown, and vice versa.

[elder_sign] effect: +2. Search the chaos bag for up to 2 [bless] and/or [curse] tokens and reveal them, ignoring their effects.

name: Wendy's Amulet
text: Wendy Adams deck only. Advanced. You may play any event in your discard pile as if it were in your hand. Forced - After you play an event or discard an event from play: Place it on the bottom of your deck instead of in your discard pile.

name: Abandoned and Alone
text: Advanced. Revelation - Remove all non-weakness cards in your discard pile from the game. If no cards were removed by this effect, shuffle this card back into your deck. Otherwise, take 3 direct horror.

name: Red Tide Rising
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is half the number of [[Suspect]] and [[Hideout]] cards in the victory display (rounded up).  [cultist]: -2. (-4 instead if you are parleying with a [[Suspect]] enemy or investigating a [[Hideout]] location).  [tablet]: -3. If you succeed, look at the top card of the Leads deck. You may choose to shuffle the Leads deck.  [elder_thing]: -1. If you fail, shuffle the top card of the encounter deck into the Leads deck.

You may choose to shuffle the Leads deck.  [elder_thing]: -2. If you fail, shuffle the top card of the encounter deck into the Leads deck.

name: The New Girl
text: Forced - When this agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold: Instead, remove all doom in play and shuffle a random set-aside [[Monster]] enemy into the [[Leads]] deck. Then, if there are no set-aside [[Monster]] enemies, advance to agenda 1b.

name: Too Many Questions
text: Spawn the set-aside Angry Mob enemy at Innsmouth Square, exhausted.  Place 1 [per_investigator] clues on each [[Suspect]] enemy and [[Hideout]] location in play.

name: Trail Goes Cold
text: Angry Mob cannot be defeated.  [reaction] After Wendy Adams evades Angry Mob: She may discover 1 clue from its location.  Each [[Suspect]] enemy loses aloof and enters play with +1 [per_investigator] clues.  Each [[Hideout]] location gets +1 [per_investigator] clue value.

name: Searching for Dad
text: [[Suspect]] and [[Hideout]] cards cannot be added to the victory display except using Mysterious Photo. Forced - If there are no [[Suspect]] or [[Hideout]] cards in play: Wendy Adams must draw cards from the top of the Leads deck until she draws a [[Suspect]] or [[Hideout]] card. Objective - Search for Dad using Mysterious Photo. The fewer cards that remain in the Leads deck, the better. If it is empty, advance.

name: Mysterious Photo: All I Have Left of Him
text: [fast] Exhaust Mysterious Photo: Either take a parley action on a [[Suspect]] enemy or flip Mysterious Photo over. [fast] If there is a [[Suspect]] enemy with no clues on it at your location, investigators at your location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group (2 [per_investigator] clues instead if it is agenda 2): "Have you seen my dad?" Add that enemy to the victory display.

name: Mysterious Photo: All I Have Left of Him
text: [fast] Exhaust Mysterious Photo: Either take an investigate action at a [[Hideout]] location or flip Mysterious Photo over. [fast] If you are at a [[Hideout]] location with no clues on it, investigators at that location spend clues, as a group, equal to its clue value: "Where is Dad now?" Add that location to the victory display, moving each enemy and investigator there to a connecting location.

[elder_sign] effect: +1. Choose a card you own attached to a scenario card. You may return the chosen card to your hand.

name: Jim's Trumpet: The Dead Speak
text: Jim Culver deck only. Advanced.  [reaction] When a [skull] or [curse] token is revealed during a skill test you are performing, exhaust Jim's Trumpet: Heal 1 horror from each investigator and [[Ally]] asset at your location or a connecting location.

name: Final Rhapsody
text: Advanced. Revelation - Reveal 5 chaos tokens from the chaos bag. For each non-[elder_sign], non-[bless] symbol token revealed, take 1 damage and 1 horror.

name: The Beyond: Black Netherworld
text: Jim Culver deck only. Permanent. Each attached spirit loses all printed traits and gains the [[Geist]] trait. When damage/horror would be placed on an attached spirit, it must be placed on Jim Culver, instead. Forced - When your turn begins: Attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. If 4 or more spirits are attached, flip this card and resolve its text.

name: The Beyond
text:
Forced - One at a time, choose each non-weakness spirit attached to The Beyond and reveal a random token from the chaos bag. If it is... - ... an [elder_sign] token: You may either heal 1 horror, or attach the top card of the spirit deck to The Beyond, as a spirit. (Do not reveal tokens for the spirit you attach after resolving this effect.) - ... an [auto_fail] token: Discard this spirit. Take 1 direct damage/horror. - ...a [skull] token: Discard this spirit. Heal 1 horror. - ...a [cultist], [elder_thing], [tablet], or [curse] token: You must either discard this spirit or take 1 direct damage. - ...any other token: Discard this spirit. Flip this card back to its asset side.
Reminder: Spirits attached to The Beyond are in play but only retain their names and text boxes. Spirits do not take up slots and do not have health or sanity values. When a unique spirit is attached to The Beyond, any other asset that shares its name and is already in play is discarded. Spirits are always discarded to the bottom of the spirit deck.

name: Vengeful Shade
text: Hunter. Prey - Jim Culver only. You may fight or evade this enemy while it is attached to The Beyond (as if it were engaged with you). If you succeed, discard it. If you fail, spawn it engaged with you. Forced - When you attach a spirit to The Beyond via its forced effect: Vengeful Shade attacks you (even if it is not at your location).

name: Laid to Rest
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the number of copies of Unfinished Business in the victory display.  [cultist]: -X. X is the number of cards attached to The Beyond.  [tablet]: -X. X is the number of [[Spectral]] locations in play.  [elder_thing]: -2. If there is a [[Geist]] enemy at your location, reveal another token.

name: Laid to Rest
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 2 more than the number of copies of Unfinished Business in the victory display.  [cultist]: -X. X is twice the number of cards attached to The Beyond.  [tablet]: -X. X is twice the number of [[Spectral]] locations in play.  [elder_thing]: -3. If there is a [[Geist]] enemy at your location, you automatically fail.

name: Gathering Mists
text: Forced - When the enemy phase begins: Deal 1 damage to Jean Devereux for each ready Ravenous Spirit at his location. Forced - If Jim Culver is defeated: Advance the act. [action] Spend 2 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Parley. You banish a spirit. Discard the top card of the Spirit deck. (Hint: Draw Heretics out of the Beyond and summon them with Jean's help!)

name: The Hour Grows Late...
text: Place 1 horror on the scenario reference card under Spiritual Disturbance. If there is 4 horror on the scenario reference card, each investigator who has not been eliminated is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma. (→R2) Otherwise (if there is 3 or fewer horror on the scenario reference card), perform the following: - Place clues on each location until it has 1 [per_investigator] clues on it. - Flip each location except for Jean Devereux's location to its non-[[Spectral]] side. Flip this agenda back over.

name: Laid to Rest
text: [fast] Either exhaust Jim's Trumpet, or spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Choose an enemy to move once toward Jim Culver's location. [fast] Spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Flip your location. (Group limit once per round per location.) Objective - If there are 4 copies of Unfinished Business in the victory display, advance.

name: The Spectral Storm
text:
If this act advanced via its objective:
"Wait," says Jean, steadying himself. His eyes roll back in his head and he collapses into your arms, shaking. The spiritual energy around you seems to still.
Find each Ravenous Spirit in play and place it in the victory display. (→R1)
Otherwise:
"It's too much!" Jean screams as he holds his hands to his bleeding ears. A cacophanous cry echoes across the wind-swept hill as you both flee the scene.
Jim Culver suffers 1 mental trauma for each Heretic enemy still in The Beyond (to a minimum of 1 mental trauma). Each other investigator who was not eliminated is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma. (→R2)

name: Jean Devereux: Seeking Closure
text: Aloof. Patrol (Nearest location with a Ravenous Spirit enemy beneath it). Cannot be engaged. [action] Draw a facedown card beneath Jean Devereux's location and choose a Heretic attached to The Beyond: Parley. Jim Culver draws the chosen Heretic, flips it, and resolves its text. Forced - When Jean Devereux would be defeated: Instead, heal all damage from him and flip him.

name: Jean Devereux: Possessed
text: Hunter. Prey - Jim Culver only. [action]: Parley. Test [willpower] (3). This test gets +1 difficulty for each copy of Unfinished Business in the victory display. If you succeed, heal all damage from Jean Devereux and flip him (he is no longer engaged). Forced - If Jean Devereux is defeated: Advance the act.

name: Ravenous Spirit: Possessed
text: Aloof. Patrol (Jean Devereux's location). Retaliate. Ravenous Spirit gets +2 [per_investigator] health. Forced - When this enemy enters a location: Flip that location to its [[Spectral]] side. One at a time, each investigator at that location resolves each haunted ability on it.

name: Inner Chamber

name: Lola Hayes: The Actress
packName: Enthralling Encore / The Path to Carcosa
text: Mutated. Deck Size: 35. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor, Guardian, Seeker, Rogue, and Mystic cards ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], and [mystic]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of Improvisation, 2 copies of Crisis of Identity, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Requirements: Your deck must include at least 7 cards each from 3 different classes ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], or [mystic]). Additional Setup: After you draw your opening hand, choose a role ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or Neutral).

name: Lola Hayes: The Actress
packName: The Path to Carcosa / Enthralling Encore
text: Forced - After you draw your opening hand: Choose a role ([survivor], [guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or Neutral). You can only play, commit, or trigger abilities on Neutral cards or cards of your role. [fast]: Switch your role. (Limit once per round.) [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

name: Lola Hayes: The Actress
packName: The Path to Carcosa / Enthralling Encore
text: Deck size: 40. Class Choices: At deck creation, choose 2 classes ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Options: Neutral cards level 0-5, cards from your chosen classes level 0-4, cards from other classes level 0-1. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of Improvisation, 2 copies of Crisis of Identity, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Requirements: Your deck must include at least 6 cards from each class ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], and [survivor]).

name: Lola Hayes: The Actress
packName: The Path to Carcosa / Enthralling Encore
text: Mutated.  You can only play, commit, or trigger abilities on Neutral cards or cards of your role.  [fast]: Switch your role. (Limit once per round.)  [action]: Switch roles. Does not provoke attacks of opportunity.  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may switch roles.

name: Lola Hayes: The Actress
packName: The Path to Carcosa / Enthralling Encore
text: Deck size: 40. Class Choices: At deck creation, choose 2 classes ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Options: Neutral cards level 0-5, cards from your chosen classes level 0-4, cards from other classes level 0-1. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 2 copies of Improvisation, 2 copies of Crisis of Identity, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Requirements: Your deck must include at least 6 cards from each class ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], and [survivor]).

name: Leading Lady (Heroine)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost). If that card was a Guardian ([guardian]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take a fight action.

name: Leading Lady (Mentor)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost). If that card was a Seeker ([seeker]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take an investigate action.

name: Leading Lady (Femme Fatale)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost). If that card was a Rogue ([rogue]) card, you may either draw 1 card or immediately take an evade action.

name: Leading Lady (Enchantress)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost). If that card was a Mystic ([mystic]) card, you may either draw 1 card or remove 1 doom from a player card at your location.

name: Leading Lady (Final Girl)
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Play a card from your hand, regardless of your current role (paying its cost). If that card was a Survivor ([survivor]) card, you may either draw 1 card or heal 1 damage/horror.

name: Samuel Blake: Obsessive Producer
text: Lola Hayes deck only. Replacement. Peril.  While Samuel Blake is in your hand, you cannot switch roles or play cards belonging to another role.  While Samuel Blake is in play, as an additional cost for you to switch your role, you must take 1 horror.

name: Enthralling Encore
text: Easy / Standard  [skull]: -X. X is the number of measures.  [cultist]: -2. If you fail, you must either spend 1 clue or take 1 damage.  [tablet]: -3 (-5 instead if there are 3 or more classes among cards you control).  [elder_thing]: -2. If Sinister Soloist is at your location, reveal another token.

name: Enthralling Encore
text: Hard / Expert  [skull]: -X. X is 1 more than the number of measures.  [cultist]: -3. If you fail, you must spend 1 clue and take 1 damage.  [tablet]: -4 (-6 instead if there are 3 or more classes among cards you control).  [elder_thing]: -3. If Sinister Soloist is at your location, you automatically fail instead.

name: The Haunting of the Ward Theatre
text: [fast] While at Sinister Soloist's location, discard 1 card of each class from your hand ([guardian], [seeker], [rogue], [mystic], and [survivor]): Parley. Automatically evade Sinister Soloist. Treat Sinister Soloist's text box as if it were blank (except for [[Traits]]) for the remainder of the round.

name: Dirge of Dim Carcosa
text: Place 1 resource on the scenario reference card, as a measure. Then if there are 5 or more measures, each investigator is defeated and suffers 1 mental trauma.  Otherwise, each investigator must test [willpower](3). Each investigator who fails takes 1 horror and sets aside 1 non-permanent, non-weakness asset they control. Then, shuffle each asset set aside by this effect into the Props deck. If all investigators fail this test, remove 1[per_investigator] damage from Sinister Soloist.  Place clues on each revealed location, up to its clue value.  Shuffle the encounter discard pile into the encounter deck. Reset this agenda to agenda 1a.

name: Break Free from the Past
text: [fast] Investigators at the same [[Private]] location spend 1 [per_investigator] clues, as a group: Parley. Reveal the top 3 cards of the Props deck and choose an investigator to draw 1 of them. Shuffle the remaining cards together and place them on the bottom of the Props deck. Objective - When Sinister Soloist is in the victory display, advance.

name: Sinister Soloist: Minstrel of Carcosa
text: Alert. Aloof. Elusive. Hunter. As an additional cost to play a non-Neutral card at Sinister Soloist's location, you must take 1 horror. Forced - When the enemy phase ends, if Sinister Soloist is ready: Each investigator at Sinister Soloist's location and each connecting location takes 1 direct horror.

name: Jenny Barnes: The Dilettante
text: You collect 1 additional resource during each upkeep phase.  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each resource you have.

name: Jenny Barnes: The Dilettante
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to five other level 0 cards from any other class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Jenny's Twin .45s, Searching for Izzie, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Green Man Medallion: Hour of the Huntress
text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement.  [fast] Spend up to 3 resources and exhaust Green Man Medallion: Place those resources on it, as offerings.  [reaction] When you resign or the game ends: For every 6 offerings on Green Man Medallion, reduce the experience cost of the next card you purchase before the next scenario by 1.

name: Sacrificial Beast
text: Jenny Barnes deck only. Replacement. Spawn - Location farthest from you. Jenny Barnes cannot gain resources via card effects.

name: Roland Banks: The Fed
text: [reaction] After you defeat an enemy: Discover 1 clue at your location. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +1 for each clue on your location.

name: Roland Banks: The Fed
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-5, Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Roland's .38 Special, Cover Up, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Mysteries Remain
text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Fast. Play only during your turn. Either place 1 clue (from the token bank) on your location, or discover 1 clue at your location. Remove Mysteries Remain from the game.

name: The Dirge of Reason
text: Roland Banks deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Place 2 of your clues on your location. If you cannot, place all of your clues on your location, take 1 horror, and shuffle The Dirge of Reason back into your deck.

name: Norman Withers: The Astronomer
text: Play with the top card of your deck revealed. Once per round, you may play the top card of your deck as if it were in your hand, at -1 resource cost. Forced - After a weakness is revealed while on top of your deck: Draw it. [elder_sign] effect: +X. You may swap the top card of your deck with a card in your hand. X is the resource cost of the top card of your deck.

name: Norman Withers: The Astronomer
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Seeker cards ([seeker]) level 0, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 1-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 5 other Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Livre d'Eibon, The Harbinger, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Split the Angle: Ire of the Void
text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement.  [action]: Reveal the top card of the encounter deck.  [fast] Exhaust Split the Angle and discard the top card of your deck: Discard the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Vengeful Hound
text: Norman Withers deck only. Replacement. Prey - Norman Withers. While Vengeful Hounds is engaged with you, you cannot draw or reveal cards via player card effects.

name: Carolyn Fern: The Psychologist
text: [reaction] After one of your card effects heals horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset: The healed card's controller gains 1 resource.  [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may heal 1 horror from an investigator or [[Ally]] asset at your location.

name: Carolyn Fern: The Psychologist
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Guardian cards ([guardian]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, cards that "heal horror" level 0-5, up to 15 other Seeker and/or Mystic cards level 0-1 ([seeker] and/or [mystic]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Hypnotic Therapy, Rational Thought, 1 random basic weakness. Additional Restrictions: No [[Weapon]] cards level 1-5.

name: Foolishness: Foolish Cat of Ulthar
text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement.  Foolishness enters play with 3 horror on him. Horror on him may be healed as if it were on Carolyn Fern. While Foolishness has no horror on him, you get +1 to all skills.

name: To Fight the Black Wind
text: Carolyn Fern deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Attach To Fight the Black Wind to the current agenda. Carolyn Fern takes 1 direct horror. Forced - At the end of the round, if any amount of horror was assigned to an investigator this round and it was not healed: Place 1 doom on attached agenda.

name: Silas Marsh: The Sailor
text: [reaction] After you reveal a chaos token during a skill test you are performing. Return a skill you committed to this test to your hand. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +0. You may commit a skill from your discard pile to this test. After this test ends, return that skill to your hand instead of discarding it.

name: Silas Marsh: The Sailor
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Survivor cards ([survivor]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, [[Innate]] skills level 0-2. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Sea Change Harpoon, Silas's Net, Siren Call, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Nautical Prowess
text: Silas Marsh deck only. Replacement.  If a chaos token with a negative modifier is revealed during this test, either draw 1 card or Nautical Prowess gains [wild][wild].

name: Dreams of the Deep: The Deep Gate
text: Silas Marsh deck only. Replacement. This skill's icons subtract from your skill value instead of adding to it. If this skill test fails, return this skill to your hand. Forced - If Dreams of the Deep is in your hand at the end of your turn: Reveal it and take 2 damage.

name: Dexter Drake: The Magician
text: [fast] During your turn, discard an asset you control: Play an asset with a different title from your hand, reducing its cost by 1. (Limit once per round.)  [elder_sign] effect: +2. You may return an asset from your play area to your hand. Then, draw 1 card.

name: Dexter Drake: The Magician
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Rogue cards ([rogue]) level 0-2, Neutral cards level 0-5. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Showmanship, Occult Scraps, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Molly Maxwell: The Exotic Morgana
text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement.  [fast] Exhaust Molly Maxwell and deal her 1 horror: Name any trait. One at a time, reveal cards from the top of your deck until an asset with the named trait is revealed. Draw that asset. Shuffle each other revealed card back into your deck.

name: Yaztaroth
text: Dexter Drake deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Put Yaztaroth into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or put assets into play. [action] [action]: Discard Yaztaroth.

name: Gloria Goldberg: The Writer
text: You choose the investigator order during the mythos phase.  [reaction] When you look at 1 or more cards from the encounter deck: Look at 1 additional card and choose 1 non-[[Elite]] card among them. Either discard it, put it on top of the encounter deck, or place it facedown beneath Gloria Goldberg (max 3 cards beneath her).  [elder_sign] effect: +1. Look at the top card of the encounter deck.

name: Gloria Goldberg: The Writer
text: Deck Size: 30. Secondary Class Choice: At deck creation, choose Guardian ([guardian]), Seeker ([seeker]), or Rogue ([rogue]). Deckbuilding Options: Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-5, Neutral cards level 0-5, up to 10 level 0-1 events and/or skills of your chosen secondary class. Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): 3 copies of Psychic Sensitivity, 3 copies of Prophecy of the End (shuffled into the encounter deck), 1 random basic weakness.

name: Ruth Westmacott: Dark Revelations
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only. Replacement.  [reaction] When an investigator fights, attempts to evade, or initiates a skill test on an encounter card, discard an encounter card that shares a [[Trait]] with that encounter card from beneath Gloria Goldberg: Reduce the difficulty of this skill test by 2.

name: Liber Omnium Finium
text: Gloria Goldberg deck only. Replacement. Revelation - Draw a random non-weakness encounter card from beneath Gloria Goldberg. That card gains peril, its effects cannot be canceled, and you get -2 to all skills while resolving its effects. If that card is an enemy, it immediately attacks you. If no card is drawn by this effect, shuffle this card back into your deck.

name: Marie Lambeau: The Entertainer
text: While you have 1 or more doom among cards you control, you may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to play [[Spell]] cards or activate [[Spell]] [action] abilities.  [elder_sign] effect: +1. You may add 1 doom to or remove 1 doom from a card you control.

name: Marie Lambeau: The Entertainer
text: Deck Size: 30. Deckbuilding Options: [[Spell]] cards level 0-5, Mystic cards ([mystic]) level 0-3, Neutral cards level 0-5, [[Occult]] cards level 0, up to five other level 0 Seeker and/or Survivor cards ([seeker] and/or [survivor]). Deckbuilding Requirements (do not count toward deck size): Mystifying Song, Baron Samedi, 1 random basic weakness.

name: Mystifying Song
text: Marie Lambeau deck only.  Fast. Play when the agenda would advance by reaching its doom threshold.  Until the end of the phase, the agenda cannot advance by reaching its doom threshold. Remove Mystifying Song from the game.

name: Baron Samedi: Lord of the Cemetery
text: Revelation - Put Baron Samedi into play. He cannot leave play while he has less than 3 doom on him. Forced - When any amount of damage is placed on an investigator in Baron Samedi's location: Place 1 additional damage on that investigator. [fast] Exhaust Baron Samedi: Place 1 doom on Baron Samedi. If he has 3 or more doom on him, discard him.
